title: Towards Multi-Robot Task-Motion Planning for Navigation in Belief Space
title_zh: 面向置信空间导航的多机器人任务运动规划
comment: Full version of the ECAI-STAIRS 2020 paper. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1910.11683
comments: Full version of the ECAI-STAIRS 2020 paper. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1910.11683
abstract: Autonomous robots operating in large knowledgeintensive domains require planning in the discrete (task) space and the continuous (motion) space. In knowledge-intensive domains, on the one hand, robots have to reason at the highestlevel, for example the regions to navigate to or objects to be picked up and their properties; on the other hand, the feasibility of the respective navigation tasks have to be checked at the controller execution level. Moreover, employing multiple robots offer enhanced performance capabilities over a single robot performing the same task. To this end, we present an integrated multi-robot task-motion planning framework for navigation in knowledge-intensive domains. In particular, we consider a distributed multi-robot setting incorporating mutual observations between the robots. The framework is intended for motion planning under motion and sensing uncertainty, which is formally known as belief space planning. The underlying methodology and its limitations are discussed, providing suggestions for improvements and future work. We validate key aspects of our approach in simulation.
summary: Autonomous robots operating in large knowledgeintensive domains require planning in the discrete (task) space and the continuous (motion) space. In knowledge-intensive domains, on the one hand, robots have to reason at the highestlevel, for example the regions to navigate to or objects to be picked up and their properties; on the other hand, the feasibility of the respective navigation tasks have to be checked at the controller execution level. Moreover, employing multiple robots offer enhanced performance capabilities over a single robot performing the same task. To this end, we present an integrated multi-robot task-motion planning framework for navigation in knowledge-intensive domains. In particular, we consider a distributed multi-robot setting incorporating mutual observations between the robots. The framework is intended for motion planning under motion and sensing uncertainty, which is formally known as belief space planning. The underlying methodology and its limitations are discussed, providing suggestions for improvements and future work. We validate key aspects of our approach in simulation.
abstract_zh: 在大型知识密集型领域中运行的自主机器人需要在离散（任务）空间和连续（运动）空间中进行规划。在知识密集型领域，一方面，机器人必须进行最高层次的推理，例如要导航到的区域或要拾取的物体及其属性；另一方面，必须在控制器执行级别检查各个导航任务的可行性。此外，与执行相同任务的单个机器人相比，使用多个机器人可以提供更高的性能。为此，我们提出了一个集成的多机器人任务运动规划框架，用于知识密集型领域的导航。特别是，我们考虑了一种分布式多机器人设置，其中包含机器人之间的相互观察。该框架旨在用于运动和感知不确定性下的运动规划，其正式名称为置信空间规划。讨论了基本方法及其局限性，并提供了改进和未来工作的建议。我们在模拟中验证了我们方法的关键方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多机器人任务-运动规划框架，用于在信念空间中处理知识密集型领域的导航问题。
AI.motivation: 单个机器人难以同时处理复杂领域的高层任务规划与底层运动控制，而多机器人协作可提升性能，但需应对运动与感知不确定性。
AI.method: 采用分布式多机器人设置，结合机器人间互観测，通过信念空间规划方法整合任务与运动规划，处理不确定性。
AI.result: 通过仿真验证了框架在处理不确定性任务中的有效性，展示了多机器人协作的性能优势。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为复杂领域的多机器人任务-运动规划提供了可行方案，但仍需进一步优化以应对更复杂场景。

authors_text: Jingren Xu,Yukiyasu Domae,Toshio Ueshiba,Weiwei Wan,Kensuke Harada
title: Planning a Sequence of Base Positions for a Mobile Manipulator to Perform Multiple Pick-and-Place Tasks
title_zh: 规划移动机械手的基本位置序列以执行多个拾取和放置任务
comment: video: https://youtu.be/JNww18l13dI. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2001.08042
comments: video: https://youtu.be/JNww18l13dI. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2001.08042
abstract: In this paper, we present a planner that plans a sequence of base positions for a mobile manipulator to efficiently and robustly collect objects stored in distinct trays. We achieve high efficiency by exploring the common areas where a mobile manipulator can grasp objects stored in multiple trays simultaneously and move the mobile manipulator to the common areas to reduce the time needed for moving the mobile base. We ensure robustness by optimizing the base position with the best clearance to positioning uncertainty so that a mobile manipulator can complete the task even if there is a certain deviation from the planned base positions. Besides, considering different styles of object placement in the tray, we analyze feasible schemes for dynamically updating the base positions based on either the remaining objects or the target objects to be picked in one round of the tasks. In the experiment part, we examine our planner on various scenarios, including different object placement: (1) Regularly placed toy objects; (2) Randomly placed industrial parts; and different schemes for online execution: (1) Apply globally static base positions; (2) Dynamically update the base positions. The experiment results demonstrate the efficiency, robustness and feasibility of the proposed method.
summary: In this paper, we present a planner that plans a sequence of base positions for a mobile manipulator to efficiently and robustly collect objects stored in distinct trays. We achieve high efficiency by exploring the common areas where a mobile manipulator can grasp objects stored in multiple trays simultaneously and move the mobile manipulator to the common areas to reduce the time needed for moving the mobile base. We ensure robustness by optimizing the base position with the best clearance to positioning uncertainty so that a mobile manipulator can complete the task even if there is a certain deviation from the planned base positions. Besides, considering different styles of object placement in the tray, we analyze feasible schemes for dynamically updating the base positions based on either the remaining objects or the target objects to be picked in one round of the tasks. In the experiment part, we examine our planner on various scenarios, including different object placement: (1) Regularly placed toy objects; (2) Randomly placed industrial parts; and different schemes for online execution: (1) Apply globally static base positions; (2) Dynamically update the base positions. The experiment results demonstrate the efficiency, robustness and feasibility of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一个规划器，它规划移动机械手的一系列基本位置，以有效、稳健地收集存储在不同托盘中的物体。我们通过探索移动机械手可以同时抓取多个托盘中存储的物体并将移动机械手移动到公共区域以减少移动底座所需的时间来实现高效率。我们通过优化基座位置来保证鲁棒性，使其具有最佳的定位不确定性，这样即使与计划的基座位置存在一定偏差，移动机械手也能完成任务。此外，考虑到托盘中不同的物体放置方式，我们分析了基于剩余物体或一轮任务中要拾取的目标物体动态更新基本位置的可行方案。在实验部分，我们在各种场景下检查我们的规划器，包括不同的物体放置：（1）规则放置的玩具物体； (2) 随意放置的工业零件；以及在线执行的不同方案：（1）应用全局静态基点； (2)动态更新基准位置。实验结果证明了该方法的高效性、鲁棒性和可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种为移动机械臂规划基础位置序列的方法，以高效且稳健地完成多个拾取和放置任务。
AI.motivation: 为了提高移动机械臂在不同托盘中拾取物体的效率和鲁棒性，需要一种能够减少移动时间并适应不确定性的规划方法。
AI.method: 通过探索移动机械臂可以同时抓取多个托盘中物体的公共区域，优化基础位置以减少移动时间，并根据剩余物体或目标物体动态更新基础位置。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在不同物体放置方式和在线执行方案中均表现出较高的效率、鲁棒性和可行性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的规划方法能够有效提升移动机械臂在多任务场景下的性能，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Weili Nie,Zhiding Yu,Lei Mao,Ankit B. Patel,Yuke Zhu,Animashree Anandkumar
title: Bongard-LOGO: A New Benchmark for Human-Level Concept Learning and Reasoning
title_zh: Bongard-LOGO：人类水平概念学习和推理的新基准
abstract: Humans have an inherent ability to learn novel concepts from only a few samples and generalize these concepts to different situations. Even though today's machine learning models excel with a plethora of training data on standard recognition tasks, a considerable gap exists between machine-level pattern recognition and human-level concept learning. To narrow this gap, the Bongard problems (BPs) were introduced as an inspirational challenge for visual cognition in intelligent systems. Despite new advances in representation learning and learning to learn, BPs remain a daunting challenge for modern AI. Inspired by the original one hundred BPs, we propose a new benchmark Bongard-LOGO for human-level concept learning and reasoning. We develop a program-guided generation technique to produce a large set of human-interpretable visual cognition problems in action-oriented LOGO language. Our benchmark captures three core properties of human cognition: 1) context-dependent perception, in which the same object may have disparate interpretations given different contexts; 2) analogy-making perception, in which some meaningful concepts are traded off for other meaningful concepts; and 3) perception with a few samples but infinite vocabulary. In experiments, we show that the state-of-the-art deep learning methods perform substantially worse than human subjects, implying that they fail to capture core human cognition properties. Finally, we discuss research directions towards a general architecture for visual reasoning to tackle this benchmark.
summary: Humans have an inherent ability to learn novel concepts from only a few samples and generalize these concepts to different situations. Even though today's machine learning models excel with a plethora of training data on standard recognition tasks, a considerable gap exists between machine-level pattern recognition and human-level concept learning. To narrow this gap, the Bongard problems (BPs) were introduced as an inspirational challenge for visual cognition in intelligent systems. Despite new advances in representation learning and learning to learn, BPs remain a daunting challenge for modern AI. Inspired by the original one hundred BPs, we propose a new benchmark Bongard-LOGO for human-level concept learning and reasoning. We develop a program-guided generation technique to produce a large set of human-interpretable visual cognition problems in action-oriented LOGO language. Our benchmark captures three core properties of human cognition: 1) context-dependent perception, in which the same object may have disparate interpretations given different contexts; 2) analogy-making perception, in which some meaningful concepts are traded off for other meaningful concepts; and 3) perception with a few samples but infinite vocabulary. In experiments, we show that the state-of-the-art deep learning methods perform substantially worse than human subjects, implying that they fail to capture core human cognition properties. Finally, we discuss research directions towards a general architecture for visual reasoning to tackle this benchmark.
abstract_zh: 人类具有从少数样本中学习新概念并将这些概念推广到不同情况的固有能力。尽管当今的机器学习模型在标准识别任务上拥有大量训练数据，但机器级别的模式识别和人类级别的概念学习之间仍存在相当大的差距。为了缩小这一差距，邦加德问题（BP）被引入，作为智能系统中视觉认知的鼓舞人心的挑战。尽管表征学习和学会学习方面取得了新的进展，但 BP 仍然是现代人工智能面临的一项艰巨挑战。受原始一百个BP的启发，我们提出了用于人类级别概念学习和推理的新基准Bongard-LOGO。我们开发了一种程序引导生成技术，以面向动作的 LOGO 语言生成大量人类可解释的视觉认知问题。我们的基准捕获了人类认知的三个核心属性：1）上下文相关的感知，其中同一对象在不同的​​上下文中可能有不同的解释； 2）类比感知，其中一些有意义的概念被其他有意义的概念所取代； 3）少量样本但无限词汇的感知。在实验中，我们表明最先进的深度学习方法的表现比人类受试者要差得多，这意味着它们无法捕捉人类的核心认知特性。最后，我们讨论了视觉推理通用架构的研究方向，以应对这一基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的基准测试Bongard-LOGO，用于评估人类级别的概念学习和推理能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管现代机器学习模型在标准识别任务上表现优异，但它们与人类在概念学习和推理方面仍存在显著差距。Bongard问题（BPs）作为视觉认知的挑战，对现代AI来说仍然困难。因此，本文旨在通过设计新的基准测试来缩小这一差距。
AI.method: 作者开发了一种基于程序引导的生成技术，利用LOGO语言生成大量可解释的视觉认知问题，以捕捉人类认知的三个核心属性：上下文依赖感知、类比感知和少量样本但无限词汇的感知。
AI.result: 实验表明，最先进的深度学习方法在该基准测试中的表现远低于人类，说明它们未能捕捉到人类认知的核心属性。
AI.conclusion: 本文指出需要开发一种通用的视觉推理架构来应对这一基准测试，并为未来的研究方向提供了讨论。

search_text: Bongard-LOGO: A New Benchmark for Human-Level Concept Learning and Reasoning Bongard-LOGO：人类水平概念学习和推理的新基准 Humans have an inherent ability to learn novel concepts from only a few samples and generalize these concepts to different situations. Even though today's machine learning models excel with a plethora of training data on standard recognition tasks, a considerable gap exists between machine-level pattern recognition and human-level concept learning. To narrow this gap, the Bongard problems (BPs) were introduced as an inspirational challenge for visual cognition in intelligent systems. Despite new advances in representation learning and learning to learn, BPs remain a daunting challenge for modern AI. Inspired by the original one hundred BPs, we propose a new benchmark Bongard-LOGO for human-level concept learning and reasoning. We develop a program-guided generation technique to produce a large set of human-interpretable visual cognition problems in action-oriented LOGO language. Our benchmark captures three core properties of human cognition: 1) context-dependent perception, in which the same object may have disparate interpretations given different contexts; 2) analogy-making perception, in which some meaningful concepts are traded off for other meaningful concepts; and 3) perception with a few samples but infinite vocabulary. In experiments, we show that the state-of-the-art deep learning methods perform substantially worse than human subjects, implying that they fail to capture core human cognition properties. Finally, we discuss research directions towards a general architecture for visual reasoning to tackle this benchmark. 人类具有从少数样本中学习新概念并将这些概念推广到不同情况的固有能力。尽管当今的机器学习模型在标准识别任务上拥有大量训练数据，但机器级别的模式识别和人类级别的概念学习之间仍存在相当大的差距。为了缩小这一差距，邦加德问题（BP）被引入，作为智能系统中视觉认知的鼓舞人心的挑战。尽管表征学习和学会学习方面取得了新的进展，但 BP 仍然是现代人工智能面临的一项艰巨挑战。受原始一百个BP的启发，我们提出了用于人类级别概念学习和推理的新基准Bongard-LOGO。我们开发了一种程序引导生成技术，以面向动作的 LOGO 语言生成大量人类可解释的视觉认知问题。我们的基准捕获了人类认知的三个核心属性：1）上下文相关的感知，其中同一对象在不同的​​上下文中可能有不同的解释； 2）类比感知，其中一些有意义的概念被其他有意义的概念所取代； 3）少量样本但无限词汇的感知。在实验中，我们表明最先进的深度学习方法的表现比人类受试者要差得多，这意味着它们无法捕捉人类的核心认知特性。最后，我们讨论了视觉推理通用架构的研究方向，以应对这一基准。 本文提出了一种新的基准测试Bongard-LOGO，用于评估人类级别的概念学习和推理能力。 Weili Nie,Zhiding Yu,Lei Mao,Ankit B. Patel,Yuke Zhu,Animashree Anandkumar cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhe Jiang,Marcus Stephen Kirby,Wenchong He,Arpan Man Sainju
title: Deep Learning for Earth Image Segmentation based on Imperfect Polyline Labels with Annotation Errors
title_zh: 基于带有标注错误的不完美折线标签的深度学习地球图像分割
abstract: In recent years, deep learning techniques (e.g., U-Net, DeepLab) have achieved tremendous success in image segmentation. The performance of these models heavily relies on high-quality ground truth segment labels. Unfortunately, in many real-world problems, ground truth segment labels often have geometric annotation errors due to manual annotation mistakes, GPS errors, or visually interpreting background imagery at a coarse resolution. Such location errors will significantly impact the training performance of existing deep learning algorithms. Existing research on label errors either models ground truth errors in label semantics (assuming label locations to be correct) or models label location errors with simple square patch shifting. These methods cannot fully incorporate the geometric properties of label location errors. To fill the gap, this paper proposes a generic learning framework based on the EM algorithm to update deep learning model parameters and infer hidden true label locations simultaneously. Evaluations on a real-world hydrological dataset in the streamline refinement application show that the proposed framework outperforms baseline methods in classification accuracy (reducing the number of false positives by 67% and reducing the number of false negatives by 55%).
summary: In recent years, deep learning techniques (e.g., U-Net, DeepLab) have achieved tremendous success in image segmentation. The performance of these models heavily relies on high-quality ground truth segment labels. Unfortunately, in many real-world problems, ground truth segment labels often have geometric annotation errors due to manual annotation mistakes, GPS errors, or visually interpreting background imagery at a coarse resolution. Such location errors will significantly impact the training performance of existing deep learning algorithms. Existing research on label errors either models ground truth errors in label semantics (assuming label locations to be correct) or models label location errors with simple square patch shifting. These methods cannot fully incorporate the geometric properties of label location errors. To fill the gap, this paper proposes a generic learning framework based on the EM algorithm to update deep learning model parameters and infer hidden true label locations simultaneously. Evaluations on a real-world hydrological dataset in the streamline refinement application show that the proposed framework outperforms baseline methods in classification accuracy (reducing the number of false positives by 67% and reducing the number of false negatives by 55%).
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度学习技术（例如U-Net、DeepLab）在图像分割方面取得了巨大成功。这些模型的性能在很大程度上依赖于高质量的地面真实片段标签。不幸的是，在许多现实问题中，由于手动注释错误、GPS 错误或以粗分辨率视觉解释背景图像，地面实况片段标签通常会出现几何注释错误。这种定位错误将显着影响现有深度学习算法的训练性能。现有的关于标签错误的研究要么对标签语义中的真实错误进行建模（假设标签位置正确），要么用简单的方形块移位对标签位置错误进行建模。这些方法不能完全结合标签位置误差的几何特性。为了填补这一空白，本文提出了一种基于 EM 算法的通用学习框架，用于更新深度学习模型参数并同时推断隐藏的真实标签位置。对流线细化应用中的真实水文数据集的评估表明，所提出的框架在分类精度方面优于基线方法（误报数量减少了 67%，漏报数量减少了 55%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于EM算法的深度学习框架，用于处理带有几何标注误差的地球图像分割问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法有效处理标注标签中的几何位置误差，导致分割性能下降，需设计能同时修正标签位置和优化模型参数的框架。
AI.method: 提出结合EM算法的通用学习框架，通过迭代更新模型参数并推断真实的标签位置，以处理不完美 polyline 标注。
AI.result: 在实际水文数据集上，该框架将误检率降低67%，漏检率降低55%，优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架有效解决了标注几何误差问题，验证了同时优化模型与标签位置的可行性，为现实场景分割提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yuhao Zhang,Hang Jiang,Yasuhide Miura,Christopher D. Manning,Curtis P. Langlotz
title: Contrastive Learning of Medical Visual Representations from Paired Images and Text
title_zh: 从配对图像和文本中对比学习医学视觉表示
comment: First published in 2020. Accepted at Machine Learning for Healthcare (MLHC) 2022
comments: First published in 2020. Accepted at Machine Learning for Healthcare (MLHC) 2022
abstract: Learning visual representations of medical images (e.g., X-rays) is core to medical image understanding but its progress has been held back by the scarcity of human annotations. Existing work commonly relies on fine-tuning weights transferred from ImageNet pretraining, which is suboptimal due to drastically different image characteristics, or rule-based label extraction from the textual report data paired with medical images, which is inaccurate and hard to generalize. Meanwhile, several recent studies show exciting results from unsupervised contrastive learning from natural images, but we find these methods help little on medical images because of their high inter-class similarity. We propose ConVIRT, an alternative unsupervised strategy to learn medical visual representations by exploiting naturally occurring paired descriptive text. Our new method of pretraining medical image encoders with the paired text data via a bidirectional contrastive objective between the two modalities is domain-agnostic, and requires no additional expert input. We test ConVIRT by transferring our pretrained weights to 4 medical image classification tasks and 2 zero-shot retrieval tasks, and show that it leads to image representations that considerably outperform strong baselines in most settings. Notably, in all 4 classification tasks, our method requires only 10\% as much labeled training data as an ImageNet initialized counterpart to achieve better or comparable performance, demonstrating superior data efficiency.
summary: Learning visual representations of medical images (e.g., X-rays) is core to medical image understanding but its progress has been held back by the scarcity of human annotations. Existing work commonly relies on fine-tuning weights transferred from ImageNet pretraining, which is suboptimal due to drastically different image characteristics, or rule-based label extraction from the textual report data paired with medical images, which is inaccurate and hard to generalize. Meanwhile, several recent studies show exciting results from unsupervised contrastive learning from natural images, but we find these methods help little on medical images because of their high inter-class similarity. We propose ConVIRT, an alternative unsupervised strategy to learn medical visual representations by exploiting naturally occurring paired descriptive text. Our new method of pretraining medical image encoders with the paired text data via a bidirectional contrastive objective between the two modalities is domain-agnostic, and requires no additional expert input. We test ConVIRT by transferring our pretrained weights to 4 medical image classification tasks and 2 zero-shot retrieval tasks, and show that it leads to image representations that considerably outperform strong baselines in most settings. Notably, in all 4 classification tasks, our method requires only 10\% as much labeled training data as an ImageNet initialized counterpart to achieve better or comparable performance, demonstrating superior data efficiency.
abstract_zh: 学习医学图像（例如 X 射线）的视觉表示是医学图像理解的核心，但其进展因人类注释的缺乏而受到阻碍。现有的工作通常依赖于从 ImageNet 预训练传输的微调权重，由于图像特征截然不同，这并不是最优的；或者从与医学图像配对的文本报告数据中进行基于规则的标签提取，这是不准确且难以泛化的。与此同时，最近的几项研究显示了从自然图像中进行无监督对比学习的令人兴奋的结果，但我们发现这些方法对医学图像帮助不大，因为它们的类间相似性很高。我们提出了 ConVIRT，这是一种替代的无监督策略，通过利用自然发生的配对描述性文本来学习医学视觉表示。我们通过两种模式之间的双向对比目标使用配对文本数据对医学图像编码器进行预训练的新方法与领域无关，并且不需要额外的专家输入。我们通过将预训练权重转移到 4 个医学图像分类任务和 2 个零样本检索任务来测试 ConVIRT，并表明它导致图像表示在大多数设置中远远优于强基线。值得注意的是，在所有 4 个分类任务中，我们的方法仅需要 ImageNet 初始化对应方法的 10% 的标记训练数据，即可实现更好或相当的性能，展现出卓越的数据效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ConVIRT方法，通过配对医学图像与文本数据的双向对比学习，提升医学视觉表示的学习效果。
AI.motivation: 医学图像标注数据稀缺，传统方法依赖ImageNet迁移或规则提取文本标签效果不佳，而现有对比学习方法因医学图像类间相似度高难以有效应用。
AI.method: 设计ConVIRT框架，利用医学图像与配对文本的双向对比目标进行预训练，无需专家标注或额外输入。
AI.result: 在4个分类任务和2个零样本检索任务中，ConVIRT表现优于基线，且仅需ImageNet方法1/10的标注数据即可达到更好或相当性能。
AI.conclusion: ConVIRT通过文本-图像对比学习有效提升医学图像表示，验证了跨模态预训练在医学领域的潜力，为数据高效模型提供新方向。

tldr: 本文提出ConVIRT方法，通过配对医学图像与文本数据的双向对比学习，提升医学视觉表示的学习效果。
motivation: 医学图像标注数据稀缺，传统方法依赖ImageNet迁移或规则提取文本标签效果不佳，而现有对比学习方法因医学图像类间相似度高难以有效应用。

result: 在4个分类任务和2个零样本检索任务中，ConVIRT表现优于基线，且仅需ImageNet方法1/10的标注数据即可达到更好或相当性能。
conclusion: ConVIRT通过文本-图像对比学习有效提升医学图像表示，验证了跨模态预训练在医学领域的潜力，为数据高效模型提供新方向。
search_text: Contrastive Learning of Medical Visual Representations from Paired Images and Text 从配对图像和文本中对比学习医学视觉表示 Learning visual representations of medical images (e.g., X-rays) is core to medical image understanding but its progress has been held back by the scarcity of human annotations. Existing work commonly relies on fine-tuning weights transferred from ImageNet pretraining, which is suboptimal due to drastically different image characteristics, or rule-based label extraction from the textual report data paired with medical images, which is inaccurate and hard to generalize. Meanwhile, several recent studies show exciting results from unsupervised contrastive learning from natural images, but we find these methods help little on medical images because of their high inter-class similarity. We propose ConVIRT, an alternative unsupervised strategy to learn medical visual representations by exploiting naturally occurring paired descriptive text. Our new method of pretraining medical image encoders with the paired text data via a bidirectional contrastive objective between the two modalities is domain-agnostic, and requires no additional expert input. We test ConVIRT by transferring our pretrained weights to 4 medical image classification tasks and 2 zero-shot retrieval tasks, and show that it leads to image representations that considerably outperform strong baselines in most settings. Notably, in all 4 classification tasks, our method requires only 10\% as much labeled training data as an ImageNet initialized counterpart to achieve better or comparable performance, demonstrating superior data efficiency. 学习医学图像（例如 X 射线）的视觉表示是医学图像理解的核心，但其进展因人类注释的缺乏而受到阻碍。现有的工作通常依赖于从 ImageNet 预训练传输的微调权重，由于图像特征截然不同，这并不是最优的；或者从与医学图像配对的文本报告数据中进行基于规则的标签提取，这是不准确且难以泛化的。与此同时，最近的几项研究显示了从自然图像中进行无监督对比学习的令人兴奋的结果，但我们发现这些方法对医学图像帮助不大，因为它们的类间相似性很高。我们提出了 ConVIRT，这是一种替代的无监督策略，通过利用自然发生的配对描述性文本来学习医学视觉表示。我们通过两种模式之间的双向对比目标使用配对文本数据对医学图像编码器进行预训练的新方法与领域无关，并且不需要额外的专家输入。我们通过将预训练权重转移到 4 个医学图像分类任务和 2 个零样本检索任务来测试 ConVIRT，并表明它导致图像表示在大多数设置中远远优于强基线。值得注意的是，在所有 4 个分类任务中，我们的方法仅需要 ImageNet 初始化对应方法的 10% 的标记训练数据，即可实现更好或相当的性能，展现出卓越的数据效率。 本文提出ConVIRT方法，通过配对医学图像与文本数据的双向对比学习，提升医学视觉表示的学习效果。 Yuhao Zhang,Hang Jiang,Yasuhide Miura,Christopher D. Manning,Curtis P. Langlotz cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.LG

title: Cell Complex Neural Networks
title_zh: 细胞复合神经网络
abstract: Cell complexes are topological spaces constructed from simple blocks called cells. They generalize graphs, simplicial complexes, and polyhedral complexes that form important domains for practical applications. They also provide a combinatorial formalism that allows the inclusion of complicated relationships of restrictive structures such as graphs and meshes. In this paper, we propose \textbf{Cell Complexes Neural Networks (CXNs)}, a general, combinatorial and unifying construction for performing neural network-type computations on cell complexes. We introduce an inter-cellular message passing scheme on cell complexes that takes the topology of the underlying space into account and generalizes message passing scheme to graphs. Finally, we introduce a unified cell complex encoder-decoder framework that enables learning representation of cells for a given complex inside the Euclidean spaces. In particular, we show how our cell complex autoencoder construction can give, in the special case \textbf{cell2vec}, a generalization for node2vec.
summary: Cell complexes are topological spaces constructed from simple blocks called cells. They generalize graphs, simplicial complexes, and polyhedral complexes that form important domains for practical applications. They also provide a combinatorial formalism that allows the inclusion of complicated relationships of restrictive structures such as graphs and meshes. In this paper, we propose \textbf{Cell Complexes Neural Networks (CXNs)}, a general, combinatorial and unifying construction for performing neural network-type computations on cell complexes. We introduce an inter-cellular message passing scheme on cell complexes that takes the topology of the underlying space into account and generalizes message passing scheme to graphs. Finally, we introduce a unified cell complex encoder-decoder framework that enables learning representation of cells for a given complex inside the Euclidean spaces. In particular, we show how our cell complex autoencoder construction can give, in the special case \textbf{cell2vec}, a generalization for node2vec.
abstract_zh: 元胞复合体是由称为元胞的简单块构建的拓扑空间。他们概括了图、单纯复形和多面体复形，这些构成了实际应用的重要领域。它们还提供了一种组合形式，允许包含限制性结构（例如图形和网格）的复杂关系。在本文中，我们提出了 \textbf{细胞复合体神经网络（CXN）}，这是一种通用的、组合的和统一的结构，用于在细胞复合体上执行神经网络类型的计算。我们在细胞复合体上引入了一种细胞间消息传递方案，该方案考虑了底层空间的拓扑结构，并将消息传递方案推广到图。最后，我们引入了一个统一的细胞复合体编码器-解码器框架，该框架能够学习欧几里德空间内给定复合体的细胞表示。特别是，我们展示了在特殊情况下 \textbf{cell2vec} 中我们的单元复合自动编码器构造如何给出 node2vec 的泛化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Cell Complex Neural Networks (CXNs)的神经网络框架，用于在细胞复形（Cell Complexes）上执行计算，该结构能够处理图、单纯复形等复杂拓扑空间。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络难以有效处理具有复杂拓扑结构的数据（如图、网格），而细胞复形提供了一种组合形式主义来建模这些结构，需开发统一的神经网络方法以利用其拓扑特性。
AI.method: 引入基于细胞复形的跨细胞消息传递机制，结合拓扑结构扩展图神经网络的消息传递；设计统一的编码-解码框架，通过自编码器学习细胞在欧几里得空间中的表示，并推广node2vec为cell2vec。
AI.result: 验证了CXN框架在细胞复形上的有效性，展示了其在节点表示学习（如cell2vec）中的性能，证明了方法对复杂拓扑结构的适应性。
AI.conclusion: CXNs为处理拓扑数据提供了通用且灵活的神经网络范式，推动了图神经网络在更复杂几何结构中的应用。

authors_text: M Usman Maqbool Bhutta,Shoaib Aslam,Peng Yun,Jianhao Jiao,Ming Liu
title: Smart-Inspect: Micro Scale Localization and Classification of Smartphone Glass Defects for Industrial Automation
title_zh: Smart-Inspect：工业自动化智能手机玻璃缺陷的微尺度定位和分类
comment: IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2020)
comments: IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2020)
abstract: The presence of any type of defect on the glass screen of smart devices has a great impact on their quality. We present a robust semi-supervised learning framework for intelligent micro-scaled localization and classification of defects on a 16K pixel image of smartphone glass. Our model features the efficient recognition and labeling of three types of defects: scratches, light leakage due to cracks, and pits. Our method also differentiates between the defects and light reflections due to dust particles and sensor regions, which are classified as non-defect areas. We use a partially labeled dataset to achieve high robustness and excellent classification of defect and non-defect areas as compared to principal components analysis (PCA), multi-resolution and information-fusion-based algorithms. In addition, we incorporated two classifiers at different stages of our inspection framework for labeling and refining the unlabeled defects. We successfully enhanced the inspection depth-limit up to 5 microns. The experimental results show that our method outperforms manual inspection in testing the quality of glass screen samples by identifying defects on samples that have been marked as good by human inspection.
summary: The presence of any type of defect on the glass screen of smart devices has a great impact on their quality. We present a robust semi-supervised learning framework for intelligent micro-scaled localization and classification of defects on a 16K pixel image of smartphone glass. Our model features the efficient recognition and labeling of three types of defects: scratches, light leakage due to cracks, and pits. Our method also differentiates between the defects and light reflections due to dust particles and sensor regions, which are classified as non-defect areas. We use a partially labeled dataset to achieve high robustness and excellent classification of defect and non-defect areas as compared to principal components analysis (PCA), multi-resolution and information-fusion-based algorithms. In addition, we incorporated two classifiers at different stages of our inspection framework for labeling and refining the unlabeled defects. We successfully enhanced the inspection depth-limit up to 5 microns. The experimental results show that our method outperforms manual inspection in testing the quality of glass screen samples by identifying defects on samples that have been marked as good by human inspection.
abstract_zh: 智能设备玻璃屏幕上存在任何类型的缺陷都会对其质量产生很大影响。我们提出了一个强大的半监督学习框架，用于智能手机玻璃 16K 像素图像上的智能微尺度定位和缺陷分类。我们的模型能够有效识别和标记三种类型的缺陷：划痕、裂纹漏光和凹坑。我们的方法还区分了由灰尘颗粒和传感器区域引起的缺陷和光反射，这些区域被归类为非缺陷区域。与主成分分析（PCA）、多分辨率和基于信息融合的算法相比，我们使用部分标记的数据集来实现高鲁棒性以及对缺陷和非缺陷区域的出色分类。此外，我们在检查框架的不同阶段结合了两个分类器，用于标记和细化未标记的缺陷。我们成功地将检测深度限制提高到 5 微米。实验结果表明，通过识别人工检查标记为良好的样品上的缺陷，我们的方法在测试玻璃屏幕样品的质量方面优于人工检查。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于半监督学习的智能手机玻璃缺陷微尺度定位与分类框架Smart-Inspect，用于工业自动化检测。
AI.motivation: 智能手机玻璃屏幕的缺陷会严重影响产品质量，传统检测方法（如PCA、多分辨率算法）存在准确率低、易受干扰等问题，且人工检测存在主观性。
AI.method: 采用半监督学习框架，结合部分标注数据集与两种分类器分阶段检测与优化缺陷标注，通过区分缺陷与非缺陷区域（如灰尘反射、传感器区域），将检测精度提升至5微米级。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在缺陷识别准确率上优于人工检测和传统算法，能发现人工判定为合格的样本中的隐藏缺陷。
AI.conclusion: Smart-Inspect框架通过半监督学习和双分类器优化，实现了高精度、高鲁棒性的玻璃缺陷检测，可有效提升工业自动化质检效率与可靠性。

conclusion: Smart-Inspect框架通过半监督学习和双分类器优化，实现了高精度、高鲁棒性的玻璃缺陷检测，可有效提升工业自动化质检效率与可靠性。
search_text: Smart-Inspect: Micro Scale Localization and Classification of Smartphone Glass Defects for Industrial Automation Smart-Inspect：工业自动化智能手机玻璃缺陷的微尺度定位和分类 The presence of any type of defect on the glass screen of smart devices has a great impact on their quality. We present a robust semi-supervised learning framework for intelligent micro-scaled localization and classification of defects on a 16K pixel image of smartphone glass. Our model features the efficient recognition and labeling of three types of defects: scratches, light leakage due to cracks, and pits. Our method also differentiates between the defects and light reflections due to dust particles and sensor regions, which are classified as non-defect areas. We use a partially labeled dataset to achieve high robustness and excellent classification of defect and non-defect areas as compared to principal components analysis (PCA), multi-resolution and information-fusion-based algorithms. In addition, we incorporated two classifiers at different stages of our inspection framework for labeling and refining the unlabeled defects. We successfully enhanced the inspection depth-limit up to 5 microns. The experimental results show that our method outperforms manual inspection in testing the quality of glass screen samples by identifying defects on samples that have been marked as good by human inspection. 智能设备玻璃屏幕上存在任何类型的缺陷都会对其质量产生很大影响。我们提出了一个强大的半监督学习框架，用于智能手机玻璃 16K 像素图像上的智能微尺度定位和缺陷分类。我们的模型能够有效识别和标记三种类型的缺陷：划痕、裂纹漏光和凹坑。我们的方法还区分了由灰尘颗粒和传感器区域引起的缺陷和光反射，这些区域被归类为非缺陷区域。与主成分分析（PCA）、多分辨率和基于信息融合的算法相比，我们使用部分标记的数据集来实现高鲁棒性以及对缺陷和非缺陷区域的出色分类。此外，我们在检查框架的不同阶段结合了两个分类器，用于标记和细化未标记的缺陷。我们成功地将检测深度限制提高到 5 微米。实验结果表明，通过识别人工检查标记为良好的样品上的缺陷，我们的方法在测试玻璃屏幕样品的质量方面优于人工检查。 本文提出了一种基于半监督学习的智能手机玻璃缺陷微尺度定位与分类框架Smart-Inspect，用于工业自动化检测。 M Usman Maqbool Bhutta,Shoaib Aslam,Peng Yun,Jianhao Jiao,Ming Liu cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Yufang Huang,Wentao Zhu,Deyi Xiong,Yiye Zhang,Changjian Hu,Feiyu Xu
title: Cycle-Consistent Adversarial Autoencoders for Unsupervised Text Style Transfer
title_zh: 用于无监督文本样式迁移的循环一致对抗性自动编码器
abstract: Unsupervised text style transfer is full of challenges due to the lack of parallel data and difficulties in content preservation. In this paper, we propose a novel neural approach to unsupervised text style transfer, which we refer to as Cycle-consistent Adversarial autoEncoders (CAE) trained from non-parallel data. CAE consists of three essential components: (1) LSTM autoencoders that encode a text in one style into its latent representation and decode an encoded representation into its original text or a transferred representation into a style-transferred text, (2) adversarial style transfer networks that use an adversarially trained generator to transform a latent representation in one style into a representation in another style, and (3) a cycle-consistent constraint that enhances the capacity of the adversarial style transfer networks in content preservation. The entire CAE with these three components can be trained end-to-end. Extensive experiments and in-depth analyses on two widely-used public datasets consistently validate the effectiveness of proposed CAE in both style transfer and content preservation against several strong baselines in terms of four automatic evaluation metrics and human evaluation.
summary: Unsupervised text style transfer is full of challenges due to the lack of parallel data and difficulties in content preservation. In this paper, we propose a novel neural approach to unsupervised text style transfer, which we refer to as Cycle-consistent Adversarial autoEncoders (CAE) trained from non-parallel data. CAE consists of three essential components: (1) LSTM autoencoders that encode a text in one style into its latent representation and decode an encoded representation into its original text or a transferred representation into a style-transferred text, (2) adversarial style transfer networks that use an adversarially trained generator to transform a latent representation in one style into a representation in another style, and (3) a cycle-consistent constraint that enhances the capacity of the adversarial style transfer networks in content preservation. The entire CAE with these three components can be trained end-to-end. Extensive experiments and in-depth analyses on two widely-used public datasets consistently validate the effectiveness of proposed CAE in both style transfer and content preservation against several strong baselines in terms of four automatic evaluation metrics and human evaluation.
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏并行数据和内容保存困难，无监督文本样式迁移充满挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的神经方法来进行无监督文本样式迁移，我们将其称为从非并行数据训练的循环一致对抗自动编码器（CAE）。 CAE 由三个基本组件组成：(1) LSTM 自动编码器，将一种风格的文本编码为其潜在表示，并将编码表示解码为原始文本，或将转移表示解码为风格转移文本；(2) 对抗性风格转移网络，使用经过对抗训练的生成器将一种风格的潜在表示转换为另一种风格的表示；(3) 循环一致约束，增强对抗性风格转移网络在内容保存方面的能力。包含这三个组件的整个 CAE 可以进行端到端训练。对两个广泛使用的公共数据集进行的广泛实验和深入分析一致验证了所提出的 CAE 在风格迁移和内容保存方面的有效性，并与四个自动评估指标和人工评估方面的几个强大基线相比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需平行数据的无监督文本风格迁移方法，称为循环一致对抗自编码器（CAE）。
AI.motivation: 无监督文本风格迁移面临平行数据缺失和内容保持困难的挑战，现有方法难以有效解决这些问题。
AI.method: CAE包含三个核心组件：LSTM自编码器、对抗风格迁移网络及循环一致性约束，通过端到端训练实现风格迁移与内容保持。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上的实验表明，CAE在四个自动评估指标和人工评估中均优于多个强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CAE通过循环一致性约束有效提升了风格迁移中的内容保持能力，为无监督文本风格迁移提供了新思路。

title: Training Strategies to Handle Missing Modalities for Audio-Visual Expression Recognition
title_zh: 处理视听表达识别缺失模式的训练策略
comment: ICMI 2020 workshop on "MODELING SOCIO-EMOTIONAL AND COGNITIVE PROCESSES FROM MULTIMODAL DATA IN THE WILD"
comments: ICMI 2020 workshop on "MODELING SOCIO-EMOTIONAL AND COGNITIVE PROCESSES FROM MULTIMODAL DATA IN THE WILD"
abstract: Automatic audio-visual expression recognition can play an important role in communication services such as tele-health, VOIP calls and human-machine interaction. Accuracy of audio-visual expression recognition could benefit from the interplay between the two modalities. However, most audio-visual expression recognition systems, trained in ideal conditions, fail to generalize in real world scenarios where either the audio or visual modality could be missing due to a number of reasons such as limited bandwidth, interactors' orientation, caller initiated muting. This paper studies the performance of a state-of-the art transformer when one of the modalities is missing. We conduct ablation studies to evaluate the model in the absence of either modality. Further, we propose a strategy to randomly ablate visual inputs during training at the clip or frame level to mimic real world scenarios. Results conducted on in-the-wild data, indicate significant generalization in proposed models trained on missing cues, with gains up to 17% for frame level ablations, showing that these training strategies cope better with the loss of input modalities.
summary: Automatic audio-visual expression recognition can play an important role in communication services such as tele-health, VOIP calls and human-machine interaction. Accuracy of audio-visual expression recognition could benefit from the interplay between the two modalities. However, most audio-visual expression recognition systems, trained in ideal conditions, fail to generalize in real world scenarios where either the audio or visual modality could be missing due to a number of reasons such as limited bandwidth, interactors' orientation, caller initiated muting. This paper studies the performance of a state-of-the art transformer when one of the modalities is missing. We conduct ablation studies to evaluate the model in the absence of either modality. Further, we propose a strategy to randomly ablate visual inputs during training at the clip or frame level to mimic real world scenarios. Results conducted on in-the-wild data, indicate significant generalization in proposed models trained on missing cues, with gains up to 17% for frame level ablations, showing that these training strategies cope better with the loss of input modalities.
abstract_zh: 自动视听表情识别可以在远程医疗、VOIP通话和人机交互等通信服务中发挥重要作用。视听表达识别的准确性可以受益于两种模式之间的相互作用。然而，大多数在理想条件下训练的视听表情识别系统无法在现实场景中进行推广，在现实场景中，由于带宽有限、交互者的方向、呼叫者发起的静音等多种原因，音频或视觉模态可能会丢失。本文研究了当其中一种模式缺失时最先进的变压器的性能。我们进行消融研究，以在没有任何一种模式的情况下评估模型。此外，我们提出了一种策略，在剪辑或帧级别的训练期间随机消除视觉输入以模仿现实世界场景。对野外数据进行的结果表明，针对缺失线索进行训练的拟议模型具有显着的泛化性，帧级消融的增益高达 17%，这表明这些训练策略可以更好地应对输入模式的丢失。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了音频-视觉表达识别中缺失模态的训练策略，以提高模型在真实环境中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有音频-视觉系统在理想条件下训练，难以应对真实场景中音频或视觉模态缺失的问题，导致性能下降。
AI.method: 通过消融实验评估模型在单模态缺失下的表现，并提出在训练时随机删除视觉输入（片段或帧级别）以模拟真实场景。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上，使用缺失线索训练的模型泛化能力显著提升，帧级消融的准确率最高提升17%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的训练策略能有效应对输入模态丢失，提升模型鲁棒性，为实际应用提供支持。

authors_text: Meet Shah,Zhiling Huang,Ankit Laddha,Matthew Langford,Blake Barber,Sidney Zhang,Carlos Vallespi-Gonzalez,Raquel Urtasun
title: LiRaNet: End-to-End Trajectory Prediction using Spatio-Temporal Radar Fusion
title_zh: LiRaNet：使用时空雷达融合进行端到端轨迹预测
comment: Accepted to Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL) 2020
comments: Accepted to Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL) 2020
abstract: In this paper, we present LiRaNet, a novel end-to-end trajectory prediction method which utilizes radar sensor information along with widely used lidar and high definition (HD) maps. Automotive radar provides rich, complementary information, allowing for longer range vehicle detection as well as instantaneous radial velocity measurements. However, there are factors that make the fusion of lidar and radar information challenging, such as the relatively low angular resolution of radar measurements, their sparsity and the lack of exact time synchronization with lidar. To overcome these challenges, we propose an efficient spatio-temporal radar feature extraction scheme which achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple large-scale datasets.Further, by incorporating radar information, we show a 52% reduction in prediction error for objects with high acceleration and a 16% reduction in prediction error for objects at longer range.
summary: In this paper, we present LiRaNet, a novel end-to-end trajectory prediction method which utilizes radar sensor information along with widely used lidar and high definition (HD) maps. Automotive radar provides rich, complementary information, allowing for longer range vehicle detection as well as instantaneous radial velocity measurements. However, there are factors that make the fusion of lidar and radar information challenging, such as the relatively low angular resolution of radar measurements, their sparsity and the lack of exact time synchronization with lidar. To overcome these challenges, we propose an efficient spatio-temporal radar feature extraction scheme which achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple large-scale datasets.Further, by incorporating radar information, we show a 52% reduction in prediction error for objects with high acceleration and a 16% reduction in prediction error for objects at longer range.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 LiRaNet，这是一种新颖的端到端轨迹预测方法，该方法利用雷达传感器信息以及广泛使用的激光雷达和高清 (HD) 地图。汽车雷达提供丰富的补充信息，可实现更远距离的车辆检测以及瞬时径向速度测量。然而，有些因素使得激光雷达和雷达信息的融合具有挑战性，例如雷达测量的角分辨率相对较低、稀疏性以及缺乏与激光雷达的精确时间同步。为了克服这些挑战，我们提出了一种高效的时空雷达特征提取方案，该方案在多个大规模数据集上实现了最先进的性能。此外，通过合并雷达信息，我们发现高加速度物体的预测误差降低了 52%，而远距离物体的预测误差降低了 16%。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合雷达、激光雷达和高清地图的端到端轨迹预测方法LiRaNet
AI.motivation: 雷达可提供远距离检测和径向速度信息，但其低角分辨率、数据稀疏性及与激光雷达不同步特性导致多传感器融合困难，需设计有效方案提升轨迹预测精度
AI.method: 设计高效的时空雷达特征提取方案，解决雷达数据低分辨率、稀疏性及与激光雷达不同步的问题，并融合多传感器数据进行轨迹预测
AI.result: 在多个大规模数据集上达到SOTA性能，高速物体预测误差降低52%，远距离物体误差降低16%
AI.conclusion: 雷达信息融合显著提升轨迹预测准确性，尤其在高速和远距离场景表现突出，验证了时空特征提取方案的有效性

search_text: LiRaNet: End-to-End Trajectory Prediction using Spatio-Temporal Radar Fusion LiRaNet：使用时空雷达融合进行端到端轨迹预测 In this paper, we present LiRaNet, a novel end-to-end trajectory prediction method which utilizes radar sensor information along with widely used lidar and high definition (HD) maps. Automotive radar provides rich, complementary information, allowing for longer range vehicle detection as well as instantaneous radial velocity measurements. However, there are factors that make the fusion of lidar and radar information challenging, such as the relatively low angular resolution of radar measurements, their sparsity and the lack of exact time synchronization with lidar. To overcome these challenges, we propose an efficient spatio-temporal radar feature extraction scheme which achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple large-scale datasets.Further, by incorporating radar information, we show a 52% reduction in prediction error for objects with high acceleration and a 16% reduction in prediction error for objects at longer range. 在本文中，我们提出了 LiRaNet，这是一种新颖的端到端轨迹预测方法，该方法利用雷达传感器信息以及广泛使用的激光雷达和高清 (HD) 地图。汽车雷达提供丰富的补充信息，可实现更远距离的车辆检测以及瞬时径向速度测量。然而，有些因素使得激光雷达和雷达信息的融合具有挑战性，例如雷达测量的角分辨率相对较低、稀疏性以及缺乏与激光雷达的精确时间同步。为了克服这些挑战，我们提出了一种高效的时空雷达特征提取方案，该方案在多个大规模数据集上实现了最先进的性能。此外，通过合并雷达信息，我们发现高加速度物体的预测误差降低了 52%，而远距离物体的预测误差降低了 16%。 提出一种结合雷达、激光雷达和高清地图的端到端轨迹预测方法LiRaNet Meet Shah,Zhiling Huang,Ankit Laddha,Matthew Langford,Blake Barber,Sidney Zhang,Carlos Vallespi-Gonzalez,Raquel Urtasun cs.CV,cs.RO

title: Using Unlabeled Data for Increasing Low-Shot Classification Accuracy of Relevant and Open-Set Irrelevant Images
title_zh: 使用未标记数据提高相关图像和开放集不相关图像的低样本分类精度
abstract: In search, exploration, and reconnaissance tasks performed with autonomous ground vehicles, an image classification capability is needed for specifically identifying targeted objects (relevant classes) and at the same time recognize when a candidate image does not belong to anyone of the relevant classes (irrelevant images). In this paper, we present an open-set low-shot classifier that uses, during its training, a modest number (less than 40) of labeled images for each relevant class, and unlabeled irrelevant images that are randomly selected at each epoch of the training process. The new classifier is capable of identifying images from the relevant classes, determining when a candidate image is irrelevant, and it can further recognize categories of irrelevant images that were not included in the training (unseen). The proposed low-shot classifier can be attached as a top layer to any pre-trained feature extractor when constructing a Convolutional Neural Network.
summary: In search, exploration, and reconnaissance tasks performed with autonomous ground vehicles, an image classification capability is needed for specifically identifying targeted objects (relevant classes) and at the same time recognize when a candidate image does not belong to anyone of the relevant classes (irrelevant images). In this paper, we present an open-set low-shot classifier that uses, during its training, a modest number (less than 40) of labeled images for each relevant class, and unlabeled irrelevant images that are randomly selected at each epoch of the training process. The new classifier is capable of identifying images from the relevant classes, determining when a candidate image is irrelevant, and it can further recognize categories of irrelevant images that were not included in the training (unseen). The proposed low-shot classifier can be attached as a top layer to any pre-trained feature extractor when constructing a Convolutional Neural Network.
abstract_zh: 在使用自主地面车辆执行的搜索、探索和侦察任务中，需要图像分类能力来专门识别目标对象（相关类别），同时识别候选图像何时不属于任何相关类别（不相关图像）。在本文中，我们提出了一种开放集低样本分类器，该分类器在训练过程中为每个相关类别使用适量（少于 40 个）的标记图像，以及在训练过程的每个时期随机选择的未标记的不相关图像。新的分类器能够从相关类别中识别图像，确定候选图像何时不相关，并且它可以进一步识别未包含在训练中（看不见）的不相关图像的类别。在构建卷积神经网络时，所提出的低样本分类器可以作为顶层附加到任何预训练的特征提取器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种开放集低样本分类器，通过结合少量标记的相关类别图像和随机选择的未标记无关图像，提升自主地面车辆任务中目标识别与无关图像检测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 在自主地面车辆执行搜索等任务时，需同时识别特定目标（相关类）并检测无关图像，但传统方法在低样本和开放集场景下表现不足。
AI.method: 设计可附加于预训练特征提取器顶层的分类器，训练时使用每个相关类少于40张标记图像，结合每轮训练随机选取的未标记无关图像。
AI.result: 分类器能准确识别相关类、检测无关图像，并可识别训练中未出现的无关类别，适用于多种预训练模型架构。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过有效利用未标记数据，在低样本条件下显著提升开放集分类性能，为实际应用提供可行方案。

title: Deep Reinforcement Learning with Mixed Convolutional Network
title_zh: 混合卷积网络的深度强化学习
abstract: Recent research has shown that map raw pixels from a single front-facing camera directly to steering commands are surprisingly powerful. This paper presents a convolutional neural network (CNN) to playing the CarRacing-v0 using imitation learning in OpenAI Gym. The dataset is generated by playing the game manually in Gym and used a data augmentation method to expand the dataset to 4 times larger than before. Also, we read the true speed, four ABS sensors, steering wheel position, and gyroscope for each image and designed a mixed model by combining the sensor input and image input. After training, this model can automatically detect the boundaries of road features and drive the robot like a human. By comparing with AlexNet and VGG16 using the average reward in CarRacing-v0, our model wins the maximum overall system performance.
summary: Recent research has shown that map raw pixels from a single front-facing camera directly to steering commands are surprisingly powerful. This paper presents a convolutional neural network (CNN) to playing the CarRacing-v0 using imitation learning in OpenAI Gym. The dataset is generated by playing the game manually in Gym and used a data augmentation method to expand the dataset to 4 times larger than before. Also, we read the true speed, four ABS sensors, steering wheel position, and gyroscope for each image and designed a mixed model by combining the sensor input and image input. After training, this model can automatically detect the boundaries of road features and drive the robot like a human. By comparing with AlexNet and VGG16 using the average reward in CarRacing-v0, our model wins the maximum overall system performance.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，将单个前置摄像头的原始像素直接映射到转向命令的功能非常强大。本文提出了一种在 OpenAI Gym 中使用模仿学习来玩 CarRacing-v0 的卷积神经网络 (CNN)。该数据集是通过在 Gym 中手动玩游戏生成的，并使用数据增强方法将数据集扩展为之前的 4 倍。此外，我们读取每幅图像的真实速度、四个 ABS 传感器、方向盘位置和陀螺仪，并通过结合传感器输入和图像输入来设计混合模型。经过训练，该模型可以自动检测道路特征的边界，并像人一样驾驶机器人。通过使用 CarRacing-v0 中的平均奖励与 AlexNet 和 VGG16 进行比较，我们的模型赢得了最大的整体系统性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合卷积神经网络和传感器输入的混合模型，用于在CarRacing-v0环境中实现自动驾驶。
AI.motivation: 通过融合视觉信息与传感器数据，提升自动驾驶模型在复杂路况下的决策能力，超越传统CNN模型性能。
AI.method: 基于模仿学习构建CNN，采用数据增强扩大数据集，并整合速度、ABS传感器、转向盘位置和陀螺仪等传感器信息进行混合建模。
AI.result: 在CarRacing-v0环境中，该模型平均奖励值优于AlexNet和VGG16，实现道路边界自动检测与类人驾驶行为。
AI.conclusion: 混合传感器与视觉输入的深度强化学习方法能显著提升自动驾驶系统的整体性能，为模拟环境中的智能驾驶提供新思路。

search_text: Deep Reinforcement Learning with Mixed Convolutional Network 混合卷积网络的深度强化学习 Recent research has shown that map raw pixels from a single front-facing camera directly to steering commands are surprisingly powerful. This paper presents a convolutional neural network (CNN) to playing the CarRacing-v0 using imitation learning in OpenAI Gym. The dataset is generated by playing the game manually in Gym and used a data augmentation method to expand the dataset to 4 times larger than before. Also, we read the true speed, four ABS sensors, steering wheel position, and gyroscope for each image and designed a mixed model by combining the sensor input and image input. After training, this model can automatically detect the boundaries of road features and drive the robot like a human. By comparing with AlexNet and VGG16 using the average reward in CarRacing-v0, our model wins the maximum overall system performance. 最近的研究表明，将单个前置摄像头的原始像素直接映射到转向命令的功能非常强大。本文提出了一种在 OpenAI Gym 中使用模仿学习来玩 CarRacing-v0 的卷积神经网络 (CNN)。该数据集是通过在 Gym 中手动玩游戏生成的，并使用数据增强方法将数据集扩展为之前的 4 倍。此外，我们读取每幅图像的真实速度、四个 ABS 传感器、方向盘位置和陀螺仪，并通过结合传感器输入和图像输入来设计混合模型。经过训练，该模型可以自动检测道路特征的边界，并像人一样驾驶机器人。通过使用 CarRacing-v0 中的平均奖励与 AlexNet 和 VGG16 进行比较，我们的模型赢得了最大的整体系统性能。 本文提出一种结合卷积神经网络和传感器输入的混合模型，用于在CarRacing-v0环境中实现自动驾驶。 Yanyu Zhang cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Bruno Ferrarini,Michael Milford,Klaus D. McDonald-Maier,Shoaib Ehsan
title: Binary Neural Networks for Memory-Efficient and Effective Visual Place Recognition in Changing Environments
title_zh: 二元神经网络在不断变化的环境中实现内存高效且有效的视觉位置识别
abstract: Visual place recognition (VPR) is a robot's ability to determine whether a place was visited before using visual data. While conventional hand-crafted methods for VPR fail under extreme environmental appearance changes, those based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) achieve state-of-the-art performance but result in heavy runtime processes and model sizes that demand a large amount of memory. Hence, CNN-based approaches are unsuitable for resource-constrained platforms, such as small robots and drones. In this paper, we take a multi-step approach of decreasing the precision of model parameters, combining it with network depth reduction and fewer neurons in the classifier stage to propose a new class of highly compact models that drastically reduces the memory requirements and computational effort while maintaining state-of-the-art VPR performance. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to propose binary neural networks for solving the visual place recognition problem effectively under changing conditions and with significantly reduced resource requirements. Our best-performing binary neural network, dubbed FloppyNet, achieves comparable VPR performance when considered against its full-precision and deeper counterparts while consuming 99% less memory and increasing the inference speed seven times.
summary: Visual place recognition (VPR) is a robot's ability to determine whether a place was visited before using visual data. While conventional hand-crafted methods for VPR fail under extreme environmental appearance changes, those based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) achieve state-of-the-art performance but result in heavy runtime processes and model sizes that demand a large amount of memory. Hence, CNN-based approaches are unsuitable for resource-constrained platforms, such as small robots and drones. In this paper, we take a multi-step approach of decreasing the precision of model parameters, combining it with network depth reduction and fewer neurons in the classifier stage to propose a new class of highly compact models that drastically reduces the memory requirements and computational effort while maintaining state-of-the-art VPR performance. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to propose binary neural networks for solving the visual place recognition problem effectively under changing conditions and with significantly reduced resource requirements. Our best-performing binary neural network, dubbed FloppyNet, achieves comparable VPR performance when considered against its full-precision and deeper counterparts while consuming 99% less memory and increasing the inference speed seven times.
abstract_zh: 视觉地点识别（VPR）是机器人在使用视觉数据之前确定是否访问过某个地点的能力。虽然传统的手工制作的 VPR 方法在极端的环境外观变化下会失败，但基于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的方法实现了最先进的性能，但会导致繁重的运行时进程和需要大量内存的模型大小。因此，基于 CNN 的方法不适合资源受限的平台，例如小型机器人和无人机。在本文中，我们采用多步方法降低模型参数的精度，将其与网络深度减少和分类器阶段更少的神经元相结合，提出一类新的高度紧凑的模型，大大减少内存需求和计算量，同时保持最先进的 VPR 性能。据我们所知，这是首次尝试提出二元神经网络，以在不断变化的条件下有效解决视觉位置识别问题，并显着减少资源需求。我们性能最佳的二进制神经网络（称为 FloppyNet）在与全精度和更深层次的对应网络相比时实现了可比的 VPR 性能，同时消耗的内存减少了 99%，推理速度提高了七倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种二进制神经网络模型FloppyNet，用于在资源受限的平台上实现高效且内存友好的视觉地点识别。
AI.motivation: 传统的视觉地点识别方法在环境变化时表现不佳，而基于CNN的方法虽然性能优越，但需要大量内存和计算资源，不适合资源受限的平台。
AI.method: 通过降低模型参数精度、减少网络深度及分类器阶段的神经元数量，提出了一种高度紧凑的二进制神经网络模型。
AI.result: 提出的FloppyNet模型在保持先进视觉地点识别性能的同时，内存消耗减少了99%，推理速度提升了七倍。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次将二进制神经网络应用于视觉地点识别，为资源受限平台提供了高效且有效的解决方案。

authors_text: Marina Danilevsky,Kun Qian,Ranit Aharonov,Yannis Katsis,Ban Kawas,Prithviraj Sen
title: A Survey of the State of Explainable AI for Natural Language Processing
title_zh: 自然语言处理可解释人工智能现状调查
abstract: Recent years have seen important advances in the quality of state-of-the-art models, but this has come at the expense of models becoming less interpretable. This survey presents an overview of the current state of Explainable AI (XAI), considered within the domain of Natural Language Processing (NLP). We discuss the main categorization of explanations, as well as the various ways explanations can be arrived at and visualized. We detail the operations and explainability techniques currently available for generating explanations for NLP model predictions, to serve as a resource for model developers in the community. Finally, we point out the current gaps and encourage directions for future work in this important research area.
summary: Recent years have seen important advances in the quality of state-of-the-art models, but this has come at the expense of models becoming less interpretable. This survey presents an overview of the current state of Explainable AI (XAI), considered within the domain of Natural Language Processing (NLP). We discuss the main categorization of explanations, as well as the various ways explanations can be arrived at and visualized. We detail the operations and explainability techniques currently available for generating explanations for NLP model predictions, to serve as a resource for model developers in the community. Finally, we point out the current gaps and encourage directions for future work in this important research area.
abstract_zh: 近年来，最先进模型的质量取得了重大进步，但这是以模型的可解释性变得越来越差为代价的。这项调查概述了自然语言处理 (NLP) 领域内可解释人工智能 (XAI) 的现状。我们讨论解释的主要分类，以及得出和可视化解释的各种方式。我们详细介绍了当前可用于生成 NLP 模型预测解释的操作和可解释性技术，以作为社区中模型开发人员的资源。最后，我们指出了当前的差距，并鼓励了这一重要研究领域未来的工作方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了可解释人工智能（XAI）在自然语言处理（NLP）领域的研究现状，总结了现有技术、分类方法及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 随着NLP模型性能提升，其可解释性下降，亟需系统梳理XAI技术以帮助开发者理解模型决策过程。
AI.method: 通过文献综述，分类讨论XAI在NLP中的解释类型、生成方法及可视化技术，并分析现有技术的操作流程。
AI.result: 总结了NLP模型解释的主流技术框架，明确了当前研究的技术边界与可视化手段的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步探索跨领域通用的解释方法，并加强理论与实际应用的结合以推动XAI发展。

authors_text: Arthur J. Redfern,Lijun Zhu,Molly K. Newquist
title: BCNN: A Binary CNN with All Matrix Ops Quantized to 1 Bit Precision
title_zh: BCNN：所有矩阵运算均量化至 1 位精度的二进制 CNN
abstract: This paper describes a CNN where all CNN style 2D convolution operations that lower to matrix matrix multiplication are fully binary. The network is derived from a common building block structure that is consistent with a constructive proof outline showing that binary neural networks are universal function approximators. 71.24% top 1 accuracy on the 2012 ImageNet validation set was achieved with a 2 step training procedure and implementation strategies optimized for binary operands are provided.
summary: This paper describes a CNN where all CNN style 2D convolution operations that lower to matrix matrix multiplication are fully binary. The network is derived from a common building block structure that is consistent with a constructive proof outline showing that binary neural networks are universal function approximators. 71.24% top 1 accuracy on the 2012 ImageNet validation set was achieved with a 2 step training procedure and implementation strategies optimized for binary operands are provided.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了一种 CNN，其中所有 CNN 风格的 2D 卷积运算（低于矩阵乘法）都是完全二进制的。该网络源自通用的构建块结构，该结构与表明二元神经网络是通用函数逼近器的构造性证明大纲一致。通过两步训练程序，在 2012 年 ImageNet 验证集上实现了 71.24% 的 top 1 准确率，并提供了针对二进制操作数优化的实现策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种二值化卷积神经网络（BCNN），将所有矩阵运算量化为1位精度，并在ImageNet数据集上实现了较高的分类准确率。
AI.motivation: 通过二值化量化降低计算复杂度和存储需求，同时保持模型性能，以适应资源受限场景下的高效部署需求。
AI.method: 设计通用构建块结构实现二值化卷积，采用两步训练策略并优化二值化操作的实现方式，基于矩阵乘法的二值化近似方法。
AI.result: 在2012 ImageNet验证集上达到71.24%的Top-1准确率，验证了二值化网络的可行性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 二值化CNN在理论证明和实验结果上均表现出作为通用函数逼近器的潜力，为高效神经网络部署提供了新方向。

tldr: 本文提出一种二值化卷积神经网络（BCNN），将所有矩阵运算量化为1位精度，并在ImageNet数据集上实现了较高的分类准确率。
motivation: 通过二值化量化降低计算复杂度和存储需求，同时保持模型性能，以适应资源受限场景下的高效部署需求。
method: 设计通用构建块结构实现二值化卷积，采用两步训练策略并优化二值化操作的实现方式，基于矩阵乘法的二值化近似方法。
result: 在2012 ImageNet验证集上达到71.24%的Top-1准确率，验证了二值化网络的可行性与有效性。
conclusion: 二值化CNN在理论证明和实验结果上均表现出作为通用函数逼近器的潜力，为高效神经网络部署提供了新方向。
search_text: BCNN: A Binary CNN with All Matrix Ops Quantized to 1 Bit Precision BCNN：所有矩阵运算均量化至 1 位精度的二进制 CNN This paper describes a CNN where all CNN style 2D convolution operations that lower to matrix matrix multiplication are fully binary. The network is derived from a common building block structure that is consistent with a constructive proof outline showing that binary neural networks are universal function approximators. 71.24% top 1 accuracy on the 2012 ImageNet validation set was achieved with a 2 step training procedure and implementation strategies optimized for binary operands are provided. 本文描述了一种 CNN，其中所有 CNN 风格的 2D 卷积运算（低于矩阵乘法）都是完全二进制的。该网络源自通用的构建块结构，该结构与表明二元神经网络是通用函数逼近器的构造性证明大纲一致。通过两步训练程序，在 2012 年 ImageNet 验证集上实现了 71.24% 的 top 1 准确率，并提供了针对二进制操作数优化的实现策略。 本文提出一种二值化卷积神经网络（BCNN），将所有矩阵运算量化为1位精度，并在ImageNet数据集上实现了较高的分类准确率。 Arthur J. Redfern,Lijun Zhu,Molly K. Newquist cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Simon Niklaus,Xuaner Cecilia Zhang,Jonathan T. Barron,Neal Wadhwa,Rahul Garg,Feng Liu,Tianfan Xue
title: Learned Dual-View Reflection Removal
title_zh: 学习双视图反射消除
abstract: Traditional reflection removal algorithms either use a single image as input, which suffers from intrinsic ambiguities, or use multiple images from a moving camera, which is inconvenient for users. We instead propose a learning-based dereflection algorithm that uses stereo images as input. This is an effective trade-off between the two extremes: the parallax between two views provides cues to remove reflections, and two views are easy to capture due to the adoption of stereo cameras in smartphones. Our model consists of a learning-based reflection-invariant flow model for dual-view registration, and a learned synthesis model for combining aligned image pairs. Because no dataset for dual-view reflection removal exists, we render a synthetic dataset of dual-views with and without reflections for use in training. Our evaluation on an additional real-world dataset of stereo pairs shows that our algorithm outperforms existing single-image and multi-image dereflection approaches.
summary: Traditional reflection removal algorithms either use a single image as input, which suffers from intrinsic ambiguities, or use multiple images from a moving camera, which is inconvenient for users. We instead propose a learning-based dereflection algorithm that uses stereo images as input. This is an effective trade-off between the two extremes: the parallax between two views provides cues to remove reflections, and two views are easy to capture due to the adoption of stereo cameras in smartphones. Our model consists of a learning-based reflection-invariant flow model for dual-view registration, and a learned synthesis model for combining aligned image pairs. Because no dataset for dual-view reflection removal exists, we render a synthetic dataset of dual-views with and without reflections for use in training. Our evaluation on an additional real-world dataset of stereo pairs shows that our algorithm outperforms existing single-image and multi-image dereflection approaches.
abstract_zh: 传统的反射去除算法要么使用单个图像作为输入，这存在固有的模糊性，要么使用来自移动摄像机的多个图像，这对用户来说不方便。相反，我们提出了一种基于学习的去反射算法，该算法使用立体图像作为输入。这是两个极端之间的有效权衡：两个视图之间的视差提供了消除反射的线索，并且由于智能手机中采用了立体摄像头，两个视图很容易捕获。我们的模型由用于双视图配准的基于学习的反射不变流模型和用于组合对齐图像对的学习合成模型组成。由于不存在用于双视图反射去除的数据集，因此我们渲染具有和不具有反射的双视图的合成数据集以用于训练。我们对额外的立体对现实世界数据集的评估表明，我们的算法优于现有的单图像和多图像去反射方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双视角学习的反射去除算法，利用立体图像解决传统单图像和多图像方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统反射去除方法要么依赖单图像导致歧义，要么需要多视角图像操作不便，而智能手机的立体摄像头可便捷获取双视角图像，需寻找折中方案。
AI.method: 构建反射不变光流模型实现双视角对齐，设计合成模型融合对齐图像对，并生成包含反射与无反射双视角的合成数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 在真实双视角数据集上验证，该算法优于现有单图像和多图像反射去除方法。
AI.conclusion: 双视角学习方法有效平衡了单图像与多图像方法的缺陷，利用立体摄像头普及性提升反射去除实用性。

title: Active Learning for Bayesian 3D Hand Pose Estimation
title_zh: 贝叶斯 3D 手势估计的主动学习
abstract: We propose a Bayesian approximation to a deep learning architecture for 3D hand pose estimation. Through this framework, we explore and analyse the two types of uncertainties that are influenced either by data or by the learning capability. Furthermore, we draw comparisons against the standard estimator over three popular benchmarks. The first contribution lies in outperforming the baseline while in the second part we address the active learning application. We also show that with a newly proposed acquisition function, our Bayesian 3D hand pose estimator obtains lowest errors with the least amount of data. The underlying code is publicly available at https://github.com/razvancaramalau/al_bhpe.
summary: We propose a Bayesian approximation to a deep learning architecture for 3D hand pose estimation. Through this framework, we explore and analyse the two types of uncertainties that are influenced either by data or by the learning capability. Furthermore, we draw comparisons against the standard estimator over three popular benchmarks. The first contribution lies in outperforming the baseline while in the second part we address the active learning application. We also show that with a newly proposed acquisition function, our Bayesian 3D hand pose estimator obtains lowest errors with the least amount of data. The underlying code is publicly available at https://github.com/razvancaramalau/al_bhpe.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了用于 3D 手部姿势估计的深度学习架构的贝叶斯近似。通过这个框架，我们探索和分析了受数据和学习能力影响的两类不确定性。此外，我们还通过三个流行的基准与标准估计器进行了比较。第一个贡献在于超越基线，而在第二部分中我们讨论主动学习应用程序。我们还表明，通过新提出的采集函数，我们的贝叶斯 3D 手部姿势估计器可以用最少的数据量获得最低的误差。底层代码可在 https://github.com/razvancaramalau/al_bhpe 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种贝叶斯深度学习框架用于3D手部姿态估计，并通过主动学习方法减少所需数据量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理数据不确定性和模型不确定性时存在不足，且标注数据成本较高。
AI.method: 设计贝叶斯神经网络量化两种不确定性，提出新型获取函数指导主动学习样本选择。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上均优于基线方法，使用最少数据即可达到最低姿态估计误差。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯方法有效提升估计鲁棒性，结合主动学习可显著降低数据需求，代码已开源。

authors_text: Prithviraj Ammanabrolu,Jack Urbanek,Margaret Li,Arthur Szlam,Tim Rocktäschel,Jason Weston
title: How to Motivate Your Dragon: Teaching Goal-Driven Agents to Speak and Act in Fantasy Worlds
title_zh: 如何激励你的龙：教目标驱动的特工在幻想世界中说话和行动
abstract: We seek to create agents that both act and communicate with other agents in pursuit of a goal. Towards this end, we extend LIGHT (Urbanek et al. 2019) -- a large-scale crowd-sourced fantasy text-game -- with a dataset of quests. These contain natural language motivations paired with in-game goals and human demonstrations; completing a quest might require dialogue or actions (or both). We introduce a reinforcement learning system that (1) incorporates large-scale language modeling-based and commonsense reasoning-based pre-training to imbue the agent with relevant priors; and (2) leverages a factorized action space of action commands and dialogue, balancing between the two. We conduct zero-shot evaluations using held-out human expert demonstrations, showing that our agents are able to act consistently and talk naturally with respect to their motivations.
summary: We seek to create agents that both act and communicate with other agents in pursuit of a goal. Towards this end, we extend LIGHT (Urbanek et al. 2019) -- a large-scale crowd-sourced fantasy text-game -- with a dataset of quests. These contain natural language motivations paired with in-game goals and human demonstrations; completing a quest might require dialogue or actions (or both). We introduce a reinforcement learning system that (1) incorporates large-scale language modeling-based and commonsense reasoning-based pre-training to imbue the agent with relevant priors; and (2) leverages a factorized action space of action commands and dialogue, balancing between the two. We conduct zero-shot evaluations using held-out human expert demonstrations, showing that our agents are able to act consistently and talk naturally with respect to their motivations.
abstract_zh: 我们寻求创建能够与其他智能体共同行动和沟通以实现目标的智能体。为此，我们用任务数据集扩展了 LIGHT（Urbanek et al. 2019）——一种大型众包奇幻文本游戏。其中包含自然语言动机与游戏内目标和人类演示相结合；完成任务可能需要对话或行动（或两者）。我们引入了一种强化学习系统，该系统（1）结合了基于大规模语言建模和基于常识推理的预训练，为智能体灌输相关先验知识； (2)利用动作命令和对话的分解动作空间，在两者之间取得平衡。我们使用人类专家演示进行零样本评估，表明我们的智能体能够一致地行动并自然地谈论他们的动机。

AI.tldr: 创建能够根据目标在奇幻世界中行动和交流的智能体
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理需要语言和行动结合的复杂任务时存在不足，需提升智能体的自主性和自然交互能力
AI.method: 采用强化学习框架，结合大规模语言模型和常识推理预训练，并使用分解的动作空间平衡对话与行动
AI.result: 零样本评估显示智能体能根据动机自然对话并一致行动
AI.conclusion: 结合预训练和分解动作空间的方法有效，未来可拓展至更多复杂场景

These contain natural language motivations paired with in-game goals and human demonstrations; completing a quest might require dialogue or actions (or both). We conduct zero-shot evaluations using held-out human expert demonstrations, showing that our agents are able to act consistently and talk naturally with respect to their motivations. 我们寻求创建能够与其他智能体共同行动和沟通以实现目标的智能体。为此，我们用任务数据集扩展了 LIGHT（Urbanek et al. 2019）——一种大型众包奇幻文本游戏。其中包含自然语言动机与游戏内目标和人类演示相结合；完成任务可能需要对话或行动（或两者）。我们引入了一种强化学习系统，该系统（1）结合了基于大规模语言建模和基于常识推理的预训练，为智能体灌输相关先验知识； (2)利用动作命令和对话的分解动作空间，在两者之间取得平衡。我们使用人类专家演示进行零样本评估，表明我们的智能体能够一致地行动并自然地谈论他们的动机。 创建能够根据目标在奇幻世界中行动和交流的智能体 Prithviraj Ammanabrolu,Jack Urbanek,Margaret Li,Arthur Szlam,Tim Rocktäschel,Jason Weston cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Towards Scalable Bayesian Learning of Causal DAGs
title_zh: 实现因果 DAG 的可扩展贝叶斯学习
comment: We have updated the manuscript based on reviewer feedback
comments: We have updated the manuscript based on reviewer feedback
abstract: We give methods for Bayesian inference of directed acyclic graphs, DAGs, and the induced causal effects from passively observed complete data. Our methods build on a recent Markov chain Monte Carlo scheme for learning Bayesian networks, which enables efficient approximate sampling from the graph posterior, provided that each node is assigned a small number $K$ of candidate parents. We present algorithmic techniques to significantly reduce the space and time requirements, which make the use of substantially larger values of $K$ feasible. Furthermore, we investigate the problem of selecting the candidate parents per node so as to maximize the covered posterior mass. Finally, we combine our sampling method with a novel Bayesian approach for estimating causal effects in linear Gaussian DAG models. Numerical experiments demonstrate the performance of our methods in detecting ancestor-descendant relations, and in causal effect estimation our Bayesian method is shown to outperform previous approaches.
summary: We give methods for Bayesian inference of directed acyclic graphs, DAGs, and the induced causal effects from passively observed complete data. Our methods build on a recent Markov chain Monte Carlo scheme for learning Bayesian networks, which enables efficient approximate sampling from the graph posterior, provided that each node is assigned a small number $K$ of candidate parents. We present algorithmic techniques to significantly reduce the space and time requirements, which make the use of substantially larger values of $K$ feasible. Furthermore, we investigate the problem of selecting the candidate parents per node so as to maximize the covered posterior mass. Finally, we combine our sampling method with a novel Bayesian approach for estimating causal effects in linear Gaussian DAG models. Numerical experiments demonstrate the performance of our methods in detecting ancestor-descendant relations, and in causal effect estimation our Bayesian method is shown to outperform previous approaches.
abstract_zh: 我们给出了有向无环图、DAG 的贝叶斯推理方法，以及从被动观察的完整数据中诱发的因果效应。我们的方法建立在最近用于学习贝叶斯网络的马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗方案的基础上，只要为每个节点分配少量的 $K$ 候选父节点，就可以从图后验中进行有效的近似采样。我们提出了显着减少空间和时间要求的算法技术，这使得使用更大的 $K$ 值变得可行。此外，我们研究了选择每个节点的候选父节点的问题，以便最大化覆盖的后部质量。最后，我们将采样方法与新颖的贝叶斯方法相结合，用于估计线性高斯 DAG 模型中的因果效应。数值实验证明了我们的方法在检测祖先-后代关系方面的性能，并且在因果效应估计方面，我们的贝叶斯方法被证明优于以前的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可扩展的贝叶斯方法，用于从完全观测数据中学习因果有向无环图（DAG）并估计因果效应。
AI.motivation: 传统贝叶斯网络学习方法在处理大规模数据时面临计算效率和可扩展性挑战，需更高效算法以支持更大候选父节点集和复杂模型。
AI.method: 基于改进的马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛采样算法，通过优化空间时间复杂度支持更大候选父节点数；结合候选父节点选择策略最大化后验质量，并融合贝叶斯方法估计线性高斯DAG的因果效应。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，该方法在祖先-后代关系检测和因果效应估计任务中均优于现有方法，尤其在高维场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的可扩展贝叶斯学习框架有效平衡了计算效率与模型准确性，为因果发现和效应估计提供了新工具。

title: Implicit Rank-Minimizing Autoencoder
title_zh: 隐式秩最小化自动编码器
abstract: An important component of autoencoders is the method by which the information capacity of the latent representation is minimized or limited. In this work, the rank of the covariance matrix of the codes is implicitly minimized by relying on the fact that gradient descent learning in multi-layer linear networks leads to minimum-rank solutions. By inserting a number of extra linear layers between the encoder and the decoder, the system spontaneously learns representations with a low effective dimension. The model, dubbed Implicit Rank-Minimizing Autoencoder (IRMAE), is simple, deterministic, and learns compact latent spaces. We demonstrate the validity of the method on several image generation and representation learning tasks.
summary: An important component of autoencoders is the method by which the information capacity of the latent representation is minimized or limited. In this work, the rank of the covariance matrix of the codes is implicitly minimized by relying on the fact that gradient descent learning in multi-layer linear networks leads to minimum-rank solutions. By inserting a number of extra linear layers between the encoder and the decoder, the system spontaneously learns representations with a low effective dimension. The model, dubbed Implicit Rank-Minimizing Autoencoder (IRMAE), is simple, deterministic, and learns compact latent spaces. We demonstrate the validity of the method on several image generation and representation learning tasks.
abstract_zh: 自动编码器的一个重要组成部分是最小化或限制潜在表示的信息容量的方法。在这项工作中，依靠多层线性网络中的梯度下降学习导致最小秩解这一事实，代码的协方差矩阵的秩被隐式最小化。通过在编码器和解码器之间插入许多额外的线性层，系统自发地学习具有低有效维度的表示。该模型被称为隐式排名最小化自动编码器（IRMAE），简单、确定，并且可以学习紧凑的潜在空间。我们证明了该方法在多个图像生成和表示学习任务上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种隐式秩最小化自编码器（IRMAE），通过在编码器和解码器间插入额外线性层，使模型自发学习低维潜在表示。
AI.motivation: 传统自编码器限制潜在表示信息容量的方法存在不足，而隐式秩最小化能更高效地学习紧凑潜在空间，且保持模型简单性与确定性。
AI.method: 利用多层线性网络梯度下降会收敛到最小秩解的特性，在编码器与解码器间插入多个线性层，使协方差矩阵秩隐式降低。
AI.result: 在图像生成与表示学习任务中验证了IRMAE的有效性，证明其能生成低维且信息完整的潜在表示。
AI.conclusion: IRMAE通过结构设计实现隐式秩约束，在保持模型简洁性的同时，有效提升了潜在空间的紧凑性与表征能力。

title: Helicality: An Isomap-based Measure of Octave Equivalence in Audio Data
title_zh: 螺旋性：音频数据中倍频程等效性的基于 Isomap 的测量
comment: 3 pages, 3 figures. To be presented at the 21st International Society for Music Information Retrieval (ISMIR) Conference. Montreal, Canada, October 2020
comments: 3 pages, 3 figures. To be presented at the 21st International Society for Music Information Retrieval (ISMIR) Conference. Montreal, Canada, October 2020
abstract: Octave equivalence serves as domain-knowledge in MIR systems, including chromagram, spiral convolutional networks, and harmonic CQT. Prior work has applied the Isomap manifold learning algorithm to unlabeled audio data to embed frequency sub-bands in 3-D space where the Euclidean distances are inversely proportional to the strength of their Pearson correlations. However, discovering octave equivalence via Isomap requires visual inspection and is not scalable. To address this problem, we define "helicality" as the goodness of fit of the 3-D Isomap embedding to a Shepherd-Risset helix. Our method is unsupervised and uses a custom Frank-Wolfe algorithm to minimize a least-squares objective inside a convex hull. Numerical experiments indicate that isolated musical notes have a higher helicality than speech, followed by drum hits.
summary: Octave equivalence serves as domain-knowledge in MIR systems, including chromagram, spiral convolutional networks, and harmonic CQT. Prior work has applied the Isomap manifold learning algorithm to unlabeled audio data to embed frequency sub-bands in 3-D space where the Euclidean distances are inversely proportional to the strength of their Pearson correlations. However, discovering octave equivalence via Isomap requires visual inspection and is not scalable. To address this problem, we define "helicality" as the goodness of fit of the 3-D Isomap embedding to a Shepherd-Risset helix. Our method is unsupervised and uses a custom Frank-Wolfe algorithm to minimize a least-squares objective inside a convex hull. Numerical experiments indicate that isolated musical notes have a higher helicality than speech, followed by drum hits.
abstract_zh: 倍频程等价作为 MIR 系统中的领域知识，包括色谱图、螺旋卷积网络和谐波 CQT。先前的工作已将 Isomap 流形学习算法应用于未标记的音频数据，以将频率子带嵌入 3D 空间中，其中欧几里德距离与其皮尔逊相关性的强度成反比。然而，通过 Isomap 发现八度等效性需要目视检查，并且不可扩展。为了解决这个问题，我们将“螺旋度”定义为嵌入 Shepherd-Risset 螺旋的 3-D Isomap 的拟合优度。我们的方法是无监督的，并使用自定义的 Frank-Wolfe 算法来最小化凸包内的最小二乘目标。数值实验表明，孤立的音符比语音具有更高的螺旋性，其次是鼓声。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Isomap的螺旋度度量方法，用于自动检测音频数据中的八度等价性，解决传统方法依赖人工检查的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统Isomap方法需人工视觉检查发现八度等价性，缺乏可扩展性，需开发自动化无监督指标以提升音频分析效率。
AI.method: 通过Isomap将音频频率子带嵌入三维空间，定义螺旋度为嵌入数据与Shepherd-Risset螺旋的拟合优度，采用Frank-Wolfe算法优化最小二乘目标。
AI.result: 实验表明孤立音符的螺旋度显著高于语音及鼓点，验证了方法对八度等价性的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 螺旋度提供了一种无监督的八度等价性量化方法，可扩展应用于音乐信息检索系统，未来需进一步验证其在复杂音频场景中的鲁棒性。
