search_text: Helicality: An Isomap-based Measure of Octave Equivalence in Audio Data 螺旋性：音频数据中倍频程等效性的基于 Isomap 的测量 Octave equivalence serves as domain-knowledge in MIR systems, including chromagram, spiral convolutional networks, and harmonic CQT. Prior work has applied the Isomap manifold learning algorithm to unlabeled audio data to embed frequency sub-bands in 3-D space where the Euclidean distances are inversely proportional to the strength of their Pearson correlations. However, discovering octave equivalence via Isomap requires visual inspection and is not scalable. To address this problem, we define "helicality" as the goodness of fit of the 3-D Isomap embedding to a Shepherd-Risset helix. Our method is unsupervised and uses a custom Frank-Wolfe algorithm to minimize a least-squares objective inside a convex hull. Numerical experiments indicate that isolated musical notes have a higher helicality than speech, followed by drum hits. 倍频程等价作为 MIR 系统中的领域知识，包括色谱图、螺旋卷积网络和谐波 CQT。先前的工作已将 Isomap 流形学习算法应用于未标记的音频数据，以将频率子带嵌入 3D 空间中，其中欧几里德距离与其皮尔逊相关性的强度成反比。然而，通过 Isomap 发现八度等效性需要目视检查，并且不可扩展。为了解决这个问题，我们将“螺旋度”定义为嵌入 Shepherd-Risset 螺旋的 3-D Isomap 的拟合优度。我们的方法是无监督的，并使用自定义的 Frank-Wolfe 算法来最小化凸包内的最小二乘目标。数值实验表明，孤立的音符比语音具有更高的螺旋性，其次是鼓声。 本文提出一种基于Isomap的螺旋度度量方法，用于自动检测音频数据中的八度等价性，解决传统方法依赖人工检查的问题。 Sripathi Sridhar,Vincent Lostanlen eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Sam Sattarzadeh,Mahesh Sudhakar,Anthony Lem,Shervin Mehryar,K. N. Plataniotis,Jongseong Jang,Hyunwoo Kim,Yeonjeong Jeong,Sangmin Lee,Kyunghoon Bae
title: Explaining Convolutional Neural Networks through Attribution-Based Input Sampling and Block-Wise Feature Aggregation
title_zh: 通过基于归因的输入采样和分块特征聚合解释卷积神经网络
comment: 9 pages, 9 figures, Accepted at the Thirty-Fifth AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI-21)
comments: 9 pages, 9 figures, Accepted at the Thirty-Fifth AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI-21)
abstract: As an emerging field in Machine Learning, Explainable AI (XAI) has been offering remarkable performance in interpreting the decisions made by Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). To achieve visual explanations for CNNs, methods based on class activation mapping and randomized input sampling have gained great popularity. However, the attribution methods based on these techniques provide lower resolution and blurry explanation maps that limit their explanation power. To circumvent this issue, visualization based on various layers is sought. In this work, we collect visualization maps from multiple layers of the model based on an attribution-based input sampling technique and aggregate them to reach a fine-grained and complete explanation. We also propose a layer selection strategy that applies to the whole family of CNN-based models, based on which our extraction framework is applied to visualize the last layers of each convolutional block of the model. Moreover, we perform an empirical analysis of the efficacy of derived lower-level information to enhance the represented attributions. Comprehensive experiments conducted on shallow and deep models trained on natural and industrial datasets, using both ground-truth and model-truth based evaluation metrics validate our proposed algorithm by meeting or outperforming the state-of-the-art methods in terms of explanation ability and visual quality, demonstrating that our method shows stability regardless of the size of objects or instances to be explained.
summary: As an emerging field in Machine Learning, Explainable AI (XAI) has been offering remarkable performance in interpreting the decisions made by Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). To achieve visual explanations for CNNs, methods based on class activation mapping and randomized input sampling have gained great popularity. However, the attribution methods based on these techniques provide lower resolution and blurry explanation maps that limit their explanation power. To circumvent this issue, visualization based on various layers is sought. In this work, we collect visualization maps from multiple layers of the model based on an attribution-based input sampling technique and aggregate them to reach a fine-grained and complete explanation. We also propose a layer selection strategy that applies to the whole family of CNN-based models, based on which our extraction framework is applied to visualize the last layers of each convolutional block of the model. Moreover, we perform an empirical analysis of the efficacy of derived lower-level information to enhance the represented attributions. Comprehensive experiments conducted on shallow and deep models trained on natural and industrial datasets, using both ground-truth and model-truth based evaluation metrics validate our proposed algorithm by meeting or outperforming the state-of-the-art methods in terms of explanation ability and visual quality, demonstrating that our method shows stability regardless of the size of objects or instances to be explained.
abstract_zh: 作为机器学习的一个新兴领域，可解释人工智能（XAI）在解释卷积神经网络（CNN）做出的决策方面一直表现出色。为了实现 CNN 的可视化解释，基于类激活映射和随机输入采样的方法已广受欢迎。然而，基于这些技术的归因方法提供了较低的分辨率和模糊的解释图，限制了它们的解释能力。为了解决这个问题，寻求基于各个层的可视化。在这项工作中，我们基于基于归因的输入采样技术从模型的多个层收集可视化图，并将它们聚合以达到细粒度和完整的解释。我们还提出了一种适用于整个基于 CNN 的模型系列的层选择策略，基于该策略，我们的提取框架被应用于可视化模型的每个卷积块的最后一层。此外，我们对派生的较低级别信息的有效性进行了实证分析，以增强所表示的归因。在自然和工业数据集上训练的浅层和深层模型上进行的综合实验，使用基于真实值和基于模型真实值的评估指标，验证了我们提出的算法，在解释能力和视觉质量方面满足或优于最先进的方法，证明我们的方法显示出稳定性，无论要解释的对象或实例的大小如何。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于归因输入采样和块级特征聚合的方法，用于生成更精细、完整的卷积神经网络解释。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN解释方法生成的可视化图分辨率低且模糊，限制了其解释效果，需通过多层级信息整合提升解释质量。
AI.method: 通过归因输入采样技术从多层模型中提取可视化图，结合块级特征聚合策略，并提出适用于所有CNN模型的层次选择方法。
AI.result: 在自然与工业数据集上实验表明，该方法在解释能力与视觉质量上优于现有技术，且对对象规模具有稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 多层级特征聚合与层次选择策略有效提升了CNN解释的分辨率和准确性，为模型解释提供了通用性解决方案。

title: Predicting User Engagement Status for Online Evaluation of Intelligent Assistants
title_zh: 预测用户参与状态以进行智能助理的在线评估
comment: Paper has been accepted by ECIR 2021 (43rd edition of the annual European Conference on Information Retrieval)
comments: Paper has been accepted by ECIR 2021 (43rd edition of the annual European Conference on Information Retrieval)
abstract: Evaluation of intelligent assistants in large-scale and online settings remains an open challenge. User behavior-based online evaluation metrics have demonstrated great effectiveness for monitoring large-scale web search and recommender systems. Therefore, we consider predicting user engagement status as the very first and critical step to online evaluation for intelligent assistants. In this work, we first proposed a novel framework for classifying user engagement status into four categories -- fulfillment, continuation, reformulation and abandonment. We then demonstrated how to design simple but indicative metrics based on the framework to quantify user engagement levels. We also aim for automating user engagement prediction with machine learning methods. We compare various models and features for predicting engagement status using four real-world datasets. We conducted detailed analyses on features and failure cases to discuss the performance of current models as well as challenges.
summary: Evaluation of intelligent assistants in large-scale and online settings remains an open challenge. User behavior-based online evaluation metrics have demonstrated great effectiveness for monitoring large-scale web search and recommender systems. Therefore, we consider predicting user engagement status as the very first and critical step to online evaluation for intelligent assistants. In this work, we first proposed a novel framework for classifying user engagement status into four categories -- fulfillment, continuation, reformulation and abandonment. We then demonstrated how to design simple but indicative metrics based on the framework to quantify user engagement levels. We also aim for automating user engagement prediction with machine learning methods. We compare various models and features for predicting engagement status using four real-world datasets. We conducted detailed analyses on features and failure cases to discuss the performance of current models as well as challenges.
abstract_zh: 在大规模和在线环境中评估智能助手仍然是一个开放的挑战。基于用户行为的在线评估指标在监控大规模网络搜索和推荐系统方面表现出了巨大的有效性。因此，我们认为预测用户参与状态是智能助理在线评估的第一步也是关键的一步。在这项工作中，我们首先提出了一个新颖的框架，将用户参与状态分为四类：履行、继续、重新制定和放弃。然后，我们演示了如何基于该框架设计简单但具有指示性的指标来量化用户参与度。我们还致力于通过机器学习方法自动预测用户参与度。我们使用四个真实世界的数据集来比较用于预测参与状态的各种模型和功能。我们对功能和失败案例进行了详细分析，以讨论当前模型的性能和挑战。

AI.tldr: 提出一种新框架和方法，用于在线评估智能助手时预测用户参与状态，分为四个类别并设计指标进行量化。
AI.motivation: 大规模在线评估智能助手存在挑战，基于用户行为的指标在搜索和推荐系统中有效，需预测用户参与状态以进行有效评估。
AI.method: 提出四类用户参与状态分类框架，设计量化指标，并采用机器学习模型比较不同特征和模型效果。
AI.result: 通过四个真实数据集验证方法，分析特征和失败案例，评估模型性能并识别挑战。
AI.conclusion: 用户参与状态预测对在线评估智能助手至关重要，现有模型存在挑战，需进一步优化方法。

title: VAEBM: A Symbiosis between Variational Autoencoders and Energy-based Models
title_zh: VAEBM：变分自动编码器和基于能量的模型之间的共生
abstract: Energy-based models (EBMs) have recently been successful in representing complex distributions of small images. However, sampling from them requires expensive Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) iterations that mix slowly in high dimensional pixel space. Unlike EBMs, variational autoencoders (VAEs) generate samples quickly and are equipped with a latent space that enables fast traversal of the data manifold. However, VAEs tend to assign high probability density to regions in data space outside the actual data distribution and often fail at generating sharp images. In this paper, we propose VAEBM, a symbiotic composition of a VAE and an EBM that offers the best of both worlds. VAEBM captures the overall mode structure of the data distribution using a state-of-the-art VAE and it relies on its EBM component to explicitly exclude non-data-like regions from the model and refine the image samples. Moreover, the VAE component in VAEBM allows us to speed up MCMC updates by reparameterizing them in the VAE's latent space. Our experimental results show that VAEBM outperforms state-of-the-art VAEs and EBMs in generative quality on several benchmark image datasets by a large margin. It can generate high-quality images as large as 256$\times$256 pixels with short MCMC chains. We also demonstrate that VAEBM provides complete mode coverage and performs well in out-of-distribution detection. The source code is available at https://github.com/NVlabs/VAEBM

However, sampling from them requires expensive Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) iterations that mix slowly in high dimensional pixel space. However, VAEs tend to assign high probability density to regions in data space outside the actual data distribution and often fail at generating sharp images. In this paper, we propose VAEBM, a symbiotic composition of a VAE and an EBM that offers the best of both worlds. VAEBM captures the overall mode structure of the data distribution using a state-of-the-art VAE and it relies on its EBM component to explicitly exclude non-data-like regions from the model and refine the image samples. Moreover, the VAE component in VAEBM allows us to speed up MCMC updates by reparameterizing them in the VAE's latent space. Our experimental results show that VAEBM outperforms state-of-the-art VAEs and EBMs in generative quality on several benchmark image datasets by a large margin. It can generate high-quality images as large as 256$\times$256 pixels with short MCMC chains. We also demonstrate that VAEBM provides complete mode coverage and performs well in out-of-distribution detection. The source code is available at https://github.com/NVlabs/VAEBM
abstract_zh: 基于能量的模型（EBM）最近在表示小图像的复杂分布方面取得了成功。然而，从它们中采样需要昂贵的马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗 (MCMC) 迭代，这些迭代在高维像素空间中混合缓慢。与 EBM 不同，变分自动编码器 (VAE) 可以快速生成样本，并配备一个潜在空间，可以快速遍历数据流形。然而，VAE 倾向于将高概率密度分配给实际数据分布之外的数据空间区域，并且常常无法生成清晰的图像。在本文中，我们提出了 VAEBM，这是 VAE 和 EBM 的共生组合物，它提供了两全其美的优点。 VAEBM 使用最先进的 VAE 捕获数据分布的整体模式结构，并依赖其 EBM 组件从模型中明确排除非数据类区域并细化图像样本。此外，VAEBM 中的 VAE 组件允许我们通过在 VAE 的潜在空间中重新参数化 MCMC 更新来加速它们。我们的实验结果表明，VAEBM 在多个基准图像数据集上的生成质量大幅优于最先进的 VAE 和 EBM。它可以使用短 MCMC 链生成高达 256$\times$256 像素的高质量图像。我们还证明了 VAEBM 提供了完整的模式覆盖，并且在分布外检测中表现良好。源代码位于 https://github.com/NVlabs/VAEBM

AI.tldr: 本文提出VAEBM模型，结合变分自编码器（VAE）和能量基模型（EBM）的优势，以提升图像生成质量与效率。
AI.motivation: 能量基模型（EBM）虽能建模复杂分布，但采样效率低；VAE生成速度快但易产生模糊图像。需融合两者优势以解决采样慢与生成质量差的问题。
AI.method: VAEBM通过VAE捕捉数据分布整体模式，并利用EBM排除非数据区域并优化样本。同时，VAE的潜在空间用于加速MCMC更新过程。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，VAEBM在生成质量上显著优于现有VAE和EBM，可生成256×256高质量图像，且具有完整模式覆盖与分布外检测能力。
AI.conclusion: VAEBM有效结合VAE与EBM优势，在生成质量与效率上取得突破，代码已开源。

title: Multiscale Detection of Cancerous Tissue in High Resolution Slide Scans
title_zh: 高分辨率玻片扫描中癌组织的多尺度检测
abstract: We present an algorithm for multi-scale tumor (chimeric cell) detection in high resolution slide scans. The broad range of tumor sizes in our dataset pose a challenge for current Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) which often fail when image features are very small (8 pixels). Our approach modifies the effective receptive field at different layers in a CNN so that objects with a broad range of varying scales can be detected in a single forward pass. We define rules for computing adaptive prior anchor boxes which we show are solvable under the equal proportion interval principle. Two mechanisms in our CNN architecture alleviate the effects of non-discriminative features prevalent in our data - a foveal detection algorithm that incorporates a cascade residual-inception module and a deconvolution module with additional context information. When integrated into a Single Shot MultiBox Detector (SSD), these additions permit more accurate detection of small-scale objects. The results permit efficient real-time analysis of medical images in pathology and related biomedical research fields.
summary: We present an algorithm for multi-scale tumor (chimeric cell) detection in high resolution slide scans. The broad range of tumor sizes in our dataset pose a challenge for current Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) which often fail when image features are very small (8 pixels). Our approach modifies the effective receptive field at different layers in a CNN so that objects with a broad range of varying scales can be detected in a single forward pass. We define rules for computing adaptive prior anchor boxes which we show are solvable under the equal proportion interval principle. Two mechanisms in our CNN architecture alleviate the effects of non-discriminative features prevalent in our data - a foveal detection algorithm that incorporates a cascade residual-inception module and a deconvolution module with additional context information. When integrated into a Single Shot MultiBox Detector (SSD), these additions permit more accurate detection of small-scale objects. The results permit efficient real-time analysis of medical images in pathology and related biomedical research fields.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种在高分辨率载玻片扫描中进行多尺度肿瘤（嵌合细胞）检测的算法。我们数据集中的广泛肿瘤大小对当前的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 提出了挑战，当图像特征非常小时（8 像素）时，卷积神经网络通常会失败。我们的方法修改了 CNN 中不同层的有效感受野，以便在一次前向传播中可以检测到具有广泛不同尺度的对象。我们定义了计算自适应先验锚框的规则，我们证明这些规则在等比例区间原则下是可解的。我们的 CNN 架构中的两种机制减轻了数据中普遍存在的非歧视性特征的影响 - 一种中心凹检测算法，该算法结合了级联残差初始模块和具有附加上下文信息的反卷积模块。当集成到单次多盒检测器 (SSD) 中时，这些附加功能可以更准确地检测小规模物体。结果允许对病理学和相关生物医学研究领域的医学图像进行有效的实时分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于高分辨率切片扫描中多尺度癌组织检测的算法。
AI.motivation: 当前卷积神经网络在检测极小尺寸肿瘤（如8像素）时效果不佳，而医学图像中肿瘤尺寸差异大，需解决多尺度检测难题。
AI.method: 通过调整CNN不同层的有效感受野，结合自适应先验锚框规则，并引入视网膜检测算法与反卷积模块增强上下文信息，集成至SSD框架中。
AI.result: 实现了对小尺度肿瘤的精确检测，支持医学图像的实时高效分析。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了多尺度癌组织检测问题，为病理学研究提供实用工具。

title: Tabular GANs for uneven distribution
title_zh: 用于不均匀分布的表格 GAN
abstract: Generative models for tabular data have evolved rapidly beyond Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). While GANs pioneered synthetic tabular data generation, recent advances in diffusion models and large language models (LLMs) have opened new paradigms with complementary strengths in sample quality, privacy, and controllability. In this paper, we survey the landscape of tabular data generation across three major paradigms - GANs, diffusion models, and LLMs - and introduce a unified, modular framework that supports all three. The framework encompasses data preprocessing, a model-agnostic interface layer, standardized training and inference pipelines, and a comprehensive evaluation module. We validate the framework through experiments on seven benchmark datasets, demonstrating that GAN-based augmentation can improve downstream performance under distribution shift. The framework and its reference implementation are publicly available at https://github.com/Diyago/Tabular-data-generation, facilitating reproducibility and extensibility for future research.
summary: Generative models for tabular data have evolved rapidly beyond Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). While GANs pioneered synthetic tabular data generation, recent advances in diffusion models and large language models (LLMs) have opened new paradigms with complementary strengths in sample quality, privacy, and controllability. In this paper, we survey the landscape of tabular data generation across three major paradigms - GANs, diffusion models, and LLMs - and introduce a unified, modular framework that supports all three. The framework encompasses data preprocessing, a model-agnostic interface layer, standardized training and inference pipelines, and a comprehensive evaluation module. We validate the framework through experiments on seven benchmark datasets, demonstrating that GAN-based augmentation can improve downstream performance under distribution shift. The framework and its reference implementation are publicly available at https://github.com/Diyago/Tabular-data-generation, facilitating reproducibility and extensibility for future research.
abstract_zh: 表格数据的生成模型已经迅速发展，超越了生成对抗网络 (GAN)。虽然 GAN 开创了合成表格数据生成的先河，但扩散模型和大型语言模型 (LLM) 的最新进展开辟了新的范式，在样本质量、隐私和可控性方面具有互补优势。在本文中，我们调查了三种主要范式（GAN、扩散模型和 LLM）的表格数据生成前景，并引入了支持这三种范式的统一模块化框架。该框架包括数据预处理、模型无关的接口层、标准化训练和推理管道以及综合评估模块。我们通过七个基准数据集的实验验证了该框架，证明基于 GAN 的增强可以提高分布转移下的下游性能。该框架及其参考实现可在 https://github.com/Diyago/Tabular-data- Generation 上公开获取，以促进未来研究的可重复性和可扩展性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的模块化框架，用于生成表格数据，并比较了GAN、扩散模型和大语言模型三种主要范式的优劣。
AI.motivation: 尽管生成对抗网络（GANs）在表格数据生成方面取得了突破，但近期扩散模型和大语言模型（LLMs）也展现了互补的优势。因此，需要一个统一的框架来支持这三种范式，并推动未来的研究。
AI.method: 本文提出了一个统一的模块化框架，涵盖数据预处理、模型无关的接口层、标准化的训练和推理流程以及全面的评估模块。
AI.result: 通过在七个基准数据集上的实验验证，该框架展示了基于GAN的数据增强在分布偏移情况下可以提升下游任务的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架和参考实现已公开，便于未来研究的复现和扩展，为表格数据生成研究提供了新的工具和方向。

ai_content.method: 本文提出了一个统一的模块化框架，涵盖数据预处理、模型无关的接口层、标准化的训练和推理流程以及全面的评估模块。
ai_content.result: 通过在七个基准数据集上的实验验证，该框架展示了基于GAN的数据增强在分布偏移情况下可以提升下游任务的性能。
ai_content.conclusion: 该框架和参考实现已公开，便于未来研究的复现和扩展，为表格数据生成研究提供了新的工具和方向。

search_text: Tabular GANs for uneven distribution 用于不均匀分布的表格 GAN Generative models for tabular data have evolved rapidly beyond Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). While GANs pioneered synthetic tabular data generation, recent advances in diffusion models and large language models (LLMs) have opened new paradigms with complementary strengths in sample quality, privacy, and controllability. In this paper, we survey the landscape of tabular data generation across three major paradigms - GANs, diffusion models, and LLMs - and introduce a unified, modular framework that supports all three. The framework encompasses data preprocessing, a model-agnostic interface layer, standardized training and inference pipelines, and a comprehensive evaluation module. We validate the framework through experiments on seven benchmark datasets, demonstrating that GAN-based augmentation can improve downstream performance under distribution shift. The framework and its reference implementation are publicly available at https://github.com/Diyago/Tabular-data-generation, facilitating reproducibility and extensibility for future research. 表格数据的生成模型已经迅速发展，超越了生成对抗网络 (GAN)。虽然 GAN 开创了合成表格数据生成的先河，但扩散模型和大型语言模型 (LLM) 的最新进展开辟了新的范式，在样本质量、隐私和可控性方面具有互补优势。在本文中，我们调查了三种主要范式（GAN、扩散模型和 LLM）的表格数据生成前景，并引入了支持这三种范式的统一模块化框架。该框架包括数据预处理、模型无关的接口层、标准化训练和推理管道以及综合评估模块。我们通过七个基准数据集的实验验证了该框架，证明基于 GAN 的增强可以提高分布转移下的下游性能。该框架及其参考实现可在 https://github.com/Diyago/Tabular-data- Generation 上公开获取，以促进未来研究的可重复性和可扩展性。 本文提出了一种统一的模块化框架，用于生成表格数据，并比较了GAN、扩散模型和大语言模型三种主要范式的优劣。 Insaf Ashrapov cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Wenlong Wu,James M. Keller,Jeffrey Dale,James C. Bezdek
title: StreamSoNG: A Soft Streaming Classification Approach
title_zh: StreamSoNG：一种软流分类方法
abstract: Examining most streaming clustering algorithms leads to the understanding that they are actually incremental classification models. They model existing and newly discovered structures via summary information that we call footprints. Incoming data is normally assigned a crisp label (into one of the structures) and that structure's footprint is incrementally updated. There is no reason that these assignments need to be crisp. In this paper, we propose a new streaming classification algorithm that uses Neural Gas prototypes as footprints and produces a possibilistic label vector (of typicalities) for each incoming vector. These typicalities are generated by a modified possibilistic k-nearest neighbor algorithm. The approach is tested on synthetic and real image datasets. We compare our approach to three other streaming classifiers based on the Adaptive Random Forest, Very Fast Decision Rules, and the DenStream algorithm with excellent results.
summary: Examining most streaming clustering algorithms leads to the understanding that they are actually incremental classification models. They model existing and newly discovered structures via summary information that we call footprints. Incoming data is normally assigned a crisp label (into one of the structures) and that structure's footprint is incrementally updated. There is no reason that these assignments need to be crisp. In this paper, we propose a new streaming classification algorithm that uses Neural Gas prototypes as footprints and produces a possibilistic label vector (of typicalities) for each incoming vector. These typicalities are generated by a modified possibilistic k-nearest neighbor algorithm. The approach is tested on synthetic and real image datasets. We compare our approach to three other streaming classifiers based on the Adaptive Random Forest, Very Fast Decision Rules, and the DenStream algorithm with excellent results.
abstract_zh: 检查大多数流式聚类算法可以了解它们实际上是增量分类模型。他们通过我们称之为足迹的摘要信息对现有的和新发现的结构进行建模。传入的数据通常会被分配一个清晰的标签（进入其中一个结构），并且该结构的占用空间会逐渐更新。这些任务没有理由需要清晰。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的流分类算法，该算法使用神经气体原型作为足迹，并为每个输入向量生成一个可能的标签向量（典型性）。这些典型性是由改进的可能 k-近邻算法生成的。该方法在合成和真实图像数据集上进行了测试。我们将我们的方法与其他三种基于自适应随机森林、极快速决策规则和 DenStream 算法的流分类器进行了比较，并取得了优异的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经气体原型和可能性标签向量的软流分类方法StreamSoNG，用于处理流数据分类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有流聚类算法强制数据分配明确标签，无法反映数据与结构间的不确定性，需更灵活的软分类方法。
AI.method: 使用神经气体原型作为数据结构的footprints，结合改进的possibilistic k近邻算法生成可能性标签向量。
AI.result: 在合成和真实图像数据集上表现优于Adaptive Random Forest、Very Fast Decision Rules和DenStream等算法。
AI.conclusion: StreamSoNG通过软标签分配有效处理流数据不确定性，在动态数据环境中具有优势。

title: Quantifying social organization and political polarization in online platforms
title_zh: 量化在线平台中的社会组织和政治极化
abstract: Optimism about the Internet's potential to bring the world together has been tempered by concerns about its role in inflaming the 'culture wars'. Via mass selection into like-minded groups, online society may be becoming more fragmented and polarized, particularly with respect to partisan differences. However, our ability to measure the social makeup of online communities, and in turn understand the social organization of online platforms, is limited by the pseudonymous, unstructured, and large-scale nature of digital discussion. We develop a neural embedding methodology to quantify the positioning of online communities along social dimensions by leveraging large-scale patterns of aggregate behaviour. Applying our methodology to 5.1B Reddit comments made in 10K communities over 14 years, we measure how the macroscale community structure is organized with respect to age, gender, and U.S. political partisanship. Examining political content, we find Reddit underwent a significant polarization event around the 2016 U.S. presidential election, and remained highly polarized for years afterward. Contrary to conventional wisdom, however, individual-level polarization is rare; the system-level shift in 2016 was disproportionately driven by the arrival of new and newly political users. Political polarization on Reddit is unrelated to previous activity on the platform, and is instead temporally aligned with external events. We also observe a stark ideological asymmetry, with the sharp increase in 2016 being entirely attributable to changes in right-wing activity. Our methodology is broadly applicable to the study of online interaction, and our findings have implications for the design of online platforms, understanding the social contexts of online behaviour, and quantifying the dynamics and mechanisms of online polarization.

abstract_zh: 人们对互联网将世界团结在一起的潜力的乐观态度因对其在煽动“文化战争”方面所扮演的角色的担忧而受到影响。通过大规模选择志同道合的群体，网络社会可能会变得更加碎片化和两极分化，特别是在党派差异方面。然而，我们衡量在线社区的社会构成并进而了解在线平台的社会组织的能力受到数字讨论的匿名、非结构化和大规模性质的限制。我们开发了一种神经嵌入方法，通过利用大规模的聚合行为模式来量化在线社区在社会维度上的定位。将我们的方法应用于 14 年来 10K 个社区中的 5.1B Reddit 评论，我们衡量了宏观社区结构在年龄、性别和美国政治党派方面的组织方式。审视政治内容，我们发现 Reddit 在 2016 年美国总统大选前后经历了一次重大的两极分化事件，并且在之后的几年里仍然保持高度两极分化。然而，与传统观点相反，个人层面的两极分化很少见。 2016 年系统层面的转变在很大程度上是由新政治用户的到来推动的。 Reddit 上的政治极化与平台上之前的活动无关，而是在时间上与外部事件保持一致。我们还观察到意识形态上的明显不对称，2016 年的急剧增长完全归因于右翼活动的变化。我们的方法广泛适用于在线互动的研究，我们的研究结果对在线平台的设计、理解在线行为的社会背景以及量化在线两极分化的动态和机制具有影响。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种神经嵌入方法，用于量化在线社区的社会结构和政治极化现象，通过分析Reddit平台14年间51亿条评论数据，揭示了2016年美国大选后的极化趋势及其驱动因素。
AI.motivation: 互联网的碎片化和匿名性使在线社区的社会结构难以测量，而政治极化现象对社会影响重大，亟需有效工具和方法进行量化研究。
AI.method: 基于大规模用户行为模式，构建神经嵌入模型，通过聚合行为数据量化社区在年龄、性别和政治立场等维度的分布特征，并分析极化事件的时间关联性。
AI.result: 发现Reddit在2016年大选后出现显著极化，且主要由新增用户驱动；个体层面极化现象罕见，极化与外部事件时间对齐；右翼活动的激增是2016年极化的主要原因。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可广泛应用于在线交互研究，研究结果为平台设计、在线行为社会背景分析及极化机制量化提供了重要参考。

Our methodology is broadly applicable to the study of online interaction, and our findings have implications for the design of online platforms, understanding the social contexts of online behaviour, and quantifying the dynamics and mechanisms of online polarization. 人们对互联网将世界团结在一起的潜力的乐观态度因对其在煽动“文化战争”方面所扮演的角色的担忧而受到影响。通过大规模选择志同道合的群体，网络社会可能会变得更加碎片化和两极分化，特别是在党派差异方面。然而，我们衡量在线社区的社会构成并进而了解在线平台的社会组织的能力受到数字讨论的匿名、非结构化和大规模性质的限制。我们开发了一种神经嵌入方法，通过利用大规模的聚合行为模式来量化在线社区在社会维度上的定位。将我们的方法应用于 14 年来 10K 个社区中的 5.1B Reddit 评论，我们衡量了宏观社区结构在年龄、性别和美国政治党派方面的组织方式。审视政治内容，我们发现 Reddit 在 2016 年美国总统大选前后经历了一次重大的两极分化事件，并且在之后的几年里仍然保持高度两极分化。然而，与传统观点相反，个人层面的两极分化很少见。 2016 年系统层面的转变在很大程度上是由新政治用户的到来推动的。 Reddit 上的政治极化与平台上之前的活动无关，而是在时间上与外部事件保持一致。我们还观察到意识形态上的明显不对称，2016 年的急剧增长完全归因于右翼活动的变化。我们的方法广泛适用于在线互动的研究，我们的研究结果对在线平台的设计、理解在线行为的社会背景以及量化在线两极分化的动态和机制具有影响。 本文开发了一种神经嵌入方法，用于量化在线社区的社会结构和政治极化现象，通过分析Reddit平台14年间51亿条评论数据，揭示了2016年美国大选后的极化趋势及其驱动因素。 Isaac Waller,Ashton Anderson cs.SI,cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.LG

authors_text: Abdullah Sarhan,Ali Al-KhazÁly,Adam Gorner,Andrew Swift,Jon Rokne,Reda Alhajj,Andrew Crichton
title: Utilizing Transfer Learning and a Customized Loss Function for Optic Disc Segmentation from Retinal Images
title_zh: 利用迁移学习和定制损失函数从视网膜图像中进行视盘分割
abstract: Accurate segmentation of the optic disc from a retinal image is vital to extracting retinal features that may be highly correlated with retinal conditions such as glaucoma. In this paper, we propose a deep-learning based approach capable of segmenting the optic disc given a high-precision retinal fundus image. Our approach utilizes a UNET-based model with a VGG16 encoder trained on the ImageNet dataset. This study can be distinguished from other studies in the customization made for the VGG16 model, the diversity of the datasets adopted, the duration of disc segmentation, the loss function utilized, and the number of parameters required to train our model. Our approach was tested on seven publicly available datasets augmented by a dataset from a private clinic that was annotated by two Doctors of Optometry through a web portal built for this purpose. We achieved an accuracy of 99.78\% and a Dice coefficient of 94.73\% for a disc segmentation from a retinal image in 0.03 seconds. The results obtained from comprehensive experiments demonstrate the robustness of our approach to disc segmentation of retinal images obtained from different sources.
summary: Accurate segmentation of the optic disc from a retinal image is vital to extracting retinal features that may be highly correlated with retinal conditions such as glaucoma. In this paper, we propose a deep-learning based approach capable of segmenting the optic disc given a high-precision retinal fundus image. Our approach utilizes a UNET-based model with a VGG16 encoder trained on the ImageNet dataset. This study can be distinguished from other studies in the customization made for the VGG16 model, the diversity of the datasets adopted, the duration of disc segmentation, the loss function utilized, and the number of parameters required to train our model. Our approach was tested on seven publicly available datasets augmented by a dataset from a private clinic that was annotated by two Doctors of Optometry through a web portal built for this purpose. We achieved an accuracy of 99.78\% and a Dice coefficient of 94.73\% for a disc segmentation from a retinal image in 0.03 seconds. The results obtained from comprehensive experiments demonstrate the robustness of our approach to disc segmentation of retinal images obtained from different sources.
abstract_zh: 从视网膜图像中准确分割视盘对于提取可能与青光眼等视网膜状况高度相关的视网膜特征至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的方法，能够在给定高精度视网膜眼底图像的情况下分割视盘。我们的方法利用基于 UNET 的模型，以及在 ImageNet 数据集上训练的 VGG16 编码器。这项研究与其他研究的区别在于 VGG16 模型的定制、采用的数据集的多样性、光盘分割的持续时间、使用的损失函数以及训练模型所需的参数数量。我们的方法在七个公开可用的数据集上进行了测试，这些数据集由一家私人诊所的数据集进行了扩充，该数据集由两名验光医生通过为此目的构建的门户网站进行了注释。我们在 0.03 秒内对视网膜图像进行圆盘分割，准确率达到 99.78%，Dice 系数达到 94.73%。从综合实验中获得的结果证明了我们对从不同来源获得的视网膜图像进行圆盘分割的方法的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的视盘分割方法，结合迁移学习和定制损失函数，以提高视网膜图像中视盘分割的准确性和效率。
AI.motivation: 视盘分割对检测青光眼等视网膜疾病至关重要，但现有方法在处理不同来源数据时存在准确性不足、分割速度慢等问题，需改进模型适应性与效率。
AI.method: 采用基于UNET的架构，结合VGG16编码器（迁移学习）及定制损失函数，利用七个公开数据集与私人诊所标注数据进行训练与验证。
AI.result: 在视盘分割任务中达到99.78%的准确率和94.73%的Dice系数，单张图像分割仅需0.03秒，验证了模型的高效性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过迁移学习与定制损失函数优化，在多样化数据集上表现优异，可有效应用于不同来源的视网膜图像分割任务。

title: Emergent Social Learning via Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过多主体强化学习进行紧急社交学习
comment: 14 pages, 19 figures. To be published in ICML 2021
comments: 14 pages, 19 figures. To be published in ICML 2021
abstract: Social learning is a key component of human and animal intelligence. By taking cues from the behavior of experts in their environment, social learners can acquire sophisticated behavior and rapidly adapt to new circumstances. This paper investigates whether independent reinforcement learning (RL) agents in a multi-agent environment can learn to use social learning to improve their performance. We find that in most circumstances, vanilla model-free RL agents do not use social learning. We analyze the reasons for this deficiency, and show that by imposing constraints on the training environment and introducing a model-based auxiliary loss we are able to obtain generalized social learning policies which enable agents to: i) discover complex skills that are not learned from single-agent training, and ii) adapt online to novel environments by taking cues from experts present in the new environment. In contrast, agents trained with model-free RL or imitation learning generalize poorly and do not succeed in the transfer tasks. By mixing multi-agent and solo training, we can obtain agents that use social learning to gain skills that they can deploy when alone, even out-performing agents trained alone from the start.
summary: Social learning is a key component of human and animal intelligence. By taking cues from the behavior of experts in their environment, social learners can acquire sophisticated behavior and rapidly adapt to new circumstances. This paper investigates whether independent reinforcement learning (RL) agents in a multi-agent environment can learn to use social learning to improve their performance. We find that in most circumstances, vanilla model-free RL agents do not use social learning. We analyze the reasons for this deficiency, and show that by imposing constraints on the training environment and introducing a model-based auxiliary loss we are able to obtain generalized social learning policies which enable agents to: i) discover complex skills that are not learned from single-agent training, and ii) adapt online to novel environments by taking cues from experts present in the new environment. In contrast, agents trained with model-free RL or imitation learning generalize poorly and do not succeed in the transfer tasks. By mixing multi-agent and solo training, we can obtain agents that use social learning to gain skills that they can deploy when alone, even out-performing agents trained alone from the start.
abstract_zh: 社会学习是人类和动物智力的关键组成部分。通过从环境中专家的行为中获取线索，社交学习者可以获得复杂的行为并快速适应新环境。本文研究了多智能体环境中的独立强化学习（RL）智能体是否可以学会使用社交学习来提高其表现。我们发现，在大多数情况下，普通的无模型强化学习代理不使用社交学习。我们分析了这种缺陷的原因，并表明，通过对训练环境施加约束并引入基于模型的辅助损失，我们能够获得广义的社会学习策略，使智能体能够：i）发现单智能体训练中无法学到的复杂技能，ii）通过从新环境中的专家那里获取线索来在线适应新环境。相比之下，使用无模型强化学习或模仿学习训练的智能体泛化能力较差，无法成功完成迁移任务。通过混合多智能体和单独训练，我们可以获得使用社交学习来获得可以在单独使用时部署的技能的智能体，甚至比从一开始就单独训练的智能体表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多智能体强化学习中社会学习的可行性，提出通过环境约束和模型辅助损失使智能体通过观察专家行为提升性能。
AI.motivation: 社会学习是生物智能的核心能力，但传统强化学习代理难以自发实现，需探索有效机制促进社会学习行为。
AI.method: 通过限制训练环境并引入模型预测辅助损失函数，结合多智能体协作与单智能体训练模式，引导代理学习社会学习策略。
AI.result: 成功使智能体掌握单智能体无法学习的复杂技能，并在新环境中通过专家示范实现快速适应，显著优于传统RL和模仿学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 社会学习可通过结构化训练环境与混合训练模式在多智能体系统中实现，为通用人工智能发展提供新思路。

title: Understanding Self-supervised Learning with Dual Deep Networks
title_zh: 了解双深度网络的自监督学习
abstract: We propose a novel theoretical framework to understand contrastive self-supervised learning (SSL) methods that employ dual pairs of deep ReLU networks (e.g., SimCLR). First, we prove that in each SGD update of SimCLR with various loss functions, including simple contrastive loss, soft Triplet loss and InfoNCE loss, the weights at each layer are updated by a \emph{covariance operator} that specifically amplifies initial random selectivities that vary across data samples but survive averages over data augmentations. To further study what role the covariance operator plays and which features are learned in such a process, we model data generation and augmentation processes through a \emph{hierarchical latent tree model} (HLTM) and prove that the hidden neurons of deep ReLU networks can learn the latent variables in HLTM, despite the fact that the network receives \emph{no direct supervision} from these unobserved latent variables. This leads to a provable emergence of hierarchical features through the amplification of initially random selectivities through contrastive SSL. Extensive numerical studies justify our theoretical findings. Code is released in https://github.com/facebookresearch/luckmatters/tree/master/ssl.
summary: We propose a novel theoretical framework to understand contrastive self-supervised learning (SSL) methods that employ dual pairs of deep ReLU networks (e.g., SimCLR). First, we prove that in each SGD update of SimCLR with various loss functions, including simple contrastive loss, soft Triplet loss and InfoNCE loss, the weights at each layer are updated by a \emph{covariance operator} that specifically amplifies initial random selectivities that vary across data samples but survive averages over data augmentations. To further study what role the covariance operator plays and which features are learned in such a process, we model data generation and augmentation processes through a \emph{hierarchical latent tree model} (HLTM) and prove that the hidden neurons of deep ReLU networks can learn the latent variables in HLTM, despite the fact that the network receives \emph{no direct supervision} from these unobserved latent variables. This leads to a provable emergence of hierarchical features through the amplification of initially random selectivities through contrastive SSL. Extensive numerical studies justify our theoretical findings. Code is released in https://github.com/facebookresearch/luckmatters/tree/master/ssl.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的理论框架来理解采用双对深度 ReLU 网络（例如 SimCLR）的对比自监督学习（SSL）方法。首先，我们证明，在具有各种损失函数（包括简单对比损失、软三重损失和 InfoNCE 损失）的 SimCLR 的每次 SGD 更新中，每一层的权重均由 emph{协方差算子} 更新，该算子专门放大了初始随机选择性，该随机选择性在数据样本之间变化，但在数据增强时仍能保持平均值。为了进一步研究协方差算子在这个过程中扮演什么角色以及学习哪些特征，我们通过\emph{分层潜在树模型}（HLTM）对数据生成和增强过程进行建模，并证明深度ReLU网络的隐藏神经元可以学习HLTM中的潜在变量，尽管事实上网络从这些未观察到的潜在变量接收\emph{没有直接监督}。这通过对比 SSL 放大最初的随机选择性，导致了可证明的分层特征的出现。广泛的数值研究证明了我们的理论发现。代码发布于 https://github.com/facebookresearch/luckmatters/tree/master/ssl。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个理论框架，解释对比自监督学习（SSL）中双深度网络如何通过协方差算子放大初始随机选择性，从而学习分层特征。
AI.motivation: 现有对比SSL方法（如SimCLR）缺乏对特征学习机制的理论解释，尤其需要理解网络如何在无监督下学习到有意义的潜在变量。
AI.method: 通过分析SimCLR的SGD更新过程，证明权重更新由协方差算子驱动；构建分层潜在树模型（HLTM）模拟数据生成与增强过程，证明深层ReLU网络可无监督学习潜在变量。
AI.result: 理论证明协方差算子会放大初始随机选择性，导致分层特征的产生；实验验证了理论结论，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 对比SSL通过放大初始随机选择性实现分层特征学习，该机制在无监督条件下可有效捕捉潜在变量，理论与实验均支持这一结论。

authors_text: Hanjiang Hu,Zhijian Qiao,Ming Cheng,Zhe Liu,Hesheng Wang
title: DASGIL: Domain Adaptation for Semantic and Geometric-aware Image-based Localization
title_zh: DASGIL：基于语义和几何感知图像的本地化的域适应
abstract: Long-Term visual localization under changing environments is a challenging problem in autonomous driving and mobile robotics due to season, illumination variance, etc. Image retrieval for localization is an efficient and effective solution to the problem. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-task architecture to fuse the geometric and semantic information into the multi-scale latent embedding representation for visual place recognition. To use the high-quality ground truths without any human effort, the effective multi-scale feature discriminator is proposed for adversarial training to achieve the domain adaptation from synthetic virtual KITTI dataset to real-world KITTI dataset. The proposed approach is validated on the Extended CMU-Seasons dataset and Oxford RobotCar dataset through a series of crucial comparison experiments, where our performance outperforms state-of-the-art baselines for retrieval-based localization and large-scale place recognition under the challenging environment.
summary: Long-Term visual localization under changing environments is a challenging problem in autonomous driving and mobile robotics due to season, illumination variance, etc. Image retrieval for localization is an efficient and effective solution to the problem. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-task architecture to fuse the geometric and semantic information into the multi-scale latent embedding representation for visual place recognition. To use the high-quality ground truths without any human effort, the effective multi-scale feature discriminator is proposed for adversarial training to achieve the domain adaptation from synthetic virtual KITTI dataset to real-world KITTI dataset. The proposed approach is validated on the Extended CMU-Seasons dataset and Oxford RobotCar dataset through a series of crucial comparison experiments, where our performance outperforms state-of-the-art baselines for retrieval-based localization and large-scale place recognition under the challenging environment.
abstract_zh: 由于季节、光照变化等原因，变化环境下的长期视觉定位是自动驾驶和移动机器人领域的一个具有挑战性的问题。用于定位的图像检索是该问题的高效且有效的解决方案。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的多任务架构，将几何和语义信息融合到多尺度潜在嵌入表示中，以进行视觉地点识别。为了在不需要任何人类努力的情况下使用高质量的地面事实，提出了有效的多尺度特征鉴别器用于对抗训练，以实现从合成虚拟 KITTI 数据集到真实世界 KITTI 数据集的域适应。通过一系列关键的比较实验，所提出的方法在扩展的 CMU-Seasons 数据集和 Oxford RobotCar 数据集上得到了验证，在具有挑战性的环境下，我们的性能优于基于检索的定位和大规模地点识别的最新基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DASGIL方法，通过融合几何与语义信息的多尺度嵌入表示，解决视觉定位在环境变化下的域适应问题。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶和移动机器人在季节变化、光照差异等长期视觉定位任务中面临挑战，现有方法难以有效利用合成数据提升真实场景定位性能。
AI.method: 设计多任务架构融合几何语义信息，提出多尺度特征判别器通过对抗训练实现从合成KITTI到真实KITTI的域适应，并在多数据集验证效果。
AI.result: 在Extended CMU-Seasons和Oxford RobotCar数据集上，DASGIL在检索定位和大规模场景识别任务中优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过域适应有效提升视觉定位鲁棒性，为复杂环境下的自动驾驶和机器人应用提供可靠解决方案。

title: Understanding tables with intermediate pre-training
title_zh: 通过中级预训练理解表格
abstract: Table entailment, the binary classification task of finding if a sentence is supported or refuted by the content of a table, requires parsing language and table structure as well as numerical and discrete reasoning. While there is extensive work on textual entailment, table entailment is less well studied. We adapt TAPAS (Herzig et al., 2020), a table-based BERT model, to recognize entailment. Motivated by the benefits of data augmentation, we create a balanced dataset of millions of automatically created training examples which are learned in an intermediate step prior to fine-tuning. This new data is not only useful for table entailment, but also for SQA (Iyyer et al., 2017), a sequential table QA task. To be able to use long examples as input of BERT models, we evaluate table pruning techniques as a pre-processing step to drastically improve the training and prediction efficiency at a moderate drop in accuracy. The different methods set the new state-of-the-art on the TabFact (Chen et al., 2020) and SQA datasets.
summary: Table entailment, the binary classification task of finding if a sentence is supported or refuted by the content of a table, requires parsing language and table structure as well as numerical and discrete reasoning. While there is extensive work on textual entailment, table entailment is less well studied. We adapt TAPAS (Herzig et al., 2020), a table-based BERT model, to recognize entailment. Motivated by the benefits of data augmentation, we create a balanced dataset of millions of automatically created training examples which are learned in an intermediate step prior to fine-tuning. This new data is not only useful for table entailment, but also for SQA (Iyyer et al., 2017), a sequential table QA task. To be able to use long examples as input of BERT models, we evaluate table pruning techniques as a pre-processing step to drastically improve the training and prediction efficiency at a moderate drop in accuracy. The different methods set the new state-of-the-art on the TabFact (Chen et al., 2020) and SQA datasets.
abstract_zh: 表蕴涵是一种二元分类任务，用于查找表的内容是否支持或反驳一个句子，需要解析语言和表结构以及数值和离散推理。虽然文本蕴涵有大量的工作，但表格蕴涵的研究却较少。我们采用基于表格的 BERT 模型 TAPAS（Herzig et al., 2020）来识别蕴涵。受数据增强优势的推动，我们创建了一个包含数百万个自动创建的训练示例的平衡数据集，这些训练示例是在微调之前的中间步骤中学习的。这些新数据不仅对于表蕴含有用，而且对于 SQA（Iyyer 等人，2017）（一项顺序表 QA 任务）有用。为了能够使用长示例作为 BERT 模型的输入，我们将表剪枝技术作为预处理步骤进行评估，以在准确度适度下降的情况下大幅提高训练和预测效率。不同的方法在 TabFact（Chen 等人，2020）和 SQA 数据集上设置了新的最先进技术。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过中间预训练方法提升表格蕴含任务的性能，即判断句子是否被表格内容支持或反驳。
AI.motivation: 表格蕴含任务研究不足，且现有数据可能不平衡，通过数据增强生成更多训练样本可提升模型效果并扩展至其他任务如SQA。
AI.method: 基于TAPAS模型，采用中间预训练生成平衡数据集，并引入表格修剪技术优化BERT输入长度以提高效率。
AI.result: 在TabFact和SQA数据集上达到新状态-of-the-art效果，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 中间预训练与数据增强结合能显著提升表格理解任务性能，同时表格修剪技术平衡了效率与准确率。

search_text: Understanding tables with intermediate pre-training 通过中级预训练理解表格 Table entailment, the binary classification task of finding if a sentence is supported or refuted by the content of a table, requires parsing language and table structure as well as numerical and discrete reasoning. While there is extensive work on textual entailment, table entailment is less well studied. We adapt TAPAS (Herzig et al., 2020), a table-based BERT model, to recognize entailment. Motivated by the benefits of data augmentation, we create a balanced dataset of millions of automatically created training examples which are learned in an intermediate step prior to fine-tuning. This new data is not only useful for table entailment, but also for SQA (Iyyer et al., 2017), a sequential table QA task. To be able to use long examples as input of BERT models, we evaluate table pruning techniques as a pre-processing step to drastically improve the training and prediction efficiency at a moderate drop in accuracy. The different methods set the new state-of-the-art on the TabFact (Chen et al., 2020) and SQA datasets. 表蕴涵是一种二元分类任务，用于查找表的内容是否支持或反驳一个句子，需要解析语言和表结构以及数值和离散推理。虽然文本蕴涵有大量的工作，但表格蕴涵的研究却较少。我们采用基于表格的 BERT 模型 TAPAS（Herzig et al., 2020）来识别蕴涵。受数据增强优势的推动，我们创建了一个包含数百万个自动创建的训练示例的平衡数据集，这些训练示例是在微调之前的中间步骤中学习的。这些新数据不仅对于表蕴含有用，而且对于 SQA（Iyyer 等人，2017）（一项顺序表 QA 任务）有用。为了能够使用长示例作为 BERT 模型的输入，我们将表剪枝技术作为预处理步骤进行评估，以在准确度适度下降的情况下大幅提高训练和预测效率。不同的方法在 TabFact（Chen 等人，2020）和 SQA 数据集上设置了新的最先进技术。 本文研究如何通过中间预训练方法提升表格蕴含任务的性能，即判断句子是否被表格内容支持或反驳。 Julian Martin Eisenschlos,Syrine Krichene,Thomas Müller cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.IR,cs.LG

title: Deep learning for time series classification
title_zh: 时间序列分类的深度学习
abstract: Time series analysis is a field of data science which is interested in analyzing sequences of numerical values ordered in time. Time series are particularly interesting because they allow us to visualize and understand the evolution of a process over time. Their analysis can reveal trends, relationships and similarities across the data. There exists numerous fields containing data in the form of time series: health care (electrocardiogram, blood sugar, etc.), activity recognition, remote sensing, finance (stock market price), industry (sensors), etc. Time series classification consists of constructing algorithms dedicated to automatically label time series data. The sequential aspect of time series data requires the development of algorithms that are able to harness this temporal property, thus making the existing off-the-shelf machine learning models for traditional tabular data suboptimal for solving the underlying task. In this context, deep learning has emerged in recent years as one of the most effective methods for tackling the supervised classification task, particularly in the field of computer vision. The main objective of this thesis was to study and develop deep neural networks specifically constructed for the classification of time series data. We thus carried out the first large scale experimental study allowing us to compare the existing deep methods and to position them compared other non-deep learning based state-of-the-art methods. Subsequently, we made numerous contributions in this area, notably in the context of transfer learning, data augmentation, ensembling and adversarial attacks. Finally, we have also proposed a novel architecture, based on the famous Inception network (Google), which ranks among the most efficient to date.

abstract_zh: 时间序列分析是数据科学的一个领域，它感兴趣的是分析按时间排序的数值序列。时间序列特别有趣，因为它们使我们能够可视化并理解过程随时间的演变。他们的分析可以揭示数据的趋势、关系和相似性。包含时间序列形式数据的领域有很多：医疗保健（心电图、血糖等）、活动识别、遥感、金融（股票市场价格）、工业（传感器）等。时间序列分类包括构建专用于自动标记时间序列数据的算法。时间序列数据的顺序方面需要开发能够利用这种时间属性的算法，从而使得传统表格数据的现有现成机器学习模型对于解决基础任务来说不是最佳的。在这种背景下，深度学习近年来成为解决监督分类任务最有效的方法之一，特别是在计算机视觉领域。本论文的主要目的是研究和开发专门为时间序列数据分类而构建的深度神经网络。因此，我们进行了第一个大规模实验研究，使我们能够比较现有的深度方法，并将它们与其他基于非深度学习的最先进方法进行比较。随后，我们在这一领域做出了许多贡献，特别是在迁移学习、数据增强、集成和对抗性攻击方面。最后，我们还提出了一种基于著名的 Inception 网络（Google）的新颖架构，该架构是迄今为止最高效的架构之一。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究并开发了针对时间序列分类任务的深度神经网络方法。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习模型难以有效处理时间序列数据的时序特性，而深度学习在计算机视觉等领域表现出色，因此需要探索其在时间序列分类中的应用。
AI.method: 通过大规模实验比较现有深度学习方法与非深度学习方法，同时在迁移学习、数据增强、集成学习和对抗攻击等领域提出改进，并设计基于Inception网络的新架构。
AI.result: 实验表明深度学习方法在时间序列分类中优于传统方法，提出的Inception衍生架构在效率上达到当前最优水平。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习是时间序列分类的有效手段，未来需进一步优化模型架构与训练策略以提升性能。

title: ISAAQ -- Mastering Textbook Questions with Pre-trained Transformers and Bottom-Up and Top-Down Attention
title_zh: ISAAQ——利用预先训练的 Transformers 以及自下而上和自上而下的注意力来掌握教科书问题
comment: Accepted for publication as a long paper in EMNLP2020
comments: Accepted for publication as a long paper in EMNLP2020
abstract: Textbook Question Answering is a complex task in the intersection of Machine Comprehension and Visual Question Answering that requires reasoning with multimodal information from text and diagrams. For the first time, this paper taps on the potential of transformer language models and bottom-up and top-down attention to tackle the language and visual understanding challenges this task entails. Rather than training a language-visual transformer from scratch we rely on pre-trained transformers, fine-tuning and ensembling. We add bottom-up and top-down attention to identify regions of interest corresponding to diagram constituents and their relationships, improving the selection of relevant visual information for each question and answer options. Our system ISAAQ reports unprecedented success in all TQA question types, with accuracies of 81.36%, 71.11% and 55.12% on true/false, text-only and diagram multiple choice questions. ISAAQ also demonstrates its broad applicability, obtaining state-of-the-art results in other demanding datasets.
summary: Textbook Question Answering is a complex task in the intersection of Machine Comprehension and Visual Question Answering that requires reasoning with multimodal information from text and diagrams. For the first time, this paper taps on the potential of transformer language models and bottom-up and top-down attention to tackle the language and visual understanding challenges this task entails. Rather than training a language-visual transformer from scratch we rely on pre-trained transformers, fine-tuning and ensembling. We add bottom-up and top-down attention to identify regions of interest corresponding to diagram constituents and their relationships, improving the selection of relevant visual information for each question and answer options. Our system ISAAQ reports unprecedented success in all TQA question types, with accuracies of 81.36%, 71.11% and 55.12% on true/false, text-only and diagram multiple choice questions. ISAAQ also demonstrates its broad applicability, obtaining state-of-the-art results in other demanding datasets.
abstract_zh: 教科书问答是机器理解和视觉问答交叉领域的一项复杂任务，需要利用文本和图表中的多模态信息进行推理。本文首次利用 Transformer 语言模型的潜力以及自下而上和自上而下的注意力来解决这项任务所带来的语言和视觉理解挑战。我们不是从头开始训练语言视觉转换器，而是依赖于预先训练的转换器、微调和集成。我们添加自下而上和自上而下的注意力来识别与图表成分及其关系相对应的感兴趣区域，从而改进每个问题和答案选项的相关视觉信息的选择。我们的系统 ISAAQ 在所有 TQA 问题类型中都取得了前所未有的成功，在真/假、纯文本和图表多项选择问题上的准确率分别为 81.36%、71.11% 和 55.12%。 ISAAQ 还展示了其广泛的适用性，在其他要求严格的数据集中获得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ISAAQ系统，利用预训练Transformer和上下文注意力机制解决教科书问题回答任务中的多模态信息处理难题。
AI.motivation: 教科书问答需要同时处理文本和图表信息，传统方法难以有效融合多模态数据，需探索更高效的视觉语言联合建模方式。
AI.method: 基于预训练Transformer进行微调与集成，结合自下而上和自上而下的注意力机制定位图表关键区域及其关系，增强视觉信息选择能力。
AI.result: 在TQA数据集上达到81.36%（真伪题）、71.11%（纯文本题）和55.12%（图表选择题）的准确率，并在其他数据集取得SOTA结果。
AI.conclusion: 预训练模型与注意力机制的结合有效提升了多模态教科书问答性能，验证了该方法在复杂视觉语言任务中的广泛适用性。

We add bottom-up and top-down attention to identify regions of interest corresponding to diagram constituents and their relationships, improving the selection of relevant visual information for each question and answer options. Our system ISAAQ reports unprecedented success in all TQA question types, with accuracies of 81.36%, 71.11% and 55.12% on true/false, text-only and diagram multiple choice questions. ISAAQ also demonstrates its broad applicability, obtaining state-of-the-art results in other demanding datasets. 教科书问答是机器理解和视觉问答交叉领域的一项复杂任务，需要利用文本和图表中的多模态信息进行推理。本文首次利用 Transformer 语言模型的潜力以及自下而上和自上而下的注意力来解决这项任务所带来的语言和视觉理解挑战。我们不是从头开始训练语言视觉转换器，而是依赖于预先训练的转换器、微调和集成。我们添加自下而上和自上而下的注意力来识别与图表成分及其关系相对应的感兴趣区域，从而改进每个问题和答案选项的相关视觉信息的选择。我们的系统 ISAAQ 在所有 TQA 问题类型中都取得了前所未有的成功，在真/假、纯文本和图表多项选择问题上的准确率分别为 81.36%、71.11% 和 55.12%。 ISAAQ 还展示了其广泛的适用性，在其他要求严格的数据集中获得了最先进的结果。 本文提出ISAAQ系统，利用预训练Transformer和上下文注意力机制解决教科书问题回答任务中的多模态信息处理难题。 Jose Manuel Gomez-Perez,Raul Ortega cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Jiaman Li,Zhengfei Kuang,Yajie Zhao,Mingming He,Karl Bladin,Hao Li
title: Dynamic Facial Asset and Rig Generation from a Single Scan
title_zh: 通过单次扫描生成动态面部资产和装备
abstract: The creation of high-fidelity computer-generated (CG) characters used in film and gaming requires intensive manual labor and a comprehensive set of facial assets to be captured with complex hardware, resulting in high cost and long production cycles. In order to simplify and accelerate this digitization process, we propose a framework for the automatic generation of high-quality dynamic facial assets, including rigs which can be readily deployed for artists to polish. Our framework takes a single scan as input to generate a set of personalized blendshapes, dynamic and physically-based textures, as well as secondary facial components (e.g., teeth and eyeballs). Built upon a facial database consisting of pore-level details, with over $4,000$ scans of varying expressions and identities, we adopt a self-supervised neural network to learn personalized blendshapes from a set of template expressions. We also model the joint distribution between identities and expressions, enabling the inference of the full set of personalized blendshapes with dynamic appearances from a single neutral input scan. Our generated personalized face rig assets are seamlessly compatible with cutting-edge industry pipelines for facial animation and rendering. We demonstrate that our framework is robust and effective by inferring on a wide range of novel subjects, and illustrate compelling rendering results while animating faces with generated customized physically-based dynamic textures.
summary: The creation of high-fidelity computer-generated (CG) characters used in film and gaming requires intensive manual labor and a comprehensive set of facial assets to be captured with complex hardware, resulting in high cost and long production cycles. In order to simplify and accelerate this digitization process, we propose a framework for the automatic generation of high-quality dynamic facial assets, including rigs which can be readily deployed for artists to polish. Our framework takes a single scan as input to generate a set of personalized blendshapes, dynamic and physically-based textures, as well as secondary facial components (e.g., teeth and eyeballs). Built upon a facial database consisting of pore-level details, with over $4,000$ scans of varying expressions and identities, we adopt a self-supervised neural network to learn personalized blendshapes from a set of template expressions. We also model the joint distribution between identities and expressions, enabling the inference of the full set of personalized blendshapes with dynamic appearances from a single neutral input scan. Our generated personalized face rig assets are seamlessly compatible with cutting-edge industry pipelines for facial animation and rendering. We demonstrate that our framework is robust and effective by inferring on a wide range of novel subjects, and illustrate compelling rendering results while animating faces with generated customized physically-based dynamic textures.
abstract_zh: 电影和游戏中使用的高保真计算机生成 (CG) 角色的创建需要大量的体力劳动，并且需要使用复杂的硬件捕获全面的面部资产，从而导致成本高昂和生产周期长。为了简化和加速这个数字化过程，我们提出了一个自动生成高质量动态面部资产的框架，包括可以轻松部署供艺术家进行抛光的装备。我们的框架采用单次扫描作为输入，生成一组个性化的混合形状、动态和基于物理的纹理，以及辅助面部组件（例如牙齿和眼球）。我们以包含毛孔级细节的面部数据库为基础，对不同表情和身份进行了超过 4,000 美元的扫描，采用自我监督的神经网络从一组模板表情中学习个性化的混合形状。我们还对身份和表情之间的联合分布进行建模，从而能够从单个中性输入扫描中推断出具有动态外观的全套个性化混合形状。我们生成的个性化面部装备资产与面部动画和渲染的尖端行业管道无缝兼容。我们通过推断各种新颖的主题来证明我们的框架是强大和有效的，并说明了引人注目的渲染结果，同时使用生成的定制的基于物理的动态纹理对面部进行动画处理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从单次扫描自动生成高质量动态面部资产和骨骼的框架，包括个性化融合形状、动态纹理及次级面部组件。
AI.motivation: 传统高保真CG角色创建依赖昂贵硬件和大量人工，耗时且成本高，需简化数字化流程。
AI.method: 基于包含4000+扫描的面部数据库，采用自监督神经网络学习个性化融合形状，并建模身份与表情的联合分布，从单次中性扫描推断完整面部资产。
AI.result: 生成的面部骨骼资产兼容行业动画与渲染流程，可处理多样新主体，呈现逼真动态纹理动画效果。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效实现了面部资产自动化生成，显著降低制作成本与周期，具备行业应用潜力。

authors_text: Imani N. Sherman,Elissa M. Redmiles,Jack W. Stokes
title: Designing Indicators to Combat Fake Media
title_zh: 设计打击虚假媒体的指标
abstract: The growth of misinformation technology necessitates the need to identify fake videos. One approach to preventing the consumption of these fake videos is provenance which allows the user to authenticate media content to its original source. This research designs and investigates the use of provenance indicators to help users identify fake videos. We first interview users regarding their experiences with different misinformation modes (text, image, video) to guide the design of indicators within users' existing perspectives. Then, we conduct a participatory design study to develop and design fake video indicators. Finally, we evaluate participant-designed indicators via both expert evaluations and quantitative surveys with a large group of end-users. Our results provide concrete design guidelines for the emerging issue of fake videos. Our findings also raise concerns regarding users' tendency to overgeneralize from misinformation warning messages, suggesting the need for further research on warning design in the ongoing fight against misinformation.
summary: The growth of misinformation technology necessitates the need to identify fake videos. One approach to preventing the consumption of these fake videos is provenance which allows the user to authenticate media content to its original source. This research designs and investigates the use of provenance indicators to help users identify fake videos. We first interview users regarding their experiences with different misinformation modes (text, image, video) to guide the design of indicators within users' existing perspectives. Then, we conduct a participatory design study to develop and design fake video indicators. Finally, we evaluate participant-designed indicators via both expert evaluations and quantitative surveys with a large group of end-users. Our results provide concrete design guidelines for the emerging issue of fake videos. Our findings also raise concerns regarding users' tendency to overgeneralize from misinformation warning messages, suggesting the need for further research on warning design in the ongoing fight against misinformation.
abstract_zh: 错误信息技术的发展需要识别虚假视频。防止消费这些虚假视频的一种方法是来源，它允许用户验证媒体内容的原始来源。这项研究设计并调查了来源指标的使用，以帮助用户识别虚假视频。我们首先采访用户，了解他们对不同错误信息模式（文本、图像、视频）的体验，以指导用户现有观点内的指标设计。然后，我们进行参与式设计研究来开发和设计假视频指示器。最后，我们通过专家评估和大量最终用户的定量调查来评估参与者设计的指标。我们的结果为新出现的虚假视频问题提供了具体的设计指南。我们的研究结果还引起了人们对用户对错误信息警告消息的过度概括倾向的担忧，这表明在持续打击错误信息的斗争中需要对警告设计进行进一步研究。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并研究溯源指示符以帮助用户识别虚假视频。
AI.motivation: 随着虚假信息技术的发展，需要有效手段防止用户消费虚假视频，溯源技术可验证媒体来源，但现有方案存在用户过度泛化警告信息的问题。
AI.method: 通过用户访谈了解不同虚假信息形式的认知，开展参与式设计研究开发指示符，并通过专家评估和大规模用户调查验证设计效果。
AI.result: 提出虚假视频指示符设计指南，发现用户倾向于过度泛化警告信息，需进一步研究警告设计。
AI.conclusion: 研究为虚假视频治理提供实践指导，同时揭示警告信息设计需避免用户认知偏差的改进方向。

ai_content.result: 提出虚假视频指示符设计指南，发现用户倾向于过度泛化警告信息，需进一步研究警告设计。

authors_text: Fandong Meng,Jianhao Yan,Yijin Liu,Yuan Gao,Xianfeng Zeng,Qinsong Zeng,Peng Li,Ming Chen,Jie Zhou,Sifan Liu,Hao Zhou
title: WeChat Neural Machine Translation Systems for WMT20
title_zh: 适用于 WMT20 的微信神经机器翻译系统
comment: Accepted at WMT 2020. Our Chinese to English system achieved the highest case-sensitive BLEU score among all submissions
comments: Accepted at WMT 2020. Our Chinese to English system achieved the highest case-sensitive BLEU score among all submissions
abstract: We participate in the WMT 2020 shared news translation task on Chinese to English. Our system is based on the Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017a) with effective variants and the DTMT (Meng and Zhang, 2019) architecture. In our experiments, we employ data selection, several synthetic data generation approaches (i.e., back-translation, knowledge distillation, and iterative in-domain knowledge transfer), advanced finetuning approaches and self-bleu based model ensemble. Our constrained Chinese to English system achieves 36.9 case-sensitive BLEU score, which is the highest among all submissions.
summary: We participate in the WMT 2020 shared news translation task on Chinese to English. Our system is based on the Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017a) with effective variants and the DTMT (Meng and Zhang, 2019) architecture. In our experiments, we employ data selection, several synthetic data generation approaches (i.e., back-translation, knowledge distillation, and iterative in-domain knowledge transfer), advanced finetuning approaches and self-bleu based model ensemble. Our constrained Chinese to English system achieves 36.9 case-sensitive BLEU score, which is the highest among all submissions.
abstract_zh: 我们参与WMT 2020汉译英共享新闻翻译任务。我们的系统基于具有有效变体的 Transformer（Vaswani 等人，2017a）和 DTMT（Meng 和Zhang，2019）架构。在我们的实验中，我们采用了数据选择、几种合成数据生成方法（即反向翻译、知识蒸馏和迭代领域内知识转移）、高级微调方法和基于 self-bleu 的模型集成。我们的受限汉译英系统获得了 36.9 分（区分大小写）的 BLEU 分数，这是所有提交的项目中最高的。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了WeChat在WMT2020中文到英文新闻翻译任务中的系统设计，采用Transformer和DTMT架构并结合多种优化技术。
AI.motivation: 旨在提升新闻翻译质量以满足实际应用需求，通过技术创新在国际评测中取得领先成绩。
AI.method: 基于Transformer和DTMT架构，结合数据选择、回译、知识蒸馏、迭代领域知识转移、高级微调及自适应模型集成方法。
AI.result: 受限条件下中文到英文系统达到36.9的case-sensitive BLEU分数，为所有提交系统的最高分。

search_text: WeChat Neural Machine Translation Systems for WMT20 适用于 WMT20 的微信神经机器翻译系统 We participate in the WMT 2020 shared news translation task on Chinese to English. Our system is based on the Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017a) with effective variants and the DTMT (Meng and Zhang, 2019) architecture. In our experiments, we employ data selection, several synthetic data generation approaches (i.e., back-translation, knowledge distillation, and iterative in-domain knowledge transfer), advanced finetuning approaches and self-bleu based model ensemble. Our constrained Chinese to English system achieves 36.9 case-sensitive BLEU score, which is the highest among all submissions. 我们参与WMT 2020汉译英共享新闻翻译任务。我们的系统基于具有有效变体的 Transformer（Vaswani 等人，2017a）和 DTMT（Meng 和Zhang，2019）架构。在我们的实验中，我们采用了数据选择、几种合成数据生成方法（即反向翻译、知识蒸馏和迭代领域内知识转移）、高级微调方法和基于 self-bleu 的模型集成。我们的受限汉译英系统获得了 36.9 分（区分大小写）的 BLEU 分数，这是所有提交的项目中最高的。 本文介绍了WeChat在WMT2020中文到英文新闻翻译任务中的系统设计，采用Transformer和DTMT架构并结合多种优化技术。 Fandong Meng,Jianhao Yan,Yijin Liu,Yuan Gao,Xianfeng Zeng,Qinsong Zeng,Peng Li,Ming Chen,Jie Zhou,Sifan Liu,Hao Zhou cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Zheng Gu,Chuanqi Dong,Jing Huo,Wenbin Li,Yang Gao
title: CariMe: Unpaired Caricature Generation with Multiple Exaggerations
title_zh: CariMe：不成对的漫画生成与多重夸张
abstract: Caricature generation aims to translate real photos into caricatures with artistic styles and shape exaggerations while maintaining the identity of the subject. Different from the generic image-to-image translation, drawing a caricature automatically is a more challenging task due to the existence of various spacial deformations. Previous caricature generation methods are obsessed with predicting definite image warping from a given photo while ignoring the intrinsic representation and distribution for exaggerations in caricatures. This limits their ability on diverse exaggeration generation. In this paper, we generalize the caricature generation problem from instance-level warping prediction to distribution-level deformation modeling. Based on this assumption, we present the first exploration for unpaired CARIcature generation with Multiple Exaggerations (CariMe). Technically, we propose a Multi-exaggeration Warper network to learn the distribution-level mapping from photo to facial exaggerations. This makes it possible to generate diverse and reasonable exaggerations from randomly sampled warp codes given one input photo. To better represent the facial exaggeration and produce fine-grained warping, a deformation-field-based warping method is also proposed, which helps us to capture more detailed exaggerations than other point-based warping methods. Experiments and two perceptual studies prove the superiority of our method comparing with other state-of-the-art methods, showing the improvement of our work on caricature generation.
summary: Caricature generation aims to translate real photos into caricatures with artistic styles and shape exaggerations while maintaining the identity of the subject. Different from the generic image-to-image translation, drawing a caricature automatically is a more challenging task due to the existence of various spacial deformations. Previous caricature generation methods are obsessed with predicting definite image warping from a given photo while ignoring the intrinsic representation and distribution for exaggerations in caricatures. This limits their ability on diverse exaggeration generation. In this paper, we generalize the caricature generation problem from instance-level warping prediction to distribution-level deformation modeling. Based on this assumption, we present the first exploration for unpaired CARIcature generation with Multiple Exaggerations (CariMe). Technically, we propose a Multi-exaggeration Warper network to learn the distribution-level mapping from photo to facial exaggerations. This makes it possible to generate diverse and reasonable exaggerations from randomly sampled warp codes given one input photo. To better represent the facial exaggeration and produce fine-grained warping, a deformation-field-based warping method is also proposed, which helps us to capture more detailed exaggerations than other point-based warping methods. Experiments and two perceptual studies prove the superiority of our method comparing with other state-of-the-art methods, showing the improvement of our work on caricature generation.
abstract_zh: 漫画生成旨在将真实的照片转化为具有艺术风格和形状夸张的漫画，同时保持主体的身份。与一般的图像到图像的转换不同，由于各种空间变形的存在，自动绘制漫画是一项更具挑战性的任务。以前的漫画生成方法痴迷于预测给定照片的明确图像变形，而忽略了漫画中夸张的内在表示和分布。这限制了他们产生各种夸张的能力。在本文中，我们将漫画生成问题从实例级扭曲预测推广到分布级变形建模。基于这个假设，我们首次探索了使用多重夸张（CariMe）来生成不成对的CARICature。从技术上讲，我们提出了一个多重夸张 Warper 网络来学习从照片到面部夸张的分布级别映射。这使得可以根据给定一张输入照片的随机采样的扭曲代码生成多样化且合理的夸大。为了更好地表示面部夸张并产生细粒度的扭曲，还提出了一种基于变形场的扭曲方法，这有助于我们比其他基于点的扭曲方法捕获更详细的夸张。实验和两项感知研究证明了我们的方法与其他最先进的方法相比的优越性，表明我们在漫画生成方面的工作取得了进步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CariMe方法，解决无配对数据下的多夸张漫画生成问题，通过分布级变形建模实现多样化夸张效果。
AI.motivation: 传统漫画生成方法过度关注具体图像变形预测，忽视了夸张的内在分布特性，导致无法生成多样化的夸张效果。
AI.method: 提出多夸张变形网络（Multi-exaggeration Warper）学习分布级映射，并设计基于变形场的细粒度变形方法，通过随机采样实现多样夸张生成。
AI.result: 实验和感知研究证明，CariMe在多样性与合理性上优于现有方法，能生成更细致且符合艺术风格的漫画夸张效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过分布级建模和变形场方法，本文为无配对漫画生成提供了新思路，显著提升了夸张效果的多样性和生成质量。

authors_text: Xiaoman Qi,PanPan Zhu,Yuebin Wang,Liqiang Zhang,Junhuan Peng,Mengfan Wu,Jialong Chen,Xudong Zhao,Ning Zang,P. Takis Mathiopoulos
title: MLRSNet: A Multi-label High Spatial Resolution Remote Sensing Dataset for Semantic Scene Understanding
title_zh: MLRSNet：用于语义场景理解的多标签高空间分辨率遥感数据集
abstract: To better understand scene images in the field of remote sensing, multi-label annotation of scene images is necessary. Moreover, to enhance the performance of deep learning models for dealing with semantic scene understanding tasks, it is vital to train them on large-scale annotated data. However, most existing datasets are annotated by a single label, which cannot describe the complex remote sensing images well because scene images might have multiple land cover classes. Few multi-label high spatial resolution remote sensing datasets have been developed to train deep learning models for multi-label based tasks, such as scene classification and image retrieval. To address this issue, in this paper, we construct a multi-label high spatial resolution remote sensing dataset named MLRSNet for semantic scene understanding with deep learning from the overhead perspective. It is composed of high-resolution optical satellite or aerial images. MLRSNet contains a total of 109,161 samples within 46 scene categories, and each image has at least one of 60 predefined labels. We have designed visual recognition tasks, including multi-label based image classification and image retrieval, in which a wide variety of deep learning approaches are evaluated with MLRSNet. The experimental results demonstrate that MLRSNet is a significant benchmark for future research, and it complements the current widely used datasets such as ImageNet, which fills gaps in multi-label image research. Furthermore, we will continue to expand the MLRSNet. MLRSNet and all related materials have been made publicly available at https://data.mendeley.com/datasets/7j9bv9vwsx/2 and https://github.com/cugbrs/MLRSNet.git.
summary: To better understand scene images in the field of remote sensing, multi-label annotation of scene images is necessary. Moreover, to enhance the performance of deep learning models for dealing with semantic scene understanding tasks, it is vital to train them on large-scale annotated data. However, most existing datasets are annotated by a single label, which cannot describe the complex remote sensing images well because scene images might have multiple land cover classes. Few multi-label high spatial resolution remote sensing datasets have been developed to train deep learning models for multi-label based tasks, such as scene classification and image retrieval. To address this issue, in this paper, we construct a multi-label high spatial resolution remote sensing dataset named MLRSNet for semantic scene understanding with deep learning from the overhead perspective. It is composed of high-resolution optical satellite or aerial images. MLRSNet contains a total of 109,161 samples within 46 scene categories, and each image has at least one of 60 predefined labels. We have designed visual recognition tasks, including multi-label based image classification and image retrieval, in which a wide variety of deep learning approaches are evaluated with MLRSNet. The experimental results demonstrate that MLRSNet is a significant benchmark for future research, and it complements the current widely used datasets such as ImageNet, which fills gaps in multi-label image research. Furthermore, we will continue to expand the MLRSNet. MLRSNet and all related materials have been made publicly available at https://data.mendeley.com/datasets/7j9bv9vwsx/2 and https://github.com/cugbrs/MLRSNet.git.
abstract_zh: 为了更好地理解遥感领域的场景图像，需要对场景图像进行多标签标注。此外，为了提高深度学习模型处理语义场景理解任务的性能，在大规模注释数据上对其进行训练至关重要。然而，大多数现有数据集都是由单个标签注释的，这不能很好地描述复杂的遥感图像，因为场景图像可能具有多个土地覆盖类别。很少有多标签高空间分辨率遥感数据集被开发来训练深度学习模型以执行基于多标签的任务，例如场景分类和图像检索。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们构建了一个名为 MLRSNet 的多标签高空间分辨率遥感数据集，用于从开销角度进行深度学习的语义场景理解。它由高分辨率光学卫星或航空图像组成。 MLRSNet 总共包含 46 个场景类别内的 109,161 个样本，每个图像至少具有 60 个预定义标签之一。我们设计了视觉识别任务，包括基于多标签的图像分类和图像检索，其中使用 MLRSNet 评估各种深度学习方法。实验结果表明，MLRSNet 是未来研究的重要基准，它补充了当前广泛使用的 ImageNet 等数据集，填补了多标签图像研究的空白。此外，我们将继续扩展 MLRSNet。 MLRSNet 和所有相关材料已在 https://data.mendeley.com/datasets/7j9bv9vwsx/2 和 https://github.com/cugbrs/MLRSNet.git 上公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为MLRSNet的多标签高分辨率遥感数据集，用于深度学习的语义场景理解。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感数据集多采用单标签标注，难以描述复杂场景，而多标签数据集对提升深度学习模型性能至关重要。
AI.method: 构建包含109,161张高分辨率遥感图像的多标签数据集，涵盖46个场景类别和60个预定义标签，并设计多标签图像分类和检索任务进行模型评估。
AI.result: 实验表明MLRSNet成为重要的研究基准，弥补了ImageNet等现有数据集在多标签图像研究中的不足。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集已公开共享，并将持续扩展以支持未来研究。

search_text: MLRSNet: A Multi-label High Spatial Resolution Remote Sensing Dataset for Semantic Scene Understanding MLRSNet：用于语义场景理解的多标签高空间分辨率遥感数据集 To better understand scene images in the field of remote sensing, multi-label annotation of scene images is necessary. Moreover, to enhance the performance of deep learning models for dealing with semantic scene understanding tasks, it is vital to train them on large-scale annotated data. However, most existing datasets are annotated by a single label, which cannot describe the complex remote sensing images well because scene images might have multiple land cover classes. Few multi-label high spatial resolution remote sensing datasets have been developed to train deep learning models for multi-label based tasks, such as scene classification and image retrieval. To address this issue, in this paper, we construct a multi-label high spatial resolution remote sensing dataset named MLRSNet for semantic scene understanding with deep learning from the overhead perspective. It is composed of high-resolution optical satellite or aerial images. MLRSNet contains a total of 109,161 samples within 46 scene categories, and each image has at least one of 60 predefined labels. We have designed visual recognition tasks, including multi-label based image classification and image retrieval, in which a wide variety of deep learning approaches are evaluated with MLRSNet. The experimental results demonstrate that MLRSNet is a significant benchmark for future research, and it complements the current widely used datasets such as ImageNet, which fills gaps in multi-label image research. Furthermore, we will continue to expand the MLRSNet. MLRSNet and all related materials have been made publicly available at https://data.mendeley.com/datasets/7j9bv9vwsx/2 and https://github.com/cugbrs/MLRSNet.git. 为了更好地理解遥感领域的场景图像，需要对场景图像进行多标签标注。此外，为了提高深度学习模型处理语义场景理解任务的性能，在大规模注释数据上对其进行训练至关重要。然而，大多数现有数据集都是由单个标签注释的，这不能很好地描述复杂的遥感图像，因为场景图像可能具有多个土地覆盖类别。很少有多标签高空间分辨率遥感数据集被开发来训练深度学习模型以执行基于多标签的任务，例如场景分类和图像检索。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们构建了一个名为 MLRSNet 的多标签高空间分辨率遥感数据集，用于从开销角度进行深度学习的语义场景理解。它由高分辨率光学卫星或航空图像组成。 MLRSNet 总共包含 46 个场景类别内的 109,161 个样本，每个图像至少具有 60 个预定义标签之一。我们设计了视觉识别任务，包括基于多标签的图像分类和图像检索，其中使用 MLRSNet 评估各种深度学习方法。实验结果表明，MLRSNet 是未来研究的重要基准，它补充了当前广泛使用的 ImageNet 等数据集，填补了多标签图像研究的空白。此外，我们将继续扩展 MLRSNet。 MLRSNet 和所有相关材料已在 https://data.mendeley.com/datasets/7j9bv9vwsx/2 和 https://github.com/cugbrs/MLRSNet.git 上公开发布。 本文提出一个名为MLRSNet的多标签高分辨率遥感数据集，用于深度学习的语义场景理解。 Xiaoman Qi,PanPan Zhu,Yuebin Wang,Liqiang Zhang,Junhuan Peng,Mengfan Wu,Jialong Chen,Xudong Zhao,Ning Zang,P. Takis Mathiopoulos cs.CV

title: Optimal Task Assignment to Heterogeneous Federated Learning Devices
title_zh: 异构联邦学习设备的最优任务分配
abstract: Federated Learning provides new opportunities for training machine learning models while respecting data privacy. This technique is based on heterogeneous devices that work together to iteratively train a model while never sharing their own data. Given the synchronous nature of this training, the performance of Federated Learning systems is dictated by the slowest devices, also known as stragglers. In this paper, we investigate the problem of minimizing the duration of Federated Learning rounds by controlling how much data each device uses for training. We formulate this problem as a makespan minimization problem with identical, independent, and atomic tasks that have to be assigned to heterogeneous resources with non-decreasing cost functions while respecting lower and upper limits of tasks per resource. Based on this formulation, we propose a polynomial-time algorithm named OLAR and prove that it provides optimal schedules. We evaluate OLAR in an extensive experimental evaluation using simulation that includes comparisons to other algorithms from the state of the art and new extensions to them. Our results indicate that OLAR provides optimal solutions with a small execution time. They also show that the presence of lower and upper limits of tasks per resource erase any benefits that suboptimal heuristics could provide in terms of algorithm execution time.
summary: Federated Learning provides new opportunities for training machine learning models while respecting data privacy. This technique is based on heterogeneous devices that work together to iteratively train a model while never sharing their own data. Given the synchronous nature of this training, the performance of Federated Learning systems is dictated by the slowest devices, also known as stragglers. In this paper, we investigate the problem of minimizing the duration of Federated Learning rounds by controlling how much data each device uses for training. We formulate this problem as a makespan minimization problem with identical, independent, and atomic tasks that have to be assigned to heterogeneous resources with non-decreasing cost functions while respecting lower and upper limits of tasks per resource. Based on this formulation, we propose a polynomial-time algorithm named OLAR and prove that it provides optimal schedules. We evaluate OLAR in an extensive experimental evaluation using simulation that includes comparisons to other algorithms from the state of the art and new extensions to them. Our results indicate that OLAR provides optimal solutions with a small execution time. They also show that the presence of lower and upper limits of tasks per resource erase any benefits that suboptimal heuristics could provide in terms of algorithm execution time.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习为训练机器学习模型提供了新的机会，同时尊重数据隐私。该技术基于异构设备，这些设备协同工作以迭代地训练模型，同时从不共享自己的数据。鉴于这种训练的同步性质，联邦学习系统的性能由最慢的设备（也称为落后设备）决定。在本文中，我们研究了通过控制每个设备用于训练的数据量来最小化联邦学习轮次持续时间的问题。我们将此问题表述为一个完工时间最小化问题，具有相同的、独立的和原子的任务，这些任务必须分配给具有非递减成本函数的异构资源，同时尊重每个资源的任务的下限和上限。基于这个公式，我们提出了一种名为 OLAR 的多项式时间算法，并证明它提供了最优调度。我们使用模拟在广泛的实验评估中评估 OLAR，其中包括与最先进的其他算法的比较以及对它们的新扩展。我们的结果表明 OLAR 提供了执行时间短的最佳解决方案。他们还表明，每个资源的任务下限和上限的存在消除了次优启发式在算法执行时间方面可能提供的任何好处。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过最优任务分配策略减少异构联邦学习设备中轮次训练时间的问题。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习的同步训练性能受限于最慢设备，现有方法在处理任务分配约束时存在效率与最优性矛盾。
AI.method: 将问题建模为带非递减成本函数的任务分配问题，提出多项式时间算法OLAR并证明其最优性。
AI.result: OLAR在实验中展现最优解与短执行时间，任务上下限约束使次优启发式方法失去时间优势。
AI.conclusion: OLAR在满足约束条件下实现最优任务分配，约束条件对算法性能具有决定性影响。

title: Multi-grained Semantics-aware Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 多粒度语义感知图神经网络
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are powerful techniques in representation learning for graphs and have been increasingly deployed in a multitude of different applications that involve node- and graph-wise tasks. Most existing studies solve either the node-wise task or the graph-wise task independently while they are inherently correlated. This work proposes a unified model, AdamGNN, to interactively learn node and graph representations in a mutual-optimisation manner. Compared with existing GNN models and graph pooling methods, AdamGNN enhances the node representation with the learned multi-grained semantics and avoids losing node features and graph structure information during pooling. Specifically, a differentiable pooling operator is proposed to adaptively generate a multi-grained structure that involves meso- and macro-level semantic information in the graph. We also devise the unpooling operator and the flyback aggregator in AdamGNN to better leverage the multi-grained semantics to enhance node representations. The updated node representations can further adjust the graph representation in the next iteration. Experiments on 14 real-world graph datasets show that AdamGNN can significantly outperform 17 competing models on both node- and graph-wise tasks. The ablation studies confirm the effectiveness of AdamGNN's components, and the last empirical analysis further reveals the ingenious ability of AdamGNN in capturing long-range interactions.
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are powerful techniques in representation learning for graphs and have been increasingly deployed in a multitude of different applications that involve node- and graph-wise tasks. Most existing studies solve either the node-wise task or the graph-wise task independently while they are inherently correlated. This work proposes a unified model, AdamGNN, to interactively learn node and graph representations in a mutual-optimisation manner. Compared with existing GNN models and graph pooling methods, AdamGNN enhances the node representation with the learned multi-grained semantics and avoids losing node features and graph structure information during pooling. Specifically, a differentiable pooling operator is proposed to adaptively generate a multi-grained structure that involves meso- and macro-level semantic information in the graph. We also devise the unpooling operator and the flyback aggregator in AdamGNN to better leverage the multi-grained semantics to enhance node representations. The updated node representations can further adjust the graph representation in the next iteration. Experiments on 14 real-world graph datasets show that AdamGNN can significantly outperform 17 competing models on both node- and graph-wise tasks. The ablation studies confirm the effectiveness of AdamGNN's components, and the last empirical analysis further reveals the ingenious ability of AdamGNN in capturing long-range interactions.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）是图表示学习的强大技术，并且已越来越多地部署在涉及节点和图任务的多种不同应用中。大多数现有研究要么独立解决节点任务，要么独立解决图任务，但它们本质上是相关的。这项工作提出了一个统一的模型 AdamGNN，以相互优化的方式交互式学习节点和图表示。与现有的 GNN 模型和图池化方法相比，AdamGNN 通过学习的多粒度语义增强了节点表示，并避免在池化过程中丢失节点特征和图结构信息。具体来说，提出了可微分池算子来自适应地生成涉及图中细观和宏观语义信息的多粒度结构。我们还在 AdamGNN 中设计了反池化算子和反激聚合器，以更好地利用多粒度语义来增强节点表示。更新后的节点表示可以进一步调整下一次迭代中的图表示。对 14 个真实世界图数据集的实验表明，AdamGNN 在节点和图任务上都可以显着优于 17 个竞争模型。消融研究证实了 AdamGNN 组件的有效性，最后的实证分析进一步揭示了 AdamGNN 在捕获远程交互方面的巧妙能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为AdamGNN的统一模型，通过交互式学习节点和图表示，解决节点级和图级任务的关联性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究通常独立处理节点级或图级任务，忽略了二者间的内在关联，导致信息丢失和表示能力不足。
AI.method: 设计可微分池化算子生成多粒度结构，结合反池化算子和飞回聚合器，实现节点与图表示的互优化学习。
AI.result: 在14个真实图数据集上，AdamGNN在节点级和图级任务中均显著优于17种对比模型，消融实验验证了组件有效性。
AI.conclusion: AdamGNN通过多粒度语义建模和互优化机制，有效捕捉长距离交互，为图表示学习提供了新思路。
