title: A Niching Indicator-Based Multi-modal Many-objective Optimizer
title_zh: 基于利基指标的多模态多目标优化器
comment: This is an accepted version of a paper published in Swarm and Evolutionary Computation
comments: This is an accepted version of a paper published in Swarm and Evolutionary Computation
abstract: Multi-modal multi-objective optimization is to locate (almost) equivalent Pareto optimal solutions as many as possible. Some evolutionary algorithms for multi-modal multi-objective optimization have been proposed in the literature. However, there is no efficient method for multi-modal many-objective optimization, where the number of objectives is more than three. To address this issue, this paper proposes a niching indicator-based multi-modal multi- and many-objective optimization algorithm. In the proposed method, the fitness calculation is performed among a child and its closest individuals in the solution space to maintain the diversity. The performance of the proposed method is evaluated on multi-modal multi-objective test problems with up to 15 objectives. Results show that the proposed method can handle a large number of objectives and find a good approximation of multiple equivalent Pareto optimal solutions. The results also show that the proposed method performs significantly better than eight multi-objective evolutionary algorithms.
summary: Multi-modal multi-objective optimization is to locate (almost) equivalent Pareto optimal solutions as many as possible. Some evolutionary algorithms for multi-modal multi-objective optimization have been proposed in the literature. However, there is no efficient method for multi-modal many-objective optimization, where the number of objectives is more than three. To address this issue, this paper proposes a niching indicator-based multi-modal multi- and many-objective optimization algorithm. In the proposed method, the fitness calculation is performed among a child and its closest individuals in the solution space to maintain the diversity. The performance of the proposed method is evaluated on multi-modal multi-objective test problems with up to 15 objectives. Results show that the proposed method can handle a large number of objectives and find a good approximation of multiple equivalent Pareto optimal solutions. The results also show that the proposed method performs significantly better than eight multi-objective evolutionary algorithms.
abstract_zh: 多模态多目标优化就是找到尽可能多的（几乎）等价的帕累托最优解。文献中已经提出了一些多模态多目标优化的进化算法。然而，对于目标数量超过三个的多模态多目标优化，还没有有效的方法。针对这一问题，本文提出了一种基于利基指标的多模态多目标优化算法。在所提出的方法中，在解空间中的子代及其最接近的个体之间进行适应度计算以保持多样性。该方法的性能在最多 15 个目标的多模态多目标测试问题上进行评估。结果表明，所提出的方法可以处理大量目标，并找到多个等效帕累托最优解的良好近似。结果还表明，所提出的方法的性能明显优于八种多目标进化算法。

AI.result: 该方法在最多15个目标的多模态多目标测试问题上表现优异，能有效找到多个等效帕累托最优解，且显著优于八种多目标进化算法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法有效解决了多模态多目标优化问题，尤其在处理大量目标时表现出色，优于现有方法。

search_text: A Niching Indicator-Based Multi-modal Many-objective Optimizer 基于利基指标的多模态多目标优化器 Multi-modal multi-objective optimization is to locate (almost) equivalent Pareto optimal solutions as many as possible. Some evolutionary algorithms for multi-modal multi-objective optimization have been proposed in the literature. However, there is no efficient method for multi-modal many-objective optimization, where the number of objectives is more than three. To address this issue, this paper proposes a niching indicator-based multi-modal multi- and many-objective optimization algorithm. In the proposed method, the fitness calculation is performed among a child and its closest individuals in the solution space to maintain the diversity. The performance of the proposed method is evaluated on multi-modal multi-objective test problems with up to 15 objectives. Results show that the proposed method can handle a large number of objectives and find a good approximation of multiple equivalent Pareto optimal solutions. The results also show that the proposed method performs significantly better than eight multi-objective evolutionary algorithms. 多模态多目标优化就是找到尽可能多的（几乎）等价的帕累托最优解。文献中已经提出了一些多模态多目标优化的进化算法。然而，对于目标数量超过三个的多模态多目标优化，还没有有效的方法。针对这一问题，本文提出了一种基于利基指标的多模态多目标优化算法。在所提出的方法中，在解空间中的子代及其最接近的个体之间进行适应度计算以保持多样性。该方法的性能在最多 15 个目标的多模态多目标测试问题上进行评估。结果表明，所提出的方法可以处理大量目标，并找到多个等效帕累托最优解的良好近似。结果还表明，所提出的方法的性能明显优于八种多目标进化算法。 本文提出了一种基于利基指标的多模态多目标和多目标优化算法，旨在解决多目标数量超过三个时的多模态多目标优化问题。 Ryoji Tanabe,Hisao Ishibuchi cs.NE

authors: Tycho F. A. van der Ouderaa
authors_json: Tycho F. A. van der Ouderaa
authors_text: Tycho F. A. van der Ouderaa,Ivana Išgum,Wouter B. Veldhuis,Bob D. de Vos
title: Deep Group-wise Variational Diffeomorphic Image Registration
title_zh: 深度分组变分微分同胚图像配准
abstract: Deep neural networks are increasingly used for pair-wise image registration. We propose to extend current learning-based image registration to allow simultaneous registration of multiple images. To achieve this, we build upon the pair-wise variational and diffeomorphic VoxelMorph approach and present a general mathematical framework that enables both registration of multiple images to their geodesic average and registration in which any of the available images can be used as a fixed image. In addition, we provide a likelihood based on normalized mutual information, a well-known image similarity metric in registration, between multiple images, and a prior that allows for explicit control over the viscous fluid energy to effectively regularize deformations. We trained and evaluated our approach using intra-patient registration of breast MRI and Thoracic 4DCT exams acquired over multiple time points. Comparison with Elastix and VoxelMorph demonstrates competitive quantitative performance of the proposed method in terms of image similarity and reference landmark distances at significantly faster registration.
summary: Deep neural networks are increasingly used for pair-wise image registration. We propose to extend current learning-based image registration to allow simultaneous registration of multiple images. To achieve this, we build upon the pair-wise variational and diffeomorphic VoxelMorph approach and present a general mathematical framework that enables both registration of multiple images to their geodesic average and registration in which any of the available images can be used as a fixed image. In addition, we provide a likelihood based on normalized mutual information, a well-known image similarity metric in registration, between multiple images, and a prior that allows for explicit control over the viscous fluid energy to effectively regularize deformations. We trained and evaluated our approach using intra-patient registration of breast MRI and Thoracic 4DCT exams acquired over multiple time points. Comparison with Elastix and VoxelMorph demonstrates competitive quantitative performance of the proposed method in terms of image similarity and reference landmark distances at significantly faster registration.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络越来越多地用于成对图像配准。我们建议扩展当前基于学习的图像配准，以允许同时配准多个图像。为了实现这一目标，我们建立在成对变分和微分同胚 VoxelMorph 方法的基础上，并提出了一个通用的数学框架，该框架既可以将多个图像配准到其测地线平均值，又可以将任何可用图像用作固定图像。此外，我们提供了基于归一化互信息的可能性，这是多个图像之间配准时众所周知的图像相似性度量，以及允许对粘性流体能量进行显式控制以有效规范变形的先验。我们使用在多个时间点获得的乳腺 MRI 和胸部 4DCT 检查的患者内部注册来训练和评估我们的方法。与 Elastix 和 VoxelMorph 的比较表明，该方法在图像相似性和参考地标距离方面具有竞争性的定量性能，配准速度明显加快。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于深度神经网络的多图像同时配准方法，扩展了现有的配准技术以处理多个图像的同步注册。
AI.motivation: 现有图像配准方法多针对图像对，难以高效处理多时间点或多个模态的医学影像数据，需提升多图像同步配准的准确性与效率。
AI.method: 基于VoxelMorph框架构建多图像配准数学模型，结合归一化互信息似然函数与粘性流体先验，实现多图像至测地平均值的配准及任意图像作为固定图像的灵活注册。
AI.result: 在乳腺MRI和胸部4DCT数据集上，方法在配准精度（图像相似性、标志点距离）和速度上均优于Elastix与VoxelMorph。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为医学影像多模态/多时间点配准提供了高效解决方案，其数学框架可拓展至更复杂的注册场景。

authors_text: Khaled A. Helal Kelany,Nikitas Dimopoulos,Clemens P. J. Adolphs,Bardia Barabadi,Amirali Baniasadi
title: Quantum Annealing Approaches to the Phase-Unwrapping Problem in Synthetic-Aperture Radar Imaging
title_zh: 合成孔径雷达成像中相位展开问题的量子退火方法
abstract: The focus of this work is to explore the use of quantum annealing solvers for the problem of phase unwrapping of synthetic aperture radar (SAR) images. Although solutions to this problem exist based on network programming, these techniques do not scale well to larger-sized images. Our approach involves formulating the problem as a quadratic unconstrained binary optimization (QUBO) problem, which can be solved using a quantum annealer. Given that present embodiments of quantum annealers remain limited in the number of qubits they possess, we decompose the problem into a set of subproblems that can be solved individually. These individual solutions are close to optimal up to an integer constant, with one constant per sub-image. In a second phase, these integer constants are determined as a solution to yet another QUBO problem. We test our approach with a variety of software-based QUBO solvers and on a variety of images, both synthetic and real. Additionally, we experiment using D-Wave Systems's quantum annealer, the D-Wave 2000Q. The software-based solvers obtain high-quality solutions comparable to state-of-the-art phase-unwrapping solvers. We are currently working on optimally mapping the problem onto the restricted topology of the quantum annealer to improve the quality of the solution.
summary: The focus of this work is to explore the use of quantum annealing solvers for the problem of phase unwrapping of synthetic aperture radar (SAR) images. Although solutions to this problem exist based on network programming, these techniques do not scale well to larger-sized images. Our approach involves formulating the problem as a quadratic unconstrained binary optimization (QUBO) problem, which can be solved using a quantum annealer. Given that present embodiments of quantum annealers remain limited in the number of qubits they possess, we decompose the problem into a set of subproblems that can be solved individually. These individual solutions are close to optimal up to an integer constant, with one constant per sub-image. In a second phase, these integer constants are determined as a solution to yet another QUBO problem. We test our approach with a variety of software-based QUBO solvers and on a variety of images, both synthetic and real. Additionally, we experiment using D-Wave Systems's quantum annealer, the D-Wave 2000Q. The software-based solvers obtain high-quality solutions comparable to state-of-the-art phase-unwrapping solvers. We are currently working on optimally mapping the problem onto the restricted topology of the quantum annealer to improve the quality of the solution.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的重点是探索使用量子退火求解器解决合成孔径雷达 (SAR) 图像的相位展开问题。尽管该问题的解决方案基于网络编程，但这些技术不能很好地扩展到更大尺寸的图像。我们的方法涉及将问题表述为二次无约束二元优化（QUBO）问题，可以使用量子退火器来解决。鉴于量子退火器的当前实施例在其拥有的量子位数量方面仍然有限，我们将问题分解为一组可以单独解决的子问题。这些单独的解决方案在整数常数范围内接近最佳，每个子图像一个常数。在第二阶段，确定这些整数常数作为另一个 QUBO 问题的解决方案。我们使用各种基于软件的 QUBO 求解器以及各种合成图像和真实图像来测试我们的方法。此外，我们还使用 D-Wave Systems 的量子退火机 D-Wave 2000Q 进行了实验。基于软件的求解器获得的高质量解决方案可与最先进的相位展开求解器相媲美。我们目前正在致力于将问题最佳地映射到量子退火器的受限拓扑上，以提高解决方案的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了使用量子退火求解器解决合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像中的相位解缠问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的相位解缠方法在处理大尺寸图像时扩展性较差，因此需要寻找更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 将相位解缠问题转化为二次无约束二进制优化（QUBO）问题，并利用量子退火求解器进行求解。由于量子退火求解器的量子比特数量有限，将问题分解为多个子问题，并通过另一个QUBO问题确定整数常数。
AI.result: 软件QUBO求解器能够获得高质量的解，与最先进的相位解缠求解器相当。实验还使用了D-Wave 2000Q量子退火器。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在处理相位解缠问题上表现良好，下一步将优化问题在量子退火器上的映射以提高解的质量。

search_text: Quantum Annealing Approaches to the Phase-Unwrapping Problem in Synthetic-Aperture Radar Imaging 合成孔径雷达成像中相位展开问题的量子退火方法 The focus of this work is to explore the use of quantum annealing solvers for the problem of phase unwrapping of synthetic aperture radar (SAR) images. Although solutions to this problem exist based on network programming, these techniques do not scale well to larger-sized images. Our approach involves formulating the problem as a quadratic unconstrained binary optimization (QUBO) problem, which can be solved using a quantum annealer. Given that present embodiments of quantum annealers remain limited in the number of qubits they possess, we decompose the problem into a set of subproblems that can be solved individually. These individual solutions are close to optimal up to an integer constant, with one constant per sub-image. In a second phase, these integer constants are determined as a solution to yet another QUBO problem. We test our approach with a variety of software-based QUBO solvers and on a variety of images, both synthetic and real. Additionally, we experiment using D-Wave Systems's quantum annealer, the D-Wave 2000Q. The software-based solvers obtain high-quality solutions comparable to state-of-the-art phase-unwrapping solvers. We are currently working on optimally mapping the problem onto the restricted topology of the quantum annealer to improve the quality of the solution. 这项工作的重点是探索使用量子退火求解器解决合成孔径雷达 (SAR) 图像的相位展开问题。尽管该问题的解决方案基于网络编程，但这些技术不能很好地扩展到更大尺寸的图像。我们的方法涉及将问题表述为二次无约束二元优化（QUBO）问题，可以使用量子退火器来解决。鉴于量子退火器的当前实施例在其拥有的量子位数量方面仍然有限，我们将问题分解为一组可以单独解决的子问题。这些单独的解决方案在整数常数范围内接近最佳，每个子图像一个常数。在第二阶段，确定这些整数常数作为另一个 QUBO 问题的解决方案。我们使用各种基于软件的 QUBO 求解器以及各种合成图像和真实图像来测试我们的方法。此外，我们还使用 D-Wave Systems 的量子退火机 D-Wave 2000Q 进行了实验。基于软件的求解器获得的高质量解决方案可与最先进的相位展开求解器相媲美。我们目前正在致力于将问题最佳地映射到量子退火器的受限拓扑上，以提高解决方案的质量。 本文探讨了使用量子退火求解器解决合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像中的相位解缠问题。 Khaled A. Helal Kelany,Nikitas Dimopoulos,Clemens P. J. Adolphs,Bardia Barabadi,Amirali Baniasadi cs.CV,eess.SP

title: Heteroscedastic Bayesian Optimisation for Stochastic Model Predictive Control
title_zh: 随机模型预测控制的异方差贝叶斯优化
comment: Paper to appear at the IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
comments: Paper to appear at the IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
abstract: Model predictive control (MPC) has been successful in applications involving the control of complex physical systems. This class of controllers leverages the information provided by an approximate model of the system's dynamics to simulate the effect of control actions. MPC methods also present a few hyper-parameters which may require a relatively expensive tuning process by demanding interactions with the physical system. Therefore, we investigate fine-tuning MPC methods in the context of stochastic MPC, which presents extra challenges due to the randomness of the controller's actions. In these scenarios, performance outcomes present noise, which is not homogeneous across the domain of possible hyper-parameter settings, but which varies in an input-dependent way. To address these issues, we propose a Bayesian optimisation framework that accounts for heteroscedastic noise to tune hyper-parameters in control problems. Empirical results on benchmark continuous control tasks and a physical robot support the proposed framework's suitability relative to baselines, which do not take heteroscedasticity into account.
summary: Model predictive control (MPC) has been successful in applications involving the control of complex physical systems. This class of controllers leverages the information provided by an approximate model of the system's dynamics to simulate the effect of control actions. MPC methods also present a few hyper-parameters which may require a relatively expensive tuning process by demanding interactions with the physical system. Therefore, we investigate fine-tuning MPC methods in the context of stochastic MPC, which presents extra challenges due to the randomness of the controller's actions. In these scenarios, performance outcomes present noise, which is not homogeneous across the domain of possible hyper-parameter settings, but which varies in an input-dependent way. To address these issues, we propose a Bayesian optimisation framework that accounts for heteroscedastic noise to tune hyper-parameters in control problems. Empirical results on benchmark continuous control tasks and a physical robot support the proposed framework's suitability relative to baselines, which do not take heteroscedasticity into account.
abstract_zh: 模型预测控制 (MPC) 在涉及复杂物理系统控制的应用中取得了成功。此类控制器利用系统动力学近似模型提供的信息来模拟控制动作的效果。 MPC 方法还提供了一些超参数，这些超参数可能需要与物理系统进行严格的交互，从而需要相对昂贵的调整过程。因此，我们研究了随机 MPC 背景下的微调 MPC 方法，由于控制器行为的随机性，这带来了额外的挑战。在这些场景中，性能结果会出现噪声，这些噪声在可能的超参数设置范围内并不均匀，而是以依赖于输入的方式变化。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个贝叶斯优化框架，该框架考虑异方差噪声来调整控制问题中的超参数。基准连续控制任务和物理机器人的经验结果支持所提出的框架相对于基线的适用性，而基线没有考虑异方差性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种异方差贝叶斯优化框架，用于随机模型预测控制（MPC）中的超参数调优，以解决性能结果中的非均匀噪声问题。
AI.motivation: 传统MPC超参数调优依赖昂贵的系统交互，且随机MPC中的性能噪声具有输入依赖的异方差性，现有方法未能有效处理这一问题。
AI.method: 设计了一种贝叶斯优化方法，通过建模异方差噪声特性，优化MPC的超参数，从而在存在输入依赖噪声的场景下提高调优效率。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该框架在基准控制任务和物理机器人实验中优于传统方法，验证了其在处理异方差噪声下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 异方差贝叶斯优化框架能有效应对随机MPC中的非均匀噪声，提升超参数调优效率与控制性能，为复杂系统控制提供新思路。

title: Constraint Monotonicity, Epistemic Splitting and Foundedness Could in General Be Too Strong in Answer Set Programming
title_zh: 在答案集编程中，约束单调性、认知分裂和基础性通常可能太强
abstract: Recently, the notions of subjective constraint monotonicity, epistemic splitting, and foundedness have been introduced for epistemic logic programs, with the aim to use them as main criteria respectively intuitions to compare different answer set semantics proposed in the literature on how they comply with these intuitions. In this note, we consider these three notions and demonstrate on some examples that they may be too strong in general and may exclude some desired answer sets respectively world views. In conclusion, these properties should not be regarded as mandatory properties that every answer set semantics must satisfy in general.
summary: Recently, the notions of subjective constraint monotonicity, epistemic splitting, and foundedness have been introduced for epistemic logic programs, with the aim to use them as main criteria respectively intuitions to compare different answer set semantics proposed in the literature on how they comply with these intuitions. In this note, we consider these three notions and demonstrate on some examples that they may be too strong in general and may exclude some desired answer sets respectively world views. In conclusion, these properties should not be regarded as mandatory properties that every answer set semantics must satisfy in general.
abstract_zh: 最近，认知逻辑程序引入了主观约束单调性、认知分裂和基础性的概念，目的是使用它们分别作为直觉的主要标准来比较文献中提出的不同答案集语义，以了解它们如何符合这些直觉。在本说明中，我们考虑这三个概念，并通过一些示例证明它们通常可能过于强大，并且可能排除一些所需的答案集和世界观。总之，这些属性不应被视为每个答案集语义通常必须满足的强制属性。

AI.tldr: 本文分析约束单调性、认识论分割和奠基性在回答集编程中可能过于严格的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将这些概念作为比较不同回答集语义的标准，但需验证其普适性。
AI.method: 通过具体例子演示这些性质可能排除期望的答案集或世界观。
AI.result: 发现约束单调性、认识论分割和奠基性在一般情况下可能过于严格。
AI.conclusion: 这些属性不应被视为所有回答集语义必须满足的强制性条件。

title: Dual Attention Model for Citation Recommendation
title_zh: 引文推荐的双重注意力模型
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 28th International Conference on Computational Linguistics (COLING2020)
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 28th International Conference on Computational Linguistics (COLING2020)
abstract: Based on an exponentially increasing number of academic articles, discovering and citing comprehensive and appropriate resources has become a non-trivial task. Conventional citation recommender methods suffer from severe information loss. For example, they do not consider the section of the paper that the user is writing and for which they need to find a citation, the relatedness between the words in the local context (the text span that describes a citation), or the importance on each word from the local context. These shortcomings make such methods insufficient for recommending adequate citations to academic manuscripts. In this study, we propose a novel embedding-based neural network called "dual attention model for citation recommendation (DACR)" to recommend citations during manuscript preparation. Our method adapts embedding of three dimensions of semantic information: words in the local context, structural contexts, and the section on which a user is working. A neural network is designed to maximize the similarity between the embedding of the three input (local context words, section and structural contexts) and the target citation appearing in the context. The core of the neural network is composed of self-attention and additive attention, where the former aims to capture the relatedness between the contextual words and structural context, and the latter aims to learn the importance of them. The experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach.
summary: Based on an exponentially increasing number of academic articles, discovering and citing comprehensive and appropriate resources has become a non-trivial task. Conventional citation recommender methods suffer from severe information loss. For example, they do not consider the section of the paper that the user is writing and for which they need to find a citation, the relatedness between the words in the local context (the text span that describes a citation), or the importance on each word from the local context. These shortcomings make such methods insufficient for recommending adequate citations to academic manuscripts. In this study, we propose a novel embedding-based neural network called "dual attention model for citation recommendation (DACR)" to recommend citations during manuscript preparation. Our method adapts embedding of three dimensions of semantic information: words in the local context, structural contexts, and the section on which a user is working. A neural network is designed to maximize the similarity between the embedding of the three input (local context words, section and structural contexts) and the target citation appearing in the context. The core of the neural network is composed of self-attention and additive attention, where the former aims to capture the relatedness between the contextual words and structural context, and the latter aims to learn the importance of them. The experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 基于数量呈指数级增长的学术文章，发现并引用全面且合适的资源已成为一项艰巨的任务。传统的引文推荐方法存在严重的信息丢失问题。例如，他们没有考虑用户正在撰写且需要查找引文的论文部分、本地上下文中单词之间的相关性（描述引文的文本范围）或本地上下文中每个单词的重要性。这些缺点使得这些方法不足以推荐对学术手稿的充分引用。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于嵌入的神经网络，称为“引文推荐的双重注意模型（DACR）”，用于在手稿准备期间推荐引文。我们的方法适应语义信息三个维度的嵌入：本地上下文中的单词、结构上下文以及用户正在工作的部分。神经网络旨在最大化三个输入（本地上下文单词、章节和结构上下文）的嵌入与上下文中出现的目标引文之间的相似性。神经网络的核心由自注意力和附加注意力组成，前者旨在捕获上下文单词和结构上下文之间的相关性，后者旨在学习它们的重要性。对真实世界数据集的实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双注意力机制的神经网络模型（DACR），用于在撰写学术论文时推荐合适的引用文献。
AI.motivation: 现有引文推荐方法存在信息丢失问题，未充分考虑用户写作的论文章节、局部上下文词语关联性及词语重要性差异，导致推荐效果不足。
AI.method: 构建融合局部上下文词语、结构上下文和论文章节信息的三维语义嵌入，通过自注意力机制捕捉上下文词语与结构关联，利用加性注意力学习词语重要性，最大化输入嵌入与目标引文的相似度。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上的实验验证了该方法在引文推荐任务中的有效性，显著优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 双注意力模型通过综合考虑多维度语义信息和上下文关联性，有效提升了学术论文引文推荐的准确性和相关性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双注意力机制的神经网络模型（DACR），用于在撰写学术论文时推荐合适的引用文献。
ai_content.motivation: 现有引文推荐方法存在信息丢失问题，未充分考虑用户写作的论文章节、局部上下文词语关联性及词语重要性差异，导致推荐效果不足。
ai_content.method: 构建融合局部上下文词语、结构上下文和论文章节信息的三维语义嵌入，通过自注意力机制捕捉上下文词语与结构关联，利用加性注意力学习词语重要性，最大化输入嵌入与目标引文的相似度。
ai_content.result: 在真实数据集上的实验验证了该方法在引文推荐任务中的有效性，显著优于传统方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 双注意力模型通过综合考虑多维度语义信息和上下文关联性，有效提升了学术论文引文推荐的准确性和相关性。

search_text: Dual Attention Model for Citation Recommendation 引文推荐的双重注意力模型 Based on an exponentially increasing number of academic articles, discovering and citing comprehensive and appropriate resources has become a non-trivial task. Conventional citation recommender methods suffer from severe information loss. For example, they do not consider the section of the paper that the user is writing and for which they need to find a citation, the relatedness between the words in the local context (the text span that describes a citation), or the importance on each word from the local context. These shortcomings make such methods insufficient for recommending adequate citations to academic manuscripts. In this study, we propose a novel embedding-based neural network called "dual attention model for citation recommendation (DACR)" to recommend citations during manuscript preparation. Our method adapts embedding of three dimensions of semantic information: words in the local context, structural contexts, and the section on which a user is working. A neural network is designed to maximize the similarity between the embedding of the three input (local context words, section and structural contexts) and the target citation appearing in the context. The core of the neural network is composed of self-attention and additive attention, where the former aims to capture the relatedness between the contextual words and structural context, and the latter aims to learn the importance of them. The experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach. 基于数量呈指数级增长的学术文章，发现并引用全面且合适的资源已成为一项艰巨的任务。传统的引文推荐方法存在严重的信息丢失问题。例如，他们没有考虑用户正在撰写且需要查找引文的论文部分、本地上下文中单词之间的相关性（描述引文的文本范围）或本地上下文中每个单词的重要性。这些缺点使得这些方法不足以推荐对学术手稿的充分引用。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于嵌入的神经网络，称为“引文推荐的双重注意模型（DACR）”，用于在手稿准备期间推荐引文。我们的方法适应语义信息三个维度的嵌入：本地上下文中的单词、结构上下文以及用户正在工作的部分。神经网络旨在最大化三个输入（本地上下文单词、章节和结构上下文）的嵌入与上下文中出现的目标引文之间的相似性。神经网络的核心由自注意力和附加注意力组成，前者旨在捕获上下文单词和结构上下文之间的相关性，后者旨在学习它们的重要性。对真实世界数据集的实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。 本文提出一种基于双注意力机制的神经网络模型（DACR），用于在撰写学术论文时推荐合适的引用文献。 Yang Zhang,Qiang Ma cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Zhichao Sun,Junjie Wu,Gary G. Yen,Hang Ren,Hongyang An,Jianyu Yang
title: System Design and Analysis for Energy-Efficient Passive UAV Radar Imaging System using Illuminators of Opportunity
title_zh: 使用机会照明器的节能无源无人机雷达成像系统的系统设计和分析
abstract: Unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) can provide superior flexibility and cost-efficiency for modern radar imaging systems, which is an ideal platform for advanced remote sensing applications using synthetic aperture radar (SAR) technology. In this paper, an energy-efficient passive UAV radar imaging system using illuminators of opportunity is first proposed and investigated. Equipped with a SAR receiver, the UAV platform passively reuses the backscattered signal of the target scene from an external illuminator, such as SAR satellite, GNSS or ground-based stationary commercial illuminators, and achieves bi-static SAR imaging and data communication. The system can provide instant accessibility to the radar image of the interested targets with enhanced platform concealment, which is an essential tool for stealth observation and scene monitoring. The mission concept and system block diagram are first presented with justifications on the advantages of the system. Then, a set of mission performance evaluators is established to quantitatively assess the capability of the system in a comprehensive manner, including UAV navigation, passive SAR imaging and communication. Finally, the validity of the proposed performance evaluators are verified by numerical simulations.
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) can provide superior flexibility and cost-efficiency for modern radar imaging systems, which is an ideal platform for advanced remote sensing applications using synthetic aperture radar (SAR) technology. In this paper, an energy-efficient passive UAV radar imaging system using illuminators of opportunity is first proposed and investigated. Equipped with a SAR receiver, the UAV platform passively reuses the backscattered signal of the target scene from an external illuminator, such as SAR satellite, GNSS or ground-based stationary commercial illuminators, and achieves bi-static SAR imaging and data communication. The system can provide instant accessibility to the radar image of the interested targets with enhanced platform concealment, which is an essential tool for stealth observation and scene monitoring. The mission concept and system block diagram are first presented with justifications on the advantages of the system. Then, a set of mission performance evaluators is established to quantitatively assess the capability of the system in a comprehensive manner, including UAV navigation, passive SAR imaging and communication. Finally, the validity of the proposed performance evaluators are verified by numerical simulations.
abstract_zh: 无人机（UAV）可以为现代雷达成像系统提供卓越的灵活性和成本效益，是利用合成孔径雷达（SAR）技术的先进遥感应用的理想平台。在本文中，首次提出并研究了一种使用机会照明器的节能无源无人机雷达成像系统。无人机平台配备SAR接收器，无源地复用来自外部照明器（例如SAR卫星、GNSS或地面固定商业照明器）的目标场景后向散射信号，实现双基地SAR成像和数据通信。该系统可以即时获取感兴趣目标的雷达图像，并具有增强的平台隐蔽性，是隐身观察和场景监控的重要工具。首先提出了任务概念和系统框图，并论证了系统的优点。然后，建立一套任务性能评估器，对系统的能力进行全面的定量评估，包括无人机导航、被动SAR成像和通信。最后，通过数值模拟验证了所提出的性能评估器的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并研究了一种基于机会照射源的节能被动无人机雷达成像系统。
AI.motivation: 无人机在现代雷达成像系统中具有灵活性和成本效益的优势，但传统雷达系统能耗较高，且需要主动发射信号。因此，需要一种节能且隐蔽的雷达成像系统。
AI.method: 本文设计了一种被动无人机雷达成像系统，利用外部照射源（如SAR卫星、GNSS或地面商用照射源）的回波信号进行双站SAR成像，并建立了评估系统性能的指标。
AI.result: 通过数值仿真验证了所提出性能评估指标的有效性，并展示了该系统在隐蔽观测和场景监控方面的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该系统能够在保证成像质量的同时，提高隐蔽性和能源效率，是一种适用于隐身观测和场景监控的先进雷达成像工具。

authors_text: Yong Xiao,Guangming Shi,Yingyu Li,Walid Saad,H. Vincent Poor
title: Towards Self-learning Edge Intelligence in 6G
title_zh: 迈向 6G 中的自学习边缘智能
comment: To be published at IEEE Communications Magazine, vol. 58, no. 12, December 2020
comments: To be published at IEEE Communications Magazine, vol. 58, no. 12, December 2020
abstract: Edge intelligence, also called edge-native artificial intelligence (AI), is an emerging technological framework focusing on seamless integration of AI, communication networks, and mobile edge computing. It has been considered to be one of the key missing components in the existing 5G network and is widely recognized to be one of the most sought-after functions for tomorrow's wireless 6G cellular systems. In this article, we identify the key requirements and challenges of edge-native AI in 6G. A self-learning architecture based on self-supervised Generative Adversarial Nets (GANs) is introduced to \blu{demonstrate the potential performance improvement that can be achieved by automatic data learning and synthesizing at the edge of the network}. We evaluate the performance of our proposed self-learning architecture in a university campus shuttle system connected via a 5G network. Our result shows that the proposed architecture has the potential to identify and classify unknown services that emerge in edge computing networks. Future trends and key research problems for self-learning-enabled 6G edge intelligence are also discussed.
summary: Edge intelligence, also called edge-native artificial intelligence (AI), is an emerging technological framework focusing on seamless integration of AI, communication networks, and mobile edge computing. It has been considered to be one of the key missing components in the existing 5G network and is widely recognized to be one of the most sought-after functions for tomorrow's wireless 6G cellular systems. In this article, we identify the key requirements and challenges of edge-native AI in 6G. A self-learning architecture based on self-supervised Generative Adversarial Nets (GANs) is introduced to \blu{demonstrate the potential performance improvement that can be achieved by automatic data learning and synthesizing at the edge of the network}. We evaluate the performance of our proposed self-learning architecture in a university campus shuttle system connected via a 5G network. Our result shows that the proposed architecture has the potential to identify and classify unknown services that emerge in edge computing networks. Future trends and key research problems for self-learning-enabled 6G edge intelligence are also discussed.
abstract_zh: 边缘智能，也称为边缘原生人工智能（AI），是一种专注于人工智能、通信网络和移动边缘计算无缝集成的新兴技术框架。它被认为是现有 5G 网络中缺失的关键组件之一，并被广泛认为是未来无线 6G 蜂窝系统最受欢迎的功能之一。在本文中，我们确定了 6G 中边缘原生 AI 的关键要求和挑战。引入了一种基于自监督生成对抗网络（GAN）的自学习架构，\blu{展示了通过在网络边缘自动数据学习和合成可以实现的潜在性能改进}。我们评估了我们提出的自学习架构在通过 5G 网络连接的大学校园班车系统中的性能。我们的结果表明，所提出的架构有潜力识别和分类边缘计算网络中出现的未知服务。还讨论了支持自学习的 6G 边缘智能的未来趋势和关键研究问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督生成对抗网络（GAN）的自学习架构，以提升6G边缘智能的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有5G网络缺乏边缘原生AI能力，而6G需要更高效的边缘智能来应对新兴服务和动态环境。
AI.method: 设计自监督GAN架构，通过边缘节点自动学习和合成数据，实现未知服务的识别与分类。
AI.result: 在5G连接的校园班车系统中验证，该架构能有效识别边缘计算网络中的未知服务。
AI.conclusion: 自学习边缘智能是6G的关键方向，未来需解决数据隐私、动态环境适应性等挑战。

Future trends and key research problems for self-learning-enabled 6G edge intelligence are also discussed. 边缘智能，也称为边缘原生人工智能（AI），是一种专注于人工智能、通信网络和移动边缘计算无缝集成的新兴技术框架。它被认为是现有 5G 网络中缺失的关键组件之一，并被广泛认为是未来无线 6G 蜂窝系统最受欢迎的功能之一。在本文中，我们确定了 6G 中边缘原生 AI 的关键要求和挑战。引入了一种基于自监督生成对抗网络（GAN）的自学习架构，\blu{展示了通过在网络边缘自动数据学习和合成可以实现的潜在性能改进}。我们评估了我们提出的自学习架构在通过 5G 网络连接的大学校园班车系统中的性能。我们的结果表明，所提出的架构有潜力识别和分类边缘计算网络中出现的未知服务。还讨论了支持自学习的 6G 边缘智能的未来趋势和关键研究问题。 本文提出一种基于自监督生成对抗网络（GAN）的自学习架构，以提升6G边缘智能的性能。 Yong Xiao,Guangming Shi,Yingyu Li,Walid Saad,H. Vincent Poor cs.NI,cs.AI

authors_text: Samiul Alam,Tahsin Reasat,Asif Shahriyar Sushmit,Sadi Mohammad Siddiquee,Fuad Rahman,Mahady Hasan,Ahmed Imtiaz Humayun
title: A Large Multi-Target Dataset of Common Bengali Handwritten Graphemes
title_zh: 常见孟加拉语手写字素的大型多目标数据集
comment: 15 pages, 12 figures, 6 Tables, Submitted to CVPR-21
comments: 15 pages, 12 figures, 6 Tables, Submitted to CVPR-21
abstract: Latin has historically led the state-of-the-art in handwritten optical character recognition (OCR) research. Adapting existing systems from Latin to alpha-syllabary languages is particularly challenging due to a sharp contrast between their orthographies. The segmentation of graphical constituents corresponding to characters becomes significantly hard due to a cursive writing system and frequent use of diacritics in the alpha-syllabary family of languages. We propose a labeling scheme based on graphemes (linguistic segments of word formation) that makes segmentation in-side alpha-syllabary words linear and present the first dataset of Bengali handwritten graphemes that are commonly used in an everyday context. The dataset contains 411k curated samples of 1295 unique commonly used Bengali graphemes. Additionally, the test set contains 900 uncommon Bengali graphemes for out of dictionary performance evaluation. The dataset is open-sourced as a part of a public Handwritten Grapheme Classification Challenge on Kaggle to benchmark vision algorithms for multi-target grapheme classification. The unique graphemes present in this dataset are selected based on commonality in the Google Bengali ASR corpus. From competition proceedings, we see that deep-learning methods can generalize to a large span of out of dictionary graphemes which are absent during training. Dataset and starter codes at www.kaggle.com/c/bengaliai-cv19.

abstract_zh: 拉丁语历来引领手写光学字符识别 (OCR) 研究的最先进水平。将现有系统从拉丁语改编为字母音节语言尤其具有挑战性，因为它们的正字法之间存在鲜明对比。由于草书书写系统和字母音节语言族中变音符号的频繁使用，与字符相对应的图形成分的分割变得非常困难。我们提出了一种基于字素（构词的语言片段）的标记方案，该方案使内部字母音节单词线性分割，并呈现日常上下文中常用的孟加拉语手写字素的第一个数据集。该数据集包含 1295 个独特的常用孟加拉语字素的 411k 个精选样本。此外，测试集包含 900 个不常见的孟加拉语字素，用于字典外性能评估。该数据集是开源的，作为 Kaggle 上公开的手写字素分类挑战赛的一部分，用于对多目标字素分类的视觉算法进行基准测试。该数据集中存在的独特字素是根据 Google 孟加拉语 ASR 语料库中的共性选择的。从比赛过程中，我们看到深度学习方法可以泛化到训练期间不存在的大量字典外字素。数据集和起始代码位于 www.kaggle.com/c/bengaliai-cv19。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一个用于孟加拉语手写图形符号多目标分类的大型数据集，包含常见和不常见图形符号样本。
AI.motivation: 拉丁字母在手写OCR领域占主导地位，但难以适应孟加拉语等音节文字语言，因其连笔书写和频繁使用变音符号导致分割困难。
AI.method: 基于图形符号（词素）设计标注方案，将孟加拉语单词分割线性化，并构建包含1295个常用图形符号（411k样本）及900个非常用符号的测试集。
AI.result: 数据集通过Kaggle竞赛公开，验证了深度学习方法对训练集中未出现的图形符号具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为多目标图形符号分类提供了基准，证明了深度学习在处理超出字典范围符号时的有效性。

authors_text: Helio H. L. C. Monte-Alto,Mariela Morveli-Espinoza,Cesar A. Tacla
title: Multi-Agent Systems based on Contextual Defeasible Logic considering Focus
title_zh: 考虑焦点的基于上下文可废逻辑的多Agent系统
comment: 11 pages, 3 figures, paper was accepted for conference ICAART 2020: 12th International Conference on Agents and Artificial Intelligence, but was withdrew
comments: 11 pages, 3 figures, paper was accepted for conference ICAART 2020: 12th International Conference on Agents and Artificial Intelligence, but was withdrew
abstract: In this paper, we extend previous work on distributed reasoning using Contextual Defeasible Logic (CDL), which enables decentralised distributed reasoning based on a distributed knowledge base, such that the knowledge from different knowledge bases may conflict with each other. However, there are many use case scenarios that are not possible to represent in this model. One kind of such scenarios are the ones that require that agents share and reason with relevant knowledge when issuing a query to others. Another kind of scenarios are those in which the bindings among the agents (defined by means of mapping rules) are not static, such as in knowledge-intensive and dynamic environments. This work presents a multi-agent model based on CDL that not only allows agents to reason with their local knowledge bases and mapping rules, but also allows agents to reason about relevant knowledge (focus) -- which are not known by the agents a priori -- in the context of a specific query. We present a use case scenario, some formalisations of the model proposed, and an initial implementation based on the BDI (Belief-Desire-Intention) agent model.
summary: In this paper, we extend previous work on distributed reasoning using Contextual Defeasible Logic (CDL), which enables decentralised distributed reasoning based on a distributed knowledge base, such that the knowledge from different knowledge bases may conflict with each other. However, there are many use case scenarios that are not possible to represent in this model. One kind of such scenarios are the ones that require that agents share and reason with relevant knowledge when issuing a query to others. Another kind of scenarios are those in which the bindings among the agents (defined by means of mapping rules) are not static, such as in knowledge-intensive and dynamic environments. This work presents a multi-agent model based on CDL that not only allows agents to reason with their local knowledge bases and mapping rules, but also allows agents to reason about relevant knowledge (focus) -- which are not known by the agents a priori -- in the context of a specific query. We present a use case scenario, some formalisations of the model proposed, and an initial implementation based on the BDI (Belief-Desire-Intention) agent model.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们使用上下文可失效逻辑（CDL）扩展了先前的分布式推理工作，它使得基于分布式知识库的去中心化分布式推理成为可能，使得来自不同知识库的知识可能会相互冲突。然而，有许多用例场景无法在此模型中表示。一种这样的场景是要求代理在向其他人发出查询时共享相关知识并进行推理。另一种场景是代理之间的绑定（通过映射规则定义）不是静态的，例如在知识密集型和动态环境中。这项工作提出了一种基于 CDL 的多智能体模型，该模型不仅允许智能体利用其本地知识库和映射规则进行推理，还允许智能体在特定查询的上下文中推理智能体先验不知道的相关知识（焦点）。我们提出了一个用例场景、所提出模型的一些形式化以及基于 BDI（信念-愿望-意图）代理模型的初始实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于上下文可废止逻辑（CDL）的多智能体模型，支持动态环境中智能体在查询时共享和推理非先验相关知识（焦点）。
AI.motivation: 现有CDL模型无法处理动态绑定关系和查询时的跨知识库协作场景，尤其在知识密集型环境中存在局限性。
AI.method: 扩展CDL框架，引入焦点机制与动态映射规则，结合BDI（信念-欲望-意图）模型实现智能体的分布式推理与知识共享。
AI.result: 提出模型的形式化定义、典型用例场景及初步实现，验证了动态环境中多智能体对焦点知识的协同推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 新模型有效解决了传统CDL在动态场景下的不足，为复杂环境中的分布式智能体协作提供了理论支持与实现路径。

title: GeoD: Consensus-based Geodesic Distributed Pose Graph Optimization
title_zh: GeoD：基于共识的测地分布式位姿图优化
abstract: We present a consensus-based distributed pose graph optimization algorithm for obtaining an estimate of the 3D translation and rotation of each pose in a pose graph, given noisy relative measurements between poses. The algorithm, called GeoD, implements a continuous time distributed consensus protocol to minimize the geodesic pose graph error. GeoD is distributed over the pose graph itself, with a separate computation thread for each node in the graph, and messages are passed only between neighboring nodes in the graph. We leverage tools from Lyapunov theory and multi-agent consensus to prove the convergence of the algorithm. We identify two new consistency conditions sufficient for convergence: pairwise consistency of relative rotation measurements, and minimal consistency of relative translation measurements. GeoD incorporates a simple one step distributed initialization to satisfy both conditions. We demonstrate GeoD on simulated and real world SLAM datasets. We compare to a centralized pose graph optimizer with an optimality certificate (SE-Sync) and a Distributed Gauss-Seidel (DGS) method. On average, GeoD converges 20 times more quickly than DGS to a value with 3.4 times less error when compared to the global minimum provided by SE-Sync. GeoD scales more favorably with graph size than DGS, converging over 100 times faster on graphs larger than 1000 poses. Lastly, we test GeoD on a multi-UAV vision-based SLAM scenario, where the UAVs estimate their pose trajectories in a distributed manner using the relative poses extracted from their on board camera images. We show qualitative performance that is better than either the centralized SE-Sync or the distributed DGS methods.
summary: We present a consensus-based distributed pose graph optimization algorithm for obtaining an estimate of the 3D translation and rotation of each pose in a pose graph, given noisy relative measurements between poses. The algorithm, called GeoD, implements a continuous time distributed consensus protocol to minimize the geodesic pose graph error. GeoD is distributed over the pose graph itself, with a separate computation thread for each node in the graph, and messages are passed only between neighboring nodes in the graph. We leverage tools from Lyapunov theory and multi-agent consensus to prove the convergence of the algorithm. We identify two new consistency conditions sufficient for convergence: pairwise consistency of relative rotation measurements, and minimal consistency of relative translation measurements. GeoD incorporates a simple one step distributed initialization to satisfy both conditions. We demonstrate GeoD on simulated and real world SLAM datasets. We compare to a centralized pose graph optimizer with an optimality certificate (SE-Sync) and a Distributed Gauss-Seidel (DGS) method. On average, GeoD converges 20 times more quickly than DGS to a value with 3.4 times less error when compared to the global minimum provided by SE-Sync. GeoD scales more favorably with graph size than DGS, converging over 100 times faster on graphs larger than 1000 poses. Lastly, we test GeoD on a multi-UAV vision-based SLAM scenario, where the UAVs estimate their pose trajectories in a distributed manner using the relative poses extracted from their on board camera images. We show qualitative performance that is better than either the centralized SE-Sync or the distributed DGS methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于共识的分布式姿势图优化算法，用于在给定姿势之间的噪声相对测量的情况下获得姿势图中每个姿势的 3D 平移和旋转的估计。该算法称为 GeoD，实现连续时间分布式共识协议，以最小化测地线位姿图误差。 GeoD 分布在位姿图本身上，图中的每个节点都有一个单独的计算线程，并且消息仅在图中的相邻节点之间传递。我们利用李亚普诺夫理论和多智能体共识的工具来证明算法的收敛性。我们确定了足以收敛的两个新的一致性条件：相对旋转测量的成对一致性和相对平移测量的最小一致性。 GeoD 采用简单的一步分布式初始化来满足这两个条件。我们在模拟和现实世界 SLAM 数据集上演示了 GeoD。我们与具有最优性证书（SE-Sync）和分布式高斯-赛德尔（DGS）方法的集中式位姿图优化器进行比较。平均而言，与 SE-Sync 提供的全局最小值相比，GeoD 的收敛速度比 DGS 快 20 倍，误差减少 3.4 倍。 GeoD 比 DGS 更能适应图形大小，在大于 1000 个姿势的图形上收敛速度快 100 倍以上。最后，我们在多无人机基于视觉的 SLAM 场景中测试 GeoD，其中无人机使用从机载摄像机图像中提取的相对姿态以分布式方式估计其姿态轨迹。我们展示了优于集中式 SE-Sync 或分布式 DGS 方法的定性性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于共识的分布式位姿图优化算法GeoD，用于在存在噪声的相对测量下估计三维位姿图中每个位姿的平移和旋转。
AI.motivation: 传统集中式位姿图优化在大规模场景下计算效率低，而现有分布式方法在收敛速度和精度上存在不足，需设计更高效且具可扩展性的分布式优化算法。
AI.method: GeoD采用连续时间分布式共识协议，通过节点间局部通信最小化测地线误差，并结合李雅普诺夫理论与多智能体共识证明收敛性，提出相对旋转和翻译的一致性条件以确保收敛。
AI.result: GeoD在仿真和真实SLAM数据集上表现优于集中式SE-Sync和分布式DGS方法，收敛速度平均快20倍，误差低3.4倍，且在超1000个位姿的图中收敛速度超100倍于DGS。
AI.conclusion: GeoD通过分布式共识机制有效解决了大规模SLAM问题，兼具高效性与精度，为多无人机等分布式视觉SLAM场景提供了可行方案。

Lastly, we test GeoD on a multi-UAV vision-based SLAM scenario, where the UAVs estimate their pose trajectories in a distributed manner using the relative poses extracted from their on board camera images. title: Deformable Kernel Convolutional Network for Video Extreme Super-Resolution
title_zh: 用于视频超高分辨率的可变形内核卷积网络
abstract: Video super-resolution, which attempts to reconstruct high-resolution video frames from their corresponding low-resolution versions, has received increasingly more attention in recent years. Most existing approaches opt to use deformable convolution to temporally align neighboring frames and apply traditional spatial attention mechanism (convolution based) to enhance reconstructed features. However, such spatial-only strategies cannot fully utilize temporal dependency among video frames. In this paper, we propose a novel deep learning based VSR algorithm, named Deformable Kernel Spatial Attention Network (DKSAN). Thanks to newly designed Deformable Kernel Convolution Alignment (DKC_Align) and Deformable Kernel Spatial Attention (DKSA) modules, DKSAN can better exploit both spatial and temporal redundancies to facilitate the information propagation across different layers. We have tested DKSAN on AIM2020 Video Extreme Super-Resolution Challenge to super-resolve videos with a scale factor as large as 16. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed DKSAN can achieve both better subjective and objective performance compared with the existing state-of-the-art EDVR on Vid3oC and IntVID datasets.
summary: Video super-resolution, which attempts to reconstruct high-resolution video frames from their corresponding low-resolution versions, has received increasingly more attention in recent years. Most existing approaches opt to use deformable convolution to temporally align neighboring frames and apply traditional spatial attention mechanism (convolution based) to enhance reconstructed features. However, such spatial-only strategies cannot fully utilize temporal dependency among video frames. In this paper, we propose a novel deep learning based VSR algorithm, named Deformable Kernel Spatial Attention Network (DKSAN). Thanks to newly designed Deformable Kernel Convolution Alignment (DKC_Align) and Deformable Kernel Spatial Attention (DKSA) modules, DKSAN can better exploit both spatial and temporal redundancies to facilitate the information propagation across different layers. We have tested DKSAN on AIM2020 Video Extreme Super-Resolution Challenge to super-resolve videos with a scale factor as large as 16. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed DKSAN can achieve both better subjective and objective performance compared with the existing state-of-the-art EDVR on Vid3oC and IntVID datasets.
abstract_zh: 视频超分辨率试图从相应的低分辨率版本重建高分辨率视频帧，近年来受到越来越多的关注。大多数现有方法选择使用可变形卷积来临时对齐相邻帧，并应用传统的空间注意机制（基于卷积）来增强重建特征。然而，这种仅空间策略无法充分利用视频帧之间的时间依赖性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于深度学习的 VSR 算法，称为可变形核空间注意力网络（DKSAN）。得益于新设计的可变形核卷积对齐（DKC_Align）和可变形核空间注意力（DKSA）模块，DKSAN可以更好地利用空间和时间冗余来促进跨不同层的信息传播。我们在 AIM2020 视频极限超分辨率挑战赛上测试了 DKSAN，以对比例因子高达 16 的超分辨率视频进行测试。实验结果表明，与 Vid3oC 和 IntVID 数据集上现有最先进的 EDVR 相比，我们提出的 DKSAN 可以实现更好的主观和客观性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DKSAN的新型深度学习视频超分辨率算法，用于从低分辨率视频帧重建高分辨率视频帧，尤其针对16倍放大因子的极端超分辨率任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅依赖空间注意力机制，未能充分挖掘视频帧间的时序依赖关系，限制了信息传播效率。
AI.method: 设计了可变形核卷积对齐模块（DKC_Align）和可变形核空间注意力模块（DKSA），通过结合空间与时间冗余信息提升特征传播效果。
AI.result: 在AIM2020视频极端超分辨率挑战赛中，DKSAN在Vid3oC和IntVID数据集上均优于当前最先进的EDVR方法，取得更优的主客观评价结果。
AI.conclusion: DKSAN通过融合时空信息有效提升了极端视频超分辨率性能，验证了所提方法在高放大因子场景下的优越性。

authors_text: Tanweer Rashid,Ahmed Abdulkadir,Ilya M. Nasrallah,Jeffrey B. Ware,Hangfan Liu,Pascal Spincemaille,J. Rafael Romero,R. Nick Bryan,Susan R. Heckbert,Mohamad Habes
title: DEEPMIR: A DEEP neural network for differential detection of cerebral Microbleeds and IRon deposits in MRI
title_zh: DEEPMIR：一种深度神经网络，用于 MRI 中大脑微出血和 IRon 沉积物的差异检测
abstract: Lobar cerebral microbleeds (CMBs) and localized non-hemorrhage iron deposits in the basal ganglia have been associated with brain aging, vascular disease and neurodegenerative disorders. Particularly, CMBs are small lesions and require multiple neuroimaging modalities for accurate detection. Quantitative susceptibility mapping (QSM) derived from in vivo magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is necessary to differentiate between iron content and mineralization. We set out to develop a deep learning-based segmentation method suitable for segmenting both CMBs and iron deposits. We included a convenience sample of 24 participants from the MESA cohort and used T2-weighted images, susceptibility weighted imaging (SWI), and QSM to segment the two types of lesions. We developed a protocol for simultaneous manual annotation of CMBs and non-hemorrhage iron deposits in the basal ganglia. This manual annotation was then used to train a deep convolution neural network (CNN). Specifically, we adapted the U-Net model with a higher number of resolution layers to be able to detect small lesions such as CMBs from standard resolution MRI. We tested different combinations of the three modalities to determine the most informative data sources for the detection tasks. In the detection of CMBs using single class and multiclass models, we achieved an average sensitivity and precision of between 0.84-0.88 and 0.40-0.59, respectively. The same framework detected non-hemorrhage iron deposits with an average sensitivity and precision of about 0.75-0.81 and 0.62-0.75, respectively. Our results showed that deep learning could automate the detection of small vessel disease lesions and including multimodal MR data (particularly QSM) can improve the detection of CMB and non-hemorrhage iron deposits with sensitivity and precision that is compatible with use in large-scale research studies.
summary: Lobar cerebral microbleeds (CMBs) and localized non-hemorrhage iron deposits in the basal ganglia have been associated with brain aging, vascular disease and neurodegenerative disorders. Particularly, CMBs are small lesions and require multiple neuroimaging modalities for accurate detection. Quantitative susceptibility mapping (QSM) derived from in vivo magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is necessary to differentiate between iron content and mineralization. We set out to develop a deep learning-based segmentation method suitable for segmenting both CMBs and iron deposits. We included a convenience sample of 24 participants from the MESA cohort and used T2-weighted images, susceptibility weighted imaging (SWI), and QSM to segment the two types of lesions. We developed a protocol for simultaneous manual annotation of CMBs and non-hemorrhage iron deposits in the basal ganglia. This manual annotation was then used to train a deep convolution neural network (CNN). Specifically, we adapted the U-Net model with a higher number of resolution layers to be able to detect small lesions such as CMBs from standard resolution MRI. We tested different combinations of the three modalities to determine the most informative data sources for the detection tasks. In the detection of CMBs using single class and multiclass models, we achieved an average sensitivity and precision of between 0.84-0.88 and 0.40-0.59, respectively. The same framework detected non-hemorrhage iron deposits with an average sensitivity and precision of about 0.75-0.81 and 0.62-0.75, respectively. Our results showed that deep learning could automate the detection of small vessel disease lesions and including multimodal MR data (particularly QSM) can improve the detection of CMB and non-hemorrhage iron deposits with sensitivity and precision that is compatible with use in large-scale research studies.
abstract_zh: 脑叶微出血（CMB）和基底神经节局部非出血性铁沉积与脑衰老、血管疾病和神经退行性疾病有关。特别是，CMB 是小病变，需要多种神经影像学方法才能准确检测。来自体内磁共振成像 (MRI) 的定量磁化率图 (QSM) 对于区分铁含量和矿化度是必要的。我们着手开发一种基于深度学习的分割方法，适用于分割 CMB 和铁矿床。我们纳入了来自 MESA 队列的 24 名参与者的方便样本，并使用 T2 加权图像、磁敏感加权成像 (SWI) 和 QSM 来分割两种类型的病变。我们开发了一种同时手动注释基底神经节中 CMB 和非出血铁沉积物的协议。然后使用该手动注释来训练深度卷积神经网络 (CNN)。具体来说，我们采用了具有更高分辨率层数的 U-Net 模型，以便能够从标准分辨率 MRI 中检测小病变，例如 CMB。我们测试了三种模式的不同组合，以确定检测任务信息最丰富的数据源。在使用单类和多类模型检测 CMB 时，我们的平均灵敏度和精度分别为 0.84-0.88 和 0.40-0.59。相同的框架检测非出血性铁沉积物的平均灵敏度和精度分别约为 0.75-0.81 和 0.62-0.75。我们的结果表明，深度学习可以自动检测小血管疾病病变，并且包含多模态 MR 数据（特别是 QSM）可以提高 CMB 和非出血性铁沉积物的检测，其灵敏度和精度与大规模研究中的使用相兼容。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于深度学习的分割方法，用于同时检测脑微出血（CMBs）和基底节非出血性铁沉积，并利用多模态MRI数据提高检测准确性。
AI.motivation: 脑微出血和铁沉积与脑衰老及神经退行性疾病相关，但其检测依赖多种影像模态且手动标注效率低，亟需自动化方法。
AI.method: 基于U-Net模型改进网络结构，结合T2加权、SWI和QSM三种MRI模态数据，通过手动标注的24例MESA队列数据训练卷积神经网络，并测试多模态数据组合的检测效果。
AI.result: 单类和多类模型检测CMBs的平均灵敏度为0.84-0.88，精确度0.40-0.59；检测铁沉积的灵敏度0.75-0.81，精确度0.62-0.75，多模态数据（尤其是QSM）显著提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习可有效自动化检测小血管病变，结合QSM等多模态MRI数据可满足大规模研究的检测需求。

authors_text: Yin Cao,Turab Iqbal,Qiuqiang Kong,Yue Zhong,Wenwu Wang,Mark D. Plumbley
title: Event-Independent Network for Polyphonic Sound Event Localization and Detection
title_zh: 用于和弦声音事件定位和检测的事件无关网络
abstract: Polyphonic sound event localization and detection is not only detecting what sound events are happening but localizing corresponding sound sources. This series of tasks was first introduced in DCASE 2019 Task 3. In 2020, the sound event localization and detection task introduces additional challenges in moving sound sources and overlapping-event cases, which include two events of the same type with two different direction-of-arrival (DoA) angles. In this paper, a novel event-independent network for polyphonic sound event localization and detection is proposed. Unlike the two-stage method we proposed in DCASE 2019 Task 3, this new network is fully end-to-end. Inputs to the network are first-order Ambisonics (FOA) time-domain signals, which are then fed into a 1-D convolutional layer to extract acoustic features. The network is then split into two parallel branches. The first branch is for sound event detection (SED), and the second branch is for DoA estimation. There are three types of predictions from the network, SED predictions, DoA predictions, and event activity detection (EAD) predictions that are used to combine the SED and DoA features for on-set and off-set estimation. All of these predictions have the format of two tracks indicating that there are at most two overlapping events. Within each track, there could be at most one event happening. This architecture introduces a problem of track permutation. To address this problem, a frame-level permutation invariant training method is used. Experimental results show that the proposed method can detect polyphonic sound events and their corresponding DoAs. Its performance on the Task 3 dataset is greatly increased as compared with that of the baseline method.
summary: Polyphonic sound event localization and detection is not only detecting what sound events are happening but localizing corresponding sound sources. This series of tasks was first introduced in DCASE 2019 Task 3. In 2020, the sound event localization and detection task introduces additional challenges in moving sound sources and overlapping-event cases, which include two events of the same type with two different direction-of-arrival (DoA) angles. In this paper, a novel event-independent network for polyphonic sound event localization and detection is proposed. Unlike the two-stage method we proposed in DCASE 2019 Task 3, this new network is fully end-to-end. Inputs to the network are first-order Ambisonics (FOA) time-domain signals, which are then fed into a 1-D convolutional layer to extract acoustic features. The network is then split into two parallel branches. The first branch is for sound event detection (SED), and the second branch is for DoA estimation. There are three types of predictions from the network, SED predictions, DoA predictions, and event activity detection (EAD) predictions that are used to combine the SED and DoA features for on-set and off-set estimation. All of these predictions have the format of two tracks indicating that there are at most two overlapping events. Within each track, there could be at most one event happening. This architecture introduces a problem of track permutation. To address this problem, a frame-level permutation invariant training method is used. Experimental results show that the proposed method can detect polyphonic sound events and their corresponding DoAs. Its performance on the Task 3 dataset is greatly increased as compared with that of the baseline method.
abstract_zh: 和弦声音事件定位和检测不仅是检测正在发生的声音事件，而且是定位相应的声源。这一系列任务首次在 DCASE 2019 任务 3 中引入。2020 年，声音事件定位和检测任务在移动声源和重叠事件情况下引入了额外的挑战，其中包括具有两个不同到达方向 (DoA) 角度的两个相同类型的事件。在本文中，提出了一种用于复调声音事件定位和检测的新颖的事件无关网络。与我们在 DCASE 2019 任务 3 中提出的两阶段方法不同，这个新网络是完全端到端的。网络的输入是一阶高保真度立体声响复制 (FOA) 时域信号，然后将其输入一维卷积层以提取声学特征。然后网络被分成两个并行的分支。第一个分支用于声音事件检测 (SED)，第二个分支用于 DoA 估计。网络预测分为三种类型：SED 预测、DoA 预测和事件活动检测 (EAD) 预测，这些预测用于结合 SED 和 DoA 特征来进行偏移估计。所有这些预测都具有两个轨道的格式，表明最多有两个重叠事件。在每个轨道中，最多可能发生一个事件。这种架构引入了轨道排列的问题。为了解决这个问题，使用了帧级排列不变训练方法。实验结果表明，该方法可以检测复音声音事件及其相应的DoA。与基线方法相比，它在任务3数据集上的性能大大提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端的事件无关网络，用于多声源声音事件定位与检测，解决移动声源和重叠事件的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理移动声源和相同类型事件不同方向到达角（DoA）的重叠场景时存在局限性，需设计更高效的端到端模型。
AI.method: 采用一阶Ambisonics时域信号输入，通过1D卷积提取声学特征，分两个并行分支处理声事件检测（SED）和DoA估计，并引入帧级置换不变训练解决轨迹排列问题。
AI.result: 在Task 3数据集上显著优于基线方法，有效检测多声源事件及其对应DoA。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的端到端网络架构能高效处理多声源定位与检测任务，尤其在复杂重叠场景中表现优异。

Its performance on the Task 3 dataset is greatly increased as compared with that of the baseline method. 和弦声音事件定位和检测不仅是检测正在发生的声音事件，而且是定位相应的声源。这一系列任务首次在 DCASE 2019 任务 3 中引入。2020 年，声音事件定位和检测任务在移动声源和重叠事件情况下引入了额外的挑战，其中包括具有两个不同到达方向 (DoA) 角度的两个相同类型的事件。在本文中，提出了一种用于复调声音事件定位和检测的新颖的事件无关网络。与我们在 DCASE 2019 任务 3 中提出的两阶段方法不同，这个新网络是完全端到端的。网络的输入是一阶高保真度立体声响复制 (FOA) 时域信号，然后将其输入一维卷积层以提取声学特征。然后网络被分成两个并行的分支。第一个分支用于声音事件检测 (SED)，第二个分支用于 DoA 估计。网络预测分为三种类型：SED 预测、DoA 预测和事件活动检测 (EAD) 预测，这些预测用于结合 SED 和 DoA 特征来进行偏移估计。所有这些预测都具有两个轨道的格式，表明最多有两个重叠事件。在每个轨道中，最多可能发生一个事件。这种架构引入了轨道排列的问题。为了解决这个问题，使用了帧级排列不变训练方法。实验结果表明，该方法可以检测复音声音事件及其相应的DoA。与基线方法相比，它在任务3数据集上的性能大大提高。 本文提出一种端到端的事件无关网络，用于多声源声音事件定位与检测，解决移动声源和重叠事件的挑战。 Yin Cao,Turab Iqbal,Qiuqiang Kong,Yue Zhong,Wenwu Wang,Mark D. Plumbley eess.AS,cs.SD

title: Machine Learning in Airline Crew Pairing to Construct Initial Clusters for Dynamic Constraint Aggregation
title_zh: 航空公司机组人员配对中的机器学习为动态约束聚合构建初始集群
comment: First publication in the "Cahiers du GERAD" series in February 2020. Submitted to EURO Journal on Transportation and Logistics on January 17, 2020 and available online on September 2, 2020
comments: First publication in the "Cahiers du GERAD" series in February 2020. Submitted to EURO Journal on Transportation and Logistics on January 17, 2020 and available online on September 2, 2020
abstract: The crew pairing problem (CPP) is generally modelled as a set partitioning problem where the flights have to be partitioned in pairings. A pairing is a sequence of flight legs separated by connection time and rest periods that starts and ends at the same base. Because of the extensive list of complex rules and regulations, determining whether a sequence of flights constitutes a feasible pairing can be quite difficult by itself, making CPP one of the hardest of the airline planning problems. In this paper, we first propose to improve the prototype Baseline solver of Desaulniers et al. (2020) by adding dynamic control strategies to obtain an efficient solver for large-scale CPPs: Commercial-GENCOL-DCA. These solvers are designed to aggregate the flights covering constraints to reduce the size of the problem. Then, we use machine learning (ML) to produce clusters of flights having a high probability of being performed consecutively by the same crew. The solver combines several advanced Operations Research techniques to assemble and modify these clusters, when necessary, to produce a good solution. We show, on monthly CPPs with up to 50 000 flights, that Commercial-GENCOL-DCA with clusters produced by ML-based heuristics outperforms Baseline fed by initial clusters that are pairings of a solution obtained by rolling horizon with GENCOL. The reduction of solution cost averages between 6.8% and 8.52%, which is mainly due to the reduction in the cost of global constraints between 69.79% and 78.11%.

A pairing is a sequence of flight legs separated by connection time and rest periods that starts and ends at the same base. Because of the extensive list of complex rules and regulations, determining whether a sequence of flights constitutes a feasible pairing can be quite difficult by itself, making CPP one of the hardest of the airline planning problems. In this paper, we first propose to improve the prototype Baseline solver of Desaulniers et al. (2020) by adding dynamic control strategies to obtain an efficient solver for large-scale CPPs: Commercial-GENCOL-DCA. These solvers are designed to aggregate the flights covering constraints to reduce the size of the problem. Then, we use machine learning (ML) to produce clusters of flights having a high probability of being performed consecutively by the same crew. The solver combines several advanced Operations Research techniques to assemble and modify these clusters, when necessary, to produce a good solution. We show, on monthly CPPs with up to 50 000 flights, that Commercial-GENCOL-DCA with clusters produced by ML-based heuristics outperforms Baseline fed by initial clusters that are pairings of a solution obtained by rolling horizon with GENCOL. The reduction of solution cost averages between 6.8% and 8.52%, which is mainly due to the reduction in the cost of global constraints between 69.79% and 78.11%.
abstract_zh: 机组配对问题（CPP）通常被建模为一个集合划分问题，其中航班必须进行配对划分。配对是由在同一基地开始和结束的连接时间和休息时间间隔开的一系列飞行航段。由于存在大量复杂的规则和规定，确定一系列航班是否构成可行的配对本身就相当困难，这使得 CPP 成为航空公司规划问题中最困难的问题之一。在本文中，我们首先提出改进 Desaulniers 等人的原型基线求解器。 （2020）通过添加动态控制策略来获得大规模 CPP 的高效求解器：Commercial-GENCOL-DCA。这些求解器旨在聚合涵盖约束的航班，以缩小问题的规模。然后，我们使用机器学习 (ML) 生成很可能由同一机组人员连续执行的航班集群。该求解器结合了多种先进的运筹学技术，在必要时组装和修改这些集群，以产生良好的解决方案。我们在每月最多 50,000 个航班的 CPP 上表明，具有基于 ML 启发式生成的集群的 Commercial-GENCOL-DCA 优于由初始集群提供的基线，这些初始集群是通过滚动地平线与 GENCOL 获得的解决方案的配对。解决方案成本平均降低了6.8%~8.52%，这主要是由于全局约束成本降低了69.79%~78.11%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合机器学习与动态约束聚合的改进方法，用于解决大规模航班机组配对问题（CPP）。
AI.motivation: 机组配对问题因复杂的规则约束而难以高效求解，传统方法在处理大规模数据时存在成本高、效率低的问题。
AI.method: 改进Baseline求解器为Commercial-GENCOL-DCA，引入动态控制策略，并利用机器学习生成高概率连续执飞的航班簇作为初始聚类。
AI.result: 在包含最多5万架次的月度CPP测试中，新方法相比基线方法平均降低6.8%-8.52%的解决方案成本，全局约束成本降低69.79%-78.11%。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习辅助的动态约束聚合方法显著提升了大规模CPP求解效率，验证了混合运筹学技术与数据驱动策略的有效性。

authors_text: Nikita Nangia,Clara Vania,Rasika Bhalerao,Samuel R. Bowman
title: CrowS-Pairs: A Challenge Dataset for Measuring Social Biases in Masked Language Models
title_zh: CrowS-Pairs：用于测量掩码语言模型中的社会偏见的挑战数据集
abstract: Pretrained language models, especially masked language models (MLMs) have seen success across many NLP tasks. However, there is ample evidence that they use the cultural biases that are undoubtedly present in the corpora they are trained on, implicitly creating harm with biased representations. To measure some forms of social bias in language models against protected demographic groups in the US, we introduce the Crowdsourced Stereotype Pairs benchmark (CrowS-Pairs). CrowS-Pairs has 1508 examples that cover stereotypes dealing with nine types of bias, like race, religion, and age. In CrowS-Pairs a model is presented with two sentences: one that is more stereotyping and another that is less stereotyping. The data focuses on stereotypes about historically disadvantaged groups and contrasts them with advantaged groups. We find that all three of the widely-used MLMs we evaluate substantially favor sentences that express stereotypes in every category in CrowS-Pairs. As work on building less biased models advances, this dataset can be used as a benchmark to evaluate progress.
summary: Pretrained language models, especially masked language models (MLMs) have seen success across many NLP tasks. However, there is ample evidence that they use the cultural biases that are undoubtedly present in the corpora they are trained on, implicitly creating harm with biased representations. To measure some forms of social bias in language models against protected demographic groups in the US, we introduce the Crowdsourced Stereotype Pairs benchmark (CrowS-Pairs). CrowS-Pairs has 1508 examples that cover stereotypes dealing with nine types of bias, like race, religion, and age. In CrowS-Pairs a model is presented with two sentences: one that is more stereotyping and another that is less stereotyping. The data focuses on stereotypes about historically disadvantaged groups and contrasts them with advantaged groups. We find that all three of the widely-used MLMs we evaluate substantially favor sentences that express stereotypes in every category in CrowS-Pairs. As work on building less biased models advances, this dataset can be used as a benchmark to evaluate progress.
abstract_zh: 预训练语言模型，尤其是屏蔽语言模型 (MLM) 在许多 NLP 任务中取得了成功。然而，有充分的证据表明，他们利用了他们接受训练的语料库中无疑存在的文化偏见，用偏见的表述隐含地造成了伤害。为了衡量语言模型中针对美国受保护人口群体的某些形式的社会偏见，我们引入了众包刻板印象对基准（CrowS-Pairs）。 CrowS-Pairs 有 1508 个示例，涵盖了涉及种族、宗教和年龄等九种偏见的刻板印象。在 CrowS-Pairs 中，模型由两个句子呈现：一个是更多刻板印象，另一个是更少刻板印象。这些数据侧重于对历史上弱势群体的刻板印象，并将其与优势群体进行对比。我们发现，我们评估的所有三种广泛使用的传销都基本上偏爱表达 CrowS-Pairs 中每个类别的刻板印象的句子。随着构建偏差较小的模型的工作取得进展，该数据集可以用作评估进展的基准。

AI.tldr: 提出CrowS-Pairs数据集，用于评估掩码语言模型中的社会偏见。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练语言模型存在文化偏见，可能对弱势群体产生有害影响，需建立基准来衡量社会偏见。
AI.method: 构建包含1508个样本的数据集，涵盖九类偏见，每个样本包含一对句子，分别代表刻板印象和非刻板印象，评估模型对刻板印象句子的偏好。
AI.result: 三个主流MLM在所有偏见类别中均显著倾向于选择刻板印象句子。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为评估和减少语言模型中的社会偏见提供了有效基准。

title: Self-Guided Multiple Instance Learning for Weakly Supervised Disease Classification and Localization in Chest Radiographs
title_zh: 胸部X光片中弱监督疾病分类和定位的自引导多实例学习
abstract: The lack of fine-grained annotations hinders the deployment of automated diagnosis systems, which require human-interpretable justification for their decision process. In this paper, we address the problem of weakly supervised identification and localization of abnormalities in chest radiographs. To that end, we introduce a novel loss function for training convolutional neural networks increasing the \emph{localization confidence} and assisting the overall \emph{disease identification}. The loss leverages both image- and patch-level predictions to generate auxiliary supervision. Rather than forming strictly binary from the predictions as done in previous loss formulations, we create targets in a more customized manner, which allows the loss to account for possible misclassification. We show that the supervision provided within the proposed learning scheme leads to better performance and more precise predictions on prevalent datasets for multiple-instance learning as well as on the NIH~ChestX-Ray14 benchmark for disease recognition than previously used losses.
summary: The lack of fine-grained annotations hinders the deployment of automated diagnosis systems, which require human-interpretable justification for their decision process. In this paper, we address the problem of weakly supervised identification and localization of abnormalities in chest radiographs. To that end, we introduce a novel loss function for training convolutional neural networks increasing the \emph{localization confidence} and assisting the overall \emph{disease identification}. The loss leverages both image- and patch-level predictions to generate auxiliary supervision. Rather than forming strictly binary from the predictions as done in previous loss formulations, we create targets in a more customized manner, which allows the loss to account for possible misclassification. We show that the supervision provided within the proposed learning scheme leads to better performance and more precise predictions on prevalent datasets for multiple-instance learning as well as on the NIH~ChestX-Ray14 benchmark for disease recognition than previously used losses.
abstract_zh: 缺乏细粒度注释阻碍了自动诊断系统的部署，该系统需要人类可解释的理由来证明其决策过程。在本文中，我们解决了胸片异常的弱监督识别和定位问题。为此，我们引入了一种新颖的损失函数来训练卷积神经网络，以增加 emph{定位置信度} 并协助整体 emph{疾病识别}。损失利用图像级和块级预测来生成辅助监督。我们不是像以前的损失公式那样从预测中形成严格的二元，而是以更加定制的方式创建目标，这使得损失能够解释可能的错误分类。我们表明，与以前使用的损失相比，所提出的学习方案中提供的监督可以在多实例学习的流行数据集以及疾病识别的 NIH~ChestX-Ray14 基准上带来更好的性能和更精确的预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自指导的多实例学习方法，用于在弱监督条件下对胸部X光片进行疾病分类和定位。
AI.motivation: 细粒度标注的缺乏限制了自动诊断系统的应用，而弱监督方法能够通过有限标注实现可解释的疾病识别与定位。
AI.method: 设计了一种新型损失函数，结合图像级与补丁级预测生成辅助监督，通过定制化目标处理潜在误分类问题。
AI.result: 在多个实例学习数据集及NIH ChestX-Ray14基准测试中，该方法在疾病识别与定位任务上均优于传统损失函数。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过增强局部化置信度和疾病识别能力，有效提升了弱监督场景下胸部X光片分析的性能。

search_text: Self-Guided Multiple Instance Learning for Weakly Supervised Disease Classification and Localization in Chest Radiographs 胸部X光片中弱监督疾病分类和定位的自引导多实例学习 The lack of fine-grained annotations hinders the deployment of automated diagnosis systems, which require human-interpretable justification for their decision process. In this paper, we address the problem of weakly supervised identification and localization of abnormalities in chest radiographs. To that end, we introduce a novel loss function for training convolutional neural networks increasing the \emph{localization confidence} and assisting the overall \emph{disease identification}. The loss leverages both image- and patch-level predictions to generate auxiliary supervision. Rather than forming strictly binary from the predictions as done in previous loss formulations, we create targets in a more customized manner, which allows the loss to account for possible misclassification. We show that the supervision provided within the proposed learning scheme leads to better performance and more precise predictions on prevalent datasets for multiple-instance learning as well as on the NIH~ChestX-Ray14 benchmark for disease recognition than previously used losses. 缺乏细粒度注释阻碍了自动诊断系统的部署，该系统需要人类可解释的理由来证明其决策过程。在本文中，我们解决了胸片异常的弱监督识别和定位问题。为此，我们引入了一种新颖的损失函数来训练卷积神经网络，以增加 emph{定位置信度} 并协助整体 emph{疾病识别}。损失利用图像级和块级预测来生成辅助监督。我们不是像以前的损失公式那样从预测中形成严格的二元，而是以更加定制的方式创建目标，这使得损失能够解释可能的错误分类。我们表明，与以前使用的损失相比，所提出的学习方案中提供的监督可以在多实例学习的流行数据集以及疾病识别的 NIH~ChestX-Ray14 基准上带来更好的性能和更精确的预测。 本文提出一种自指导的多实例学习方法，用于在弱监督条件下对胸部X光片进行疾病分类和定位。 Constantin Seibold,Jens Kleesiek,Heinz-Peter Schlemmer,Rainer Stiefelhagen cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Yuning Mao,Yanru Qu,Yiqing Xie,Xiang Ren,Jiawei Han
title: Multi-document Summarization with Maximal Marginal Relevance-guided Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 具有最大边际相关性引导的强化学习的多文档摘要
abstract: While neural sequence learning methods have made significant progress in single-document summarization (SDS), they produce unsatisfactory results on multi-document summarization (MDS). We observe two major challenges when adapting SDS advances to MDS: (1) MDS involves larger search space and yet more limited training data, setting obstacles for neural methods to learn adequate representations; (2) MDS needs to resolve higher information redundancy among the source documents, which SDS methods are less effective to handle. To close the gap, we present RL-MMR, Maximal Margin Relevance-guided Reinforcement Learning for MDS, which unifies advanced neural SDS methods and statistical measures used in classical MDS. RL-MMR casts MMR guidance on fewer promising candidates, which restrains the search space and thus leads to better representation learning. Additionally, the explicit redundancy measure in MMR helps the neural representation of the summary to better capture redundancy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RL-MMR achieves state-of-the-art performance on benchmark MDS datasets. In particular, we show the benefits of incorporating MMR into end-to-end learning when adapting SDS to MDS in terms of both learning effectiveness and efficiency.
summary: While neural sequence learning methods have made significant progress in single-document summarization (SDS), they produce unsatisfactory results on multi-document summarization (MDS). We observe two major challenges when adapting SDS advances to MDS: (1) MDS involves larger search space and yet more limited training data, setting obstacles for neural methods to learn adequate representations; (2) MDS needs to resolve higher information redundancy among the source documents, which SDS methods are less effective to handle. To close the gap, we present RL-MMR, Maximal Margin Relevance-guided Reinforcement Learning for MDS, which unifies advanced neural SDS methods and statistical measures used in classical MDS. RL-MMR casts MMR guidance on fewer promising candidates, which restrains the search space and thus leads to better representation learning. Additionally, the explicit redundancy measure in MMR helps the neural representation of the summary to better capture redundancy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RL-MMR achieves state-of-the-art performance on benchmark MDS datasets. In particular, we show the benefits of incorporating MMR into end-to-end learning when adapting SDS to MDS in terms of both learning effectiveness and efficiency.
abstract_zh: 虽然神经序列学习方法在单文档摘要（SDS）方面取得了显着进展，但在多文档摘要（MDS）方面却产生了令人不满意的结果。当将 SDS 的进步应用于 MDS 时，我们观察到两个主要挑战：（1）MDS 涉及更大的搜索空间和更有限的训练数据，为神经方法学习足够的表示设置了障碍； (2)MDS需要解决源文档间较高的信息冗余问题，SDS方法处理效果较差。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了 RL-MMR（Maximal Margin Relevance-guided Reinforcement Learning for MDS），它统一了先进的神经 SDS 方法和经典 MDS 中使用的统计方法。 RL-MMR 将 MMR 指导投射到较少有希望的候选者上，这限制了搜索空间，从而带来更好的表示学习。此外，MMR 中的显式冗余度量有助于摘要的神经表示更好地捕获冗余。大量实验表明 RL-MMR 在基准 MDS 数据集上实现了最先进的性能。特别是，我们展示了将 SDS 适应 MDS 时将 MMR 纳入端到端学习在学习效果和效率方面的好处。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于最大边际相关性引导的强化学习方法（RL-MMR），以解决多文档摘要中的搜索空间大和信息冗余问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经方法在MDS中因搜索空间大、数据有限及冗余处理不足而效果不佳，需结合统计方法提升性能。
AI.method: 提出RL-MMR方法，结合神经SDS模型与MMR统计指标，通过缩减候选集限制搜索空间，并利用MMR冗余度量优化摘要表示。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上达到最先进水平，显著提升学习效果和效率。
AI.conclusion: 证明了将MMR纳入端到端学习能有效提升MDS的表示学习与冗余处理能力。

title: Multi-Qubit Correction for Quantum Annealers
title_zh: 量子退火器的多量子位校正
abstract: We present \emph{multi-qubit correction} (MQC) as a novel postprocessing method for quantum annealers that views the evolution in an open-system as a Gibbs sampler and reduces a set of excited states to a new synthetic state with lower energy value. After sampling from the ground state of a given (Ising) Hamiltonian, MQC compares pairs of excited states to recognize virtual tunnels--i.e., a group of qubits that changing their states simultaneously can result in a new state with lower energy value--and successively converges to the ground state. Experimental results using D-Wave 2000Q quantum annealers demonstrate that MQC finds samples with notably lower energy values and improves the reproducibility of results when compared to recent hardware/software advances in the realm of quantum annealing, such as spin-reversal transforms, classical postprocessing techniques, and increased inter-sample delay between successive measurements.
summary: We present \emph{multi-qubit correction} (MQC) as a novel postprocessing method for quantum annealers that views the evolution in an open-system as a Gibbs sampler and reduces a set of excited states to a new synthetic state with lower energy value. After sampling from the ground state of a given (Ising) Hamiltonian, MQC compares pairs of excited states to recognize virtual tunnels--i.e., a group of qubits that changing their states simultaneously can result in a new state with lower energy value--and successively converges to the ground state. Experimental results using D-Wave 2000Q quantum annealers demonstrate that MQC finds samples with notably lower energy values and improves the reproducibility of results when compared to recent hardware/software advances in the realm of quantum annealing, such as spin-reversal transforms, classical postprocessing techniques, and increased inter-sample delay between successive measurements.
abstract_zh: 我们提出 \emph{多量子位校正}（MQC）作为量子退火器的一种新颖的后处理方法，它将开放系统中的演化视为吉布斯采样器，并将一组激发态减少为具有较低能量值的新合成态。从给定 (Ising) 哈密顿量的基态采样后，MQC 会比较激发态对以识别虚拟隧道（即一组同时改变状态的量子位可以产生具有较低能量值的新状态）并连续收敛到基态。使用 D-Wave 2000Q 量子退火机的实验结果表明，与量子退火领域最新的硬件/软件进步（例如自旋反转变换、经典后处理技术以及连续测量之间增加的样本间延迟）相比，MQC 可以找到能量值明显较低的样本，并提高结果的再现性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为多量子比特校正（MQC）的新方法，用于改进量子退火器的后处理过程，通过降低激发态能量值来提高结果的可重复性。
AI.motivation: 量子退火器在处理复杂优化问题时，常因激发态能量较高和结果不可重复性而受限，需开发更有效的后处理技术以提升性能。
AI.method: 将开放系统的演化视为吉布斯采样器，通过比较激发态对识别虚拟隧穿路径，合成更低能量的新状态，并逐步收敛至基态。
AI.result: 在D-Wave 2000Q量子退火器上的实验表明，MQC相比现有技术（如自旋反转变换、经典后处理）显著降低了能量值并提升了结果可重复性。
AI.conclusion: MQC作为一种新型后处理方法，有效解决了量子退火器的激发态问题，在能量优化和结果稳定性方面优于现有技术。

search_text: Multi-Qubit Correction for Quantum Annealers 量子退火器的多量子位校正 We present \emph{multi-qubit correction} (MQC) as a novel postprocessing method for quantum annealers that views the evolution in an open-system as a Gibbs sampler and reduces a set of excited states to a new synthetic state with lower energy value. After sampling from the ground state of a given (Ising) Hamiltonian, MQC compares pairs of excited states to recognize virtual tunnels--i.e., a group of qubits that changing their states simultaneously can result in a new state with lower energy value--and successively converges to the ground state. Experimental results using D-Wave 2000Q quantum annealers demonstrate that MQC finds samples with notably lower energy values and improves the reproducibility of results when compared to recent hardware/software advances in the realm of quantum annealing, such as spin-reversal transforms, classical postprocessing techniques, and increased inter-sample delay between successive measurements. 我们提出 \emph{多量子位校正}（MQC）作为量子退火器的一种新颖的后处理方法，它将开放系统中的演化视为吉布斯采样器，并将一组激发态减少为具有较低能量值的新合成态。从给定 (Ising) 哈密顿量的基态采样后，MQC 会比较激发态对以识别虚拟隧道（即一组同时改变状态的量子位可以产生具有较低能量值的新状态）并连续收敛到基态。使用 D-Wave 2000Q 量子退火机的实验结果表明，与量子退火领域最新的硬件/软件进步（例如自旋反转变换、经典后处理技术以及连续测量之间增加的样本间延迟）相比，MQC 可以找到能量值明显较低的样本，并提高结果的再现性。 本文提出一种名为多量子比特校正（MQC）的新方法，用于改进量子退火器的后处理过程，通过降低激发态能量值来提高结果的可重复性。 Ramin Ayanzadeh,John Dorband,Milton Halem,Tim Finin quant-ph,cs.ET

authors_text: Yu Guo,Cameron Smith,Miloš Hašan,Kalyan Sunkavalli,Shuang Zhao
title: MaterialGAN: Reflectance Capture using a Generative SVBRDF Model
title_zh: MaterialGAN：使用生成 SVBRDF 模型进行反射率捕获
abstract: We address the problem of reconstructing spatially-varying BRDFs from a small set of image measurements. This is a fundamentally under-constrained problem, and previous work has relied on using various regularization priors or on capturing many images to produce plausible results. In this work, we present MaterialGAN, a deep generative convolutional network based on StyleGAN2, trained to synthesize realistic SVBRDF parameter maps. We show that MaterialGAN can be used as a powerful material prior in an inverse rendering framework: we optimize in its latent representation to generate material maps that match the appearance of the captured images when rendered. We demonstrate this framework on the task of reconstructing SVBRDFs from images captured under flash illumination using a hand-held mobile phone. Our method succeeds in producing plausible material maps that accurately reproduce the target images, and outperforms previous state-of-the-art material capture methods in evaluations on both synthetic and real data. Furthermore, our GAN-based latent space allows for high-level semantic material editing operations such as generating material variations and material morphing.
summary: We address the problem of reconstructing spatially-varying BRDFs from a small set of image measurements. This is a fundamentally under-constrained problem, and previous work has relied on using various regularization priors or on capturing many images to produce plausible results. In this work, we present MaterialGAN, a deep generative convolutional network based on StyleGAN2, trained to synthesize realistic SVBRDF parameter maps. We show that MaterialGAN can be used as a powerful material prior in an inverse rendering framework: we optimize in its latent representation to generate material maps that match the appearance of the captured images when rendered. We demonstrate this framework on the task of reconstructing SVBRDFs from images captured under flash illumination using a hand-held mobile phone. Our method succeeds in producing plausible material maps that accurately reproduce the target images, and outperforms previous state-of-the-art material capture methods in evaluations on both synthetic and real data. Furthermore, our GAN-based latent space allows for high-level semantic material editing operations such as generating material variations and material morphing.
abstract_zh: 我们解决了从一小组图像测量中重建空间变化的 BRDF 的问题。这从根本上来说是一个欠约束的问题，之前的工作依赖于使用各种正则化先验或捕获许多图像来产生合理的结果。在这项工作中，我们提出了 MaterialGAN，一种基于 StyleGAN2 的深度生成卷积网络，经过训练可以合成真实的 SVBRDF 参数图。我们证明，MaterialGAN 可以在逆向渲染框架中用作强大的材质：我们优化其潜在表示，以生成与渲染时捕获图像的外观相匹配的材质贴图。我们在使用手持手机在闪光照明下捕获的图像中重建 SVBRDF 的任务中演示了该框架。我们的方法成功地生成了合理的材质图，可以准确地再现目标图像，并且在合成数据和真实数据的评估中优于以前最先进的材质捕获方法。此外，我们基于 GAN 的潜在空间允许进行高级语义材质编辑操作，例如生成材质变化和材质变形。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MaterialGAN，一种基于StyleGAN2的生成模型，用于从少量图像中重建空间变化的SVBRDF（双向反射分布函数）参数图。
AI.motivation: 传统SVBRDF重建方法依赖正则化先验或大量图像输入，存在效率低、约束不足的问题。本文旨在通过生成对抗网络（GAN）提供更高效的材料先验，以少量图像实现高质量重建。
AI.method: 基于StyleGAN2构建MaterialGAN，训练其生成逼真的SVBRDF参数图；通过优化生成模型的潜在空间表示，在逆向渲染框架中匹配目标图像的渲染结果。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据集上均优于现有方法，能准确还原目标图像并支持材料变体生成与形态编辑等语义操作。
AI.conclusion: MaterialGAN验证了GAN潜在空间在逆向渲染中的有效性，为低样本量下的材料捕获与编辑提供了新范式。
